That's so sweet, Inger. I love the animals you share about even if I have never met them. You make me long so much more to have my own farm...just today I thought I should go back to school and learn to really raise vegetables, and then have a farm with goats and lambs and chickens and cats and dogs. What a dream. And a horse.

Thanks for your inspiration....and your response too (and I agree with you, though my lost time is truly lost, his is invested and thousands of people benefit. In my case, no one did. Although I now see it all as a blessing, except for the lack of even an acknowledgment/kind word). It has taught me so much about human nature, and about not idolizing anyone, no matter how much you look up to and admire them.)

Love your birch sap as well. How cool!!!!! Have you thought about doing a blog about country life??

### Inger — 2013-04-24T07:30:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-84723>

Yes it does is fun Hope, to have animals! But I have no clue either how to do it all and sometimes it all grows over my head and I get so stressed out.. especially when someone dies or gets sick.. Great way to learn humbleness though. Even if often not so pleasant. But when I see the 5 sweet lambs playing, running and jumping around in the sunset on their pasture.. exploding from energy and joy.. then I get tears in my eyes from joy too and I think, it was all so much worth it.

No time for blogging about countrylife..lol If I had the time I would rather do a book.. a special art work. I do hope one day...

Hope... I can understand you are disappointed.. But does it feel good to be? No.. So I would just let it go. I myself have learned something in life that really helps not getting disappointed on others. Never demand anything.
Demand only from yourself. It will be easy for you Hope, you have such a beautiful heart.
I am thinking, others, what can you do, and what does it bring to demand anything from anyone? Only I am responsible for my happiness. It makes a huge difference to me. And often, it also helps to see it from the other persons angle. We often forget that, we see it only from our own egoistic view. It does not bring happiness at all.. at least not to me. **Give, and you will recieve**. This is magic pure.. and it works. My own N=1

What is it we all are looking for? A healthy, happy life. So that is what I create. That is to me a life worth living. I do fail, sure, but not for long and then I realize I made a thinking error.. and that is why I felt not great. I hate feeling not good, so I change my thinking fast. And the joy comes back fast too..

Hope, I usually do it that way, I "idolize" a part of the human, that part I really really love and want for me too.. and the rest I just do not look at too much..lol Because there is not one man on earth that has it all right, that I can promise for sure. Me neither. I have kind of made an odd realization... when you look at the beautiful thing in others... it kind of expands? And they benefit from it too! Maybe we need to be loved? Maybe when we get loved without any demands we get better? Sure the times in my life when I felt 100% loved have been a HUGE blessing to me. I can think back on those times, and they give me strength and power to go through the hardest times. they fill me with joy and love, and I am able to share too. That has made me realize how very important this is. And that is what I want to be better at, so I remind myself of it again and again. There is still so many gains for me to make, so many!

I have promised myself to never ever become a grumpy old lady, ever! I am going to fill my life with sunshine and joy and life and love and stay like a child - exploring life and our beautiful world and people- until I leave... with a smile on my face

I had such a fun night tonight. I dreamed 3 different dreams, and I laughed in them all! I laughed so hard I waked up a little from it..lol I told hubs i the morning as we were both in the bathroom (he had to leave for a few days today) and he said, oh, I heard you had fun..lol. You laughed so loud! crazy funny night.
Maybe it was all the birch and maple sap I drank yesterday? Hmmmm...

I have counted how much water I get in about in a day and it is about 4 liters. It is easy done. I usually drink 3 glasses at once when I do. That way it is no issue to get a lot of water in.
I feel so great! No tiredness at all waking up at 6 AM.. and such a sweet tiredness when going to bed at 9:30 PM. No peeing at night at all anymore even if drinking so much water.
Today is tanning day... sun is here! yay!  I amk going to fix the fence around the lambs pasture too... (as good as I can..lol I can assure I am really no expert when it comes to building fences..)
And I cut back on the Iodine. Going slow now. I forgot detox is not so fun..lol

### Inger — 2013-04-26T12:50:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-84868>

Not so sure it is wise to start eating fruits yet. I will push it forward and drink sap and use the tiny bit raw honey for carbs and that's about it... until it gets real summer. till snow at places here... but temps are getting warm! Around 10 degrees C. The water temp too, it is +2 degrees C now. Ice is gone.

Was working yesterday, had lost and lots of energy, but I felt exhausted going home. I could feel how it dehydrated me.... really. My work is a EMF hell for sure, but I am ok with it as I work so few days. I cancelled the other workplace because I realized I need to be free now and that work would have tied me to it the whole summer saison. So I decided to stay by my old work, also less stress as I know everything there so well. I had a little too little foods with me yesterday me thinks, I could have taken more. I had maybe 1 pounds of raw grassfed beef heart and some raw beef fat. My coworkers always wants to know what I eat..lol they are great for sure. We had lots of fun again and the customers were awesome!
It was good coming home and drink fresh cold sap.

I am so amazed how refreshed I wake up these days! It is just amazing to be not tired at all in the morning! And I always wake up early, 5-6 AM.
My toes are not itching at all anymore either, and not swollen or painful either. But I am going very slow now with the Iodine, I just take it some days in the week and some not, and only a few drops. I am not going to paint my breast every day either, but today I will. Maybe every other day. I need to be sure my breast keeps firm as I hate to use BHs. I thought if I they get enough Iodine they will. At least Grizz wife's breasts got perky again after using it! I did the pencil test and the pencil did fell down so I think I need to not use BH at least not at home. At work, sure..lol

The webinar is here! Yay! I am going to feed the lambs now, and then listen to it.. it is rainy day today - so perfect.

### Inger — 2013-04-26T16:18:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-84875>

Just wanted to show how my skin looks like these days, IDK but I really think the hydration does it good! And I am one that always struggled with my skin. I am getting hope one day I might have the skin I always wished for.
I did not made my hair I just let it air dry, as I am about to go to the shop and it is raining.. it is going to curl up wildly anyways..lol I never need to put rouge anymore... since face dunking every morning my cheeks always has some color.

One more thing. My clothes do not fit?! I am not feeling fat at all, and I like how I look naked, but still my clothes are small, the ones I used last summer. Maybe I have gotten fat or it is muscles, IDK I feel I have gotten bigger....?! Weird! But I will get some bigger clothes that's it...lol I actually like it being a curvy women. I think men like it better too, instead of the model thin women we so try to be like.

### caroline — 2013-04-27T02:11:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-84911>

Your skin is beautiful Inger .... just lovely and natural and glowing ..what more could you wish for! we are definitely getting younger!!

I feel rounder somehow - as you said - more womanly. I always had very skinny legs - but they are definitely rounder and fuller - my skinny jeans don't fit the same!! LOL but I weigh less ......I am firmer too......

You still face dunk everyday? I had stopped doing that ... better rethink that! Do your lips have more colour too?

### Inger — 2013-04-27T21:03:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-84951>

I have no clue what I weigh Audrey... As a former bulemic I need no stress about weight changes..lol I go from how I feel, and I feel great now! Never any desire to binge a purge.. yay  Ok..lol I do binge at times, I just eat sooo much! Loads of fat and protein.. but only the good stuff! I never have any desire to purge! And I do not feel bad after either! I just think, I must have needed all this food..lol Yum!

Yes I facedunk every single morning. I dunk about 5-6 times maybe, not much. But I love it! I love how it makes me feel so refreshed!

I do think my lips has gotten a little bit more color too... They were so very pale. I do use a tiny little bit organic good quality lipstick though. But very little. One lipstick lasts me a year or so...lol
I am waiting for my lips to get even more color... but they are improving! I have always had those weird very small white "bumps" on my upper lip, not noticable unless I stretch my lip and look very close... but they are there. I think they are tiny fat bumps. I have them only on my upper lip actually. I really wonder why they are? And I really wonder if they could go away. I think they also make my upper lip look a bit more pale. But they really are so small no one can see them really. Anyways I do think it is not how it should be and I guess it could be from my intestines being not totally healed yet. At least in Chinese Medicine the upper lip = small intestine. Those are things I really am curious to if they disappear. I have the feeling some have disappeared? I have not counted..lol but I find they look like less now...

I had a "pimple" on my nose for years... it never healed really! It was scary... But after I started the Kruse protocol it healed! And has not come back... for over a year already! I am so happy. Those tiny small things tells me I am on the right path. Not even my mega healthy raw animal food diet made the pimle disappear... so weird. But the Kruse protocol did.

### Inger — 2013-04-27T21:13:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-84952>

I was with my friend shopping today. I was not shopping in a long long time. But he's mom wanted to buy me a beautiful summer dress because I showed her son how to wash windows...lol I washed he's windows in he's apartment, actually we did it togehter. She thought it was so nice I did that, that she wanted to give me a gift. Unbelievable what a nice mother. I have not even met her ever! So I had to go shopping with him then.  We (actually my friends catch) found a very nice dress, white with small, light blue flowers, absolutely beautiful! So now I am the owner of the most beautiful short summer dress ever. Cannot wait for it getting warmer so I can wear it....
No idea how I can pay back this beautiful gesture, really. Have to come up with something.

### Hope — 2013-04-30T03:10:14+0300

Inger, you look amazing!! Wow. Skin looks amazing too. So I am back but I have had so much energy this week, I have been decluttering our house. I am still in shock about it all but just charging ahead - it feels so good to clean out, be outside whenever i don't have to be indoors. But I am now so behind with things on the forum. That dress you got sounds lovely! But you'd look good in a garbage bag, I am sure. I thought of you this weekend as I wore shorts for the first time, and let my thighs be seen by the world. First time since 1994. LOL.

How are the lambs? That is neat you can see and feel the warmth coming back. I have started tanning and love it. My friends were laughing when I talked about it. I have never tanned before.

Anyway, DH just got home and must tend to him. LOL. Just know I am thinking of you and the lambs and hope to sit down and write more soon  I think being away from the computer when I can is so good for me....

@ Hope.. yay for using shorts! I love shorts  (not allowed to use them here tho because of my parents dogmas..ha but soon enough I will have a own place and use shorts all the time.. I cannot wait ..)
The lambs are doing great Hope! I have been by the neighbour helping milking he's goats and get some milk to feed the lambs too. @ Peter,
thank you for the video. it was beautiful... made me want to go there and ask if I could live with him..lol maybe he would take me as he's wife?  (but he seemed a bit too conservative for me..lol I guess I need someone who loves change..) You has this great gift to always give me those beautiful gifts exactly when I need.. ### Inger — 2013-05-05T19:23:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-85479>

It was cloudy today morning as I looked into the sky.... but I thought the sky was still so beautiful

I grieve. My heart aches for my good friend that suffers cerebral malaria down in Africa. so weird pain in my chest. I lied down on the couch for a while I was so sad and tired.. and then i thought of him and my heart got so warm. Like someone put a warm hand right where my heart was. It was feeling so strange and good at the same time.. and I got such a weird thought. Like he was suddenly in my heart... a part of me now. The feeling was quite strong. I have always admired him how special he was / is. He never feared any challenges.. he hunted bears alone, with bow and arrow... ate the meat raw.. organs and all. I want him to live. I want him to not be brain damaged. It makes me crazy to not be able to help him now. I know this darkness will pass and the pain too. Maybe tomorrow is better. Good I will have quite much work next week so I get some distraction, that will do good for sure.

A chicken was taken by a predator yesterday. I found another lady down in the yard as I went looking for the missing ones.. and she was turning turning turning around in circles totally in panic. Her neck was weird somehow. After some trying I finally got her inside and safe. I think she is fine now, at least she seemed ok today. I got so sad because of that one chicken that got lost. But we are getting baby chicks soon so that helps for sure. They are so cute! This chick is from last summer.. we put the egg in the oven for the last days because the mother did not cared to lay on the last eggs being so busy with the other babies.. and we managed to get live small chicks that I had to help out from the shell...

The wild greens are finally coming!
Had some for breakfast with my raw elk burgers + coconut oil, and I had some for lunch sprinkled on my salmon tartar with Dulce seaweeds.. it was so yummy

For dessert I had 1 duck egg as foam with 1/2 tsp raw honey and a few lingonberries and raw chocolate powder.

Then for dinner I had some more! I cannot get enough of these. One handful of nettles and one handful of ground elder (?)
[http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aegopodium\_podagraria](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aegopodium_podagraria)
and some other greens. I made a smoothie from them with maple sap + birch sap. OMG it was good! Totally for free and wild. I love wild foods.
I had two glasses of the smoothie and then 9 oysters au naturel. I think oysters are the most beautiful food ever

Then a handful raw cabbage to chew on as i like to chew on something hard at times.
I think that was quite a perfect dinner. I would love to have one like that every day. But oysters cost 2,40 € / piece now...

I was thinking about doing a challenge. Avoid all unnecessary electric equipment for "cooking". No dehydrator, no mixer.. etc. For one week, just to see if there is any difference and what the EMFs do to my foods. I love raw and have no issue eating all raw as I can make so many delicious things with mixers and stuff. So it would really be a challenge to me, way less enjoyment. Me thinks.... It might be the opposite, who knows! I really want to try it out. Maybe next week. The mixer and dehydrator sure emits a lot of EMFs, I have measured them all and got quite shocked. So I have had this challenge-thought playing in my head for a while...

My Iodine pimples are healing up fine, also the weird bump on my finger is getting better. Not painting any Iodine still though! I need to get the cofactors first, so for now I only drink seaweed water.

### caroline — 2013-05-06T01:22:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-85487>

Inger - I say a prayer for your friend - he is very lucky that you have him in your heart .....he must be a very special man...please tell us more about him...

That baby chick is gorgeous! When my Dad was a little boy - he put baby chicks in the oven to keep them warm and the temp was too high ...I don't need to tell what happened....

Your meals sound very delicious - it sounds like a good experiment to not use anything electric. Can't wait to hear more about this.....

### caroline — 2013-05-06T01:25:06+0300

I forgot to ask you ..... I am still so confused about this iodine stuff ...I fully understand that we need it - but if you are eating lots of seafood and raw and seaweed - why do you still think that you need more?

### Inger — 2013-05-06T07:58:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-85502>

Audrey the Iodine is rather for fast detox me thinks? I am no expert, but that is what I have understand so far. It detoxes halides very effectively = fluoride, bromide and chloride. I detoxes other stuff too, like heavy metals and mold etc. I have read. So that is why you must take the co factors always. I have been living in mold houses my whole life since a baby. I bet I have some mold issue to detox too? This house also has mold, I think. At least my siblings get symptoms here. I am doing well but I think because I live so extremely healthy..lol but still it is not good for sure. Oh wait, I do have a issue I think comes from the mold. I got it after moving in here. On one of the soles on my feet are this "rash", a bit dry skin that is a bit flaky and like a rash a bit.. very minor but it is not going away. It does not bother me at all and I cannot feel it but I bet it is from mold..? I bet it goes away when comes summer and I go barefoot all the time. I didn't had it where we lived with hubby, that was a new apartment and no mold there.
Seaweeds and seafoods give all we need, but the detox would take so long.. and some Iodine experts tell because of the bromides that are in our waters today the seafood and weeds will not detox so good. We need clean Iodine to get effective detox. Now Audrey I really am no expert.. but it all sounds plausible to me. Also for radioactivity, the sea I live close to is the probably most radioactive sea in the word.. because of Russia... and I have been eating lots of fish from here. I try to limit it now and I think also that is why pure Iodine could be a great idea. But yes, I think one have to follow the protocol very strict.. or it will not be fun...

About my friend. He do is a very special man.. He's motto was always; Don't wish - do! That is how he lived. He is crazy for sure. Struggling a lot.. but with this crazy force in him that makes him do the most challenging things.. and with a totally beautiful heart with so much love and compassion. He is so passionate.. so obsessed... so bold. He is scared too but he do not let he's fears guide him. I think sometimes he lack wisdom, or why would he have been so long in the jungle of Africa with 7 bouts of malaria nearly killing him and not leaving, recurring typhoid.. But so many times when I have been in the dark totally exhausted, imaging him in front of my inner eye gave me all the strength and courage I needed.. He loves the nature more than anything. He loves animals too. He loves horses and is so gifted handling them. He has the most beautiful daughter ever. She is like a angel from another planet.

OMG I get so sad now. The worst thing I can imagine is when your brain gets damaged. I think that is when you really lose someone, even if he is still alive but he will be a different person...  My mother told me yesterday as I told her about my friend, she remembered one man in Norway where she grew up in a small town.. He had brain damage from malaria. He always had white clothes on, and a stick in he's hand.. walking around totally weird. He was the city-weirdo.

About the Food challenge using no EMFs for cooking.. I need companionship.. Would you join me Audrey? One week?  I bet it is easier when done together! If you want to eat cooked you could use fire! Zero EMF.

About your dad baking the chicks.. omg. I bet your dad got some trauma from that.. poor dad. It is really not easy to get the eggs ripe in a oven I can tell, you must keep the door open and check the temp every so often! And then you need to sprinkle water on them too to keep the air and shells moist. Too dry heat is what makes it hard for them to come out me thinks. So I have had to help them. They get a hole.. but then they often had issues cracking the rest of the shell. But wow.. it really is worth the work as the small babies are so sweet.. so totally sweet!

I would be happy to join you some time - in awhile tho- I just bought a bunch of stuff that I will need to cook somewhat!

That was a really good explanation of why to use iodine - thanks Inger. I just keep remembering asking Dr. K about my iodine and he thought I was fine - it seemed quite high on bloodwork - but for detox it would be great.

prayers for your friend - do you hear regularly of his progress? You have a very soft heart - you must take care..........

Sally.. thanks for the hugs..  I have had some hard days. So dark not funny at all. But today is better! I am going to go out and feed the lambs and work a bit, and then write later ok. ### Inger — 2013-05-09T21:42:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-85748>

SeaHorse and Audrey.. thank you. I do had a way better day today, actually amazing!
Made me realize once again, it is all in our mind. The same things can look awful.. or they can look almost fun, like a funny challenge.. and you see beauty everywhere! That makes me smile. Because it means it will always pass when feeling darkness. When I only do the good things for me to heal, the dark mood will pass. And then it will be so much beauty around, it is all about my view/mind. I bet the Iodine let some nasty posions into my system.. that is how it felt. I really understand Jack does not talk much about the protocol, it is heavy, and the detox might be not fun... at all. If one does not follow the protocol.. ha. Like me . I am so anxious to start it with all the co factors and slowly titrating up, I really think I need it for sure.
Worked a lot in the garden with mom.. tanned.. swam in the river... But the water is too hot now, in the midday sun + 12 degrees C! And air was + 22 degree C.. tropical heat.. huh but nice! I lied on the grass on the roof of a huge birch tree where the sap is dripping - I had some drop fresh right from there in a glass and enjoyed.. by the river, it is my favorite place. I felt so heavy.. I could really feel how amazing the grounding worked. It makes me so peaceful immediately, it is quite magic. I so have missed it the hole winter long, a short dip in the river is way too little. I was barefoot almost the whole day too.. my feet got so dirty.. Now I will have two long days work in the city but hey, I have grounded a lot so I am ready! Cool. I also cannot believe how sunburn resistant my spots without any pigmentation are. Check the picture of my back, in the upper back in the mid, there are two of the, side by side.. they are not even burnt.. after many hours in the midday sun with no protection! (sorry it was not easy to take a pic of my spots)

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

I always hated those spots they got so easy burnt. But they are way better now since paleo, it must be the food I eat. If I feel they have gotten enough sun I have come up with the best sun protector ever.. mud and coconut oil mixed into a paste! Super. Works super and zero poisons. I use it on my nose too in the hottest summer if I am by the sea all day or so. Looks funny but works awesome! I come up with it when I had no money to buy the organic sun protection I used to use on my spots.

The earthing thing really is weird. The natural earthing with bare skin on the earth. Somehow it makes me very relaxed. It makes me very "in the moment", enjoying the here and now so much. Now it is bedtime.. huh the day passes so fast! Way too fast....

### Inger — 2013-05-12T21:33:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-85907>

The leader mom of the lambs have been sick last days... she stays around with hanging head and does not want to eat. man I have been so concerned. I did not needed this in addition to the detox-depression.. huh  But today I could see her eating! My mood got better all of a sudden. Wow.. I can tell the worst thing is when animals get sick, they cannot talk and I have no clue what to do either! No money for vet. So I do what I can and then it is to wait..

I took some pics, first pic was the evening before she got sick, it was so sweet to see how they all lied around Bruno. Little Emme has gotten so big and stays right by her mom's head.. and the dad too.. they all love her. So cute.

I had to take a picture when they lie in the ash.. they love to do that, so weird! We have burned some wood at that spot and they lie there often.. the white lambs are totally grey now, one can see it better in the first picture.. Must be something they need from the ash I guess. At least it is full of minerals...

I still suffer some bouts of dark moods but it is getting better. Being outside barefeet seems to help the best of anything! Now I am sitting with my feet in epsomsalt + seasalt water and earthing strap around my wrist. I read the new blog of Jack and had to run and make me a salt bath to put my feet in always when sitting here..lol
There was a time in my life when I used to put wet salt socks on for the night.. cotton socks dipped in saltwater and over them - dry wool socks. I am going to do that again, now I see it might not be a bad idea at all! I clearly remember it should help detox, I could need that now for sure! How come I did not think about that?! before reading the blog... good to be reminded. I am going to put them on tonight.

I had a mega smoothie with birch sap and wild edibles an hour ago or so.. those makes me feel really good! IDK but when not facing any ugly detoxes the world looks so beautiful, I do not want to miss that one day.. So I am really going to be careful. AFAIK I do not have cancer or anything that serious so I can take time to heal and detox.

### nonchalant — 2013-05-12T21:38:52+0300

Inger, I'm so glad you are feeling better. And I'm glad your sheep is doing better also.

### SeaHorse — 2013-05-12T21:51:38+0300

I was going to add that chickens like to roll in ash and dust to deal with mites too....do you have any bugs out yet Inger?...all animals will coat themselves by rolling in dirt to deal with biting bugs...my horses look like mud monsters now...I don't take it off them until the worst of the flies are gone unless I'm riding.

STILL no lambs....I wish I knew when they were bred and then I could figure it out.

I've been doing a bit of detoxing too from having the magnetico and taking tiny amounts of iodine and salt, plus I had my teeth cleaned which probably didn't help. It's funny but I feel like I'm detoxing through my skin from front to back. I had a terrible day yesterday and all night I hurt from my neck to my ankles but the front of me felt fine...hard to describe and I'm wondering about the "pull" of the magnetico..or perhaps it's just a weird sleep state I was in. Today I feel amazing, so I hope I'm over the hump of that phase of detox.

Also, Inger I found some Chaga that is wildcrafted here in Vermont (I love Vermont foodies). I started to drink some of that too.

I am so glad you are feeling better Inger - I worry about you alot. That detox stuff sounds really scary to me ... Iodine seems so powerful. I am going to get some next month - with all the cofactors and go very slowly ....maybe you can come and hold my hand and we will do it together!

### Inger — 2013-05-14T06:58:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-86004>

@ Peter that was one amazing video again. Wow. Thank you

@ Hope, have not heard from my friend in 2 days.. but I hope he is well. He is in my heart for sure, and it feels good. That way it is not too bad if I do not hear from him because he is by me all the time .

@ Audrey, you are right I take it all too much in my heart.. but I assure you you all give me so much strength, so I will be OK!  I suck power from people all the time...lol I suck love me thinks. Maybe I am a vampire.. HA. But it gives so much power.. I decided to stop worrying about the mama sheep. she is still not well, and she has no milk at all anymore the lambs do not even try to drink. But maybe she get well, or maybe not, she still was not a good mom because she only wanted 1 or 2 from her 3 lambs that stayed alive. 2 died. We can save one of her babies to be a better mother for sure. I need to think cold and clear.. nature selects for the best and that's it. My parents really not have money for a vet either. And I do not want to bother them begging for one. One lambs costs about 80 € and the vet costs way more so it is not really clever. Especially as this particular sheep is not the best momma. I need to adopt some of my friends mindset, he was always so bold about these things. Nature rules. So I am going to think about him according to this sheep issue, and I will get all power I need.

So... yesterday was the first day in a long time that I felt like a... queen!!! First thing in the morning I could feel now my system had cleared up. I had the most amazing energy all day long at work.. and the most crazy good mood! Boah.. that is when I felt how important it is to be healthy because that is what makes our moods too! Everything feels totally different! The challenges feels just so fun and interesting, love is all around..lol I was biking to the neighbor (the guy with the goats) after work to get some more raw goats milk, and we had so much fun. We talk and talk.. and I got so exited talking I have no idea how I managed to drop the bucket with milk.. but somehow it fell on the ground and all the milk was wasted.. OMG too sad! But my friend laughed so hard he thought it was too funny.. and then we went into he's kitchen (he runs a party service too) and he gave me lots f new milk, more then I had, for free! He is just so kind. He thinks I am so crazy drinking fishhead smoothies for sure.. but we have loads of fun.

I also have realized high fat alone does not cut it for breakfast for me. I need loads of protein. Still. Then I am satisfied for many many hours. But I really need one pound of fish or close to the same amount of meat. + lots of fat. I do not feel that much hunger at all in the morning but I still eat, and it feels great! Have been drinking a huge wild greens smoothie every day last days.. I bet that has helped to clear out those evil toxins too!

I stepped on something barefeet the other day and got a wound under my foot. Outch it hurts because I forgot to be careful and I am sure I got some chicken shit in there.. as I continued to walk barefoot. Tonight I woke up at 3 AM because it hurted.. after only 4,5 hours of sleep. I just did not get sleepy anymore so then I raised and took care of the wound and put some Iodine on it. Feels much better already! I will have to waitress the whole day today and step on that foot so I better get it well fast! Now I have slept way too little.. but then I had some more time for this site..lol and I feel great so I think one night with less sleep will be fine. Tomorrow I have no work and can stay home tanning and earthing all day long.. yay!

I built a small "house" for the sheeps to get some shade as there are no trees on their pasture.. I first was so proud that I was able to.. and it was so fun to make it, but later I thought it was too ugly! Hubs come home and asked; what is this tower house there on the pasture? OMG I laughed so hard. He has this black humor that makes me laugh so hard and all the sad things are way less sad all of a sudden!

Oh.. and we have gotten chick babies! 4 so far! The mom has a huge pile of eggs under her.. I must go out now and check how they are doing, they are just too sweet.

And then I have found the best all natural deo ever. Lemon juice! I just rub a piece of raw organic lemon under my armpits.. ready to go! I have tried it for 3 days now at work... it works awesome!!! I read it somewhere and decided to give it a try. Thanks God I did. No one of the organic deos I can get in the shop works well, really. But this.. wow.

### SeaHorse — 2013-05-16T23:00:59+0300

Hey Inger....twin lambs born today from the first time mom-- a ewe and a ram lamb! Everything went very well and she is an excellent mother....didn't even mind us watching while her second one was born. I'm taking a week long trip on Saturday, so I'm very relieved one of the sheep has lambed. The other one may wait until I get back, she doesn't look ready yet.

Lambs are so funny, they fell asleep after nursing standing up and then kind of collapsed in a heap. Being born is hard work. My daughter took pictures, but I'll have to wait until she can download them. Off to put some iodine on their navels.....animal people never forgot the power of iodine like the medical profession did.

### Inger — 2013-05-17T08:03:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-86298>

Oh SH.. how cute! I did not know one could put iodine on their navels... hmm. Yes please post pics when you can!

I think I know why our momma got sick. The other day we sat in the lambs pasture with my brother kuddling with the lambs.. and I see the neighbor coming with a Â´bag of something.. and feeding them.. I thought it looked like bread? I forgot I was in bikini.. and I run through the pasture and took the bread pieces from the ground and throw them on the other side.. I said please do not feed the lambs bread they get sick! The neighbor got angry... and said I can never throw bread at the ground. I must know that. Like it is holy. OMG. I tried to cool down and said, ok but never feed our lambs bread anymore. I wanted to tell him what he could feed them but he was angry and wanted not to hear. So later I wrote papers and hung them up and there I wrote what one can feed them or not. This is the only neighbor that is not so very nice maybe. I should not have gone so upset but I was so worried for the momma if we lose her the lambs have no mom! Now she is way better! She eats.. she even has some milk again!

Ok I am so busy.. I need to work 3 days in the row whole day.. and then comes sister with 8 kids.. I still have some ugly Iodine detox pimples.. must make every women feel very beautiful when they see me..lol At least one positive thing.. HA. Alwys look at the bright side in life . And I feel great! Mood is fantastic, life is beautiful... my wounds under my foot are healing too.. I just had a huge breakfast.. one pound of elk meat as raw burgers.. lots and lots of coconut oil and raw onions.. yum! Sun is shining... I was earthing almost hole day yesterday doing work in the garden, I have planted lots and lots of yummy stuff.. cucumbers.. dill.. carrots.. etc. .. ok now I need to run to work.

### Inger — 2013-05-17T20:07:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-86322>

Yes Jack.. my mom has 15 so it must be in the genes..lol

Now.. what a amazing day at work! I got to hear so nice things from not only one man.. how come they did not see my ugly pimples..??? Huh? I bet because this new habit of mine drinking huge amounts of great water makes my eyes at least, so clear and nice! They must have looked into them only...lol Wow.. amazing day. On the way home from work I got to pick up my weekly 13 oysters, and there was the fisherman himself.. he was in the "coldroom" filleting fish but the door was open.. I saw he throw away the heads into a trashcan. I asked the the staff if they could ask him if he would give me the heads, and they did. He come out of the room.. and we talked and talked. It was magic. I know him, he is a former model and I went to the same cooking course as he's wife when I was 17 yo, she is a model too. They have now 8 kids. He is the local fisherman and wow he look good. So deep sun tan, so muscular.. He is a real man 100%. he had such strong energy and he was looking me in my eyes with all this fire and I my heart expanded.. and it felt like love.. and joy and WOW. I had to sing all the way home on my bike. I forgot my feet hurt because of the wound, they really did not anymore at all! He gave ma all the heads.. a big bag full! He looked in my shopping bag and saw my oysters.. he said; wow are you eating these? He loves them more than anything. My oysters are from Bretagne and he told me he was there and got one whole dolly-tub full for 10 €! Here they cost me 2,40 € for one.... He said he might move to Bretagne, he would love to. He said he was so very happy I wanted he's fish heads.. no one wants them today he said. Imagine.. I got them all for free.

Now I feel like a queen. I had 5 oysters and a small glass of Malbec too.. and one small organic avocado.

Tomorrow will be as nice I know. I need to do some earthing before work for sure so I do not begin to fly..huh. I took a swim in the river for a hour ago too. And in the morning too for sure. My sister is very religious like my parents and they they hit their kids too as my parents did and it all makes my heart cry but I will look at the kids instead. They are so beautiful. they are small angels, very special kids. I always take them with me in the nature and they love it. We will have a great time I know. When I see them my heart always melts and it feels so much like love

### Inger — 2013-05-20T08:48:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-86519>

First time I managed to really turn the sadness into joy, when it comes to the family of my sister. A big thing for me. Instead of spending any time with the adults and listen to their religious and dogmatic talk and be sad about the abuse that happends in family, I just spended the whole day with the kids! and I can tell we had so much fun! We CT'ed in the river... walked in the water... sat on my balcony scantily clad/naked in the sun.. and ate raw goose egg foam with raw cacao.. man, the kids loved it! They even wanted to eat my wild caught fish soup with roe (only ingredients were fish, roe, curcumin, salt and butter) and they loved it! We played with the lambs too.. I took care the kids and we all got a lot of earthing in. I think the best gift I can give them is the good feeling such things give one, and they might always want to go back to that. Now I am their best friend..lol Amazing to see how kids naturally love the most healing things. We ate wild flowers and greens too.. the kids got totally exited to pick me what I showed was edible and eat with me.. ha. Then the two oldest girls got so exited about trying on my dresses! Here they wanted me to tell who of them I think had the most beautiful dress.. oh my it was impossible..lol (and uh their mom should not see this.. they are not allowing girls / women to make themselves pretty either..)

### Inger — 2013-05-20T08:58:21+0300

These kids have never got any vaccinations.. because of their dads religion. They have those rules. But I think that rule is a great one! They are not eating a healthy diet but live in a house outside the city and have no TV either.. and they are so good in playing. They play and play..lol I need to focus on the good, and add to it! ### Inger — 2013-05-22T12:41:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-86654>

Now that was all too funny!  I really got to experience how kids wants to do all like the adults do, they really look up to us... Those small girls above followed me everywhere, and yesterday morning before going to work I prepaired raw fish in my kitchen for the goose. The little girl in the red dress by my side. I then dug out a fish eye from the baltic herring, and ate it. I said to her these are really yummy! I took another eye and ate. She said, I want too! I said, sure! And dug out one eye for her too. She took it with her tiny fingers and put it in her mouth and chewed around and said..mmm..mm good! I gave her another eye.. she liked it. I had to laugh later when thinking about it! She also asked, do you have more food? let me see in your fridge! I said..hmm.. wait. The only thing I could think of was some raw organic ground beef I had for hubby. I took it out and asked her if she wants to try that. She said, yes! And grabbed some plain and raw with her fingers. Yum! LOL Now I am their hero. I am going to teach them all the magic I know of.. and when they grow up it will be a fountain of joy and happiness wherever they are. I am going to visit them this summer that is for sure!

Their parents had forbidden them to try on my dresses anymore - for them it is sinful to make oneself pretty as a girl, like it was for me when I was a kid too. She come into my place yesterday morning and whispered in my ear..; I am not allowed to try on your dress anymore. My heart ached a bit as she said this because I remembered so well how my parents throw away the clothes I really found pretty.. and how the guys in school said to me I was so ugly.. oh man. I struggled to not show her my pain and then I whispered back; But Sofia.. I think this skirt you have on now looks very much like a princess dress too, it is so beautiful! She smiled, and then she went on playing with a big teddy bear I have, she took the red dress she loved so much that she has on in the picture above, and put it on the teddy bear instead.. Kids are just so beautiful in their heart. Amazingly beautiful.

I was swimming i the river.. in the rain. I love it the most, to swim in the rain, it is special. Then I had a lunch of graved salmon (home made), raw duck egg foam with raw cacao, and a huge wild greens and wild lingonberry smoothie. So yummy. For breakfast I had raw reindeer and marrow. Now I feel almost too good!

I had to face some sad things today with the chicks.. 2 was dead. One float around in the water.. and the other was just dead.. maybe crushed somehow between the eggs? But 3 was alive, so I cleaned up and now all 3 babies and their mom are happy it seems! I took away the bigger water bowl and left only the tiny ones, I do not want anyone more killed. I cannot believe the small chick managed to craw into that big bowl, I had put it on a plate to make it even higher to protect them from danger.. lesson learned. Sad though. The small chicks are so sweet.

Lambs mom is healthy again, and even gives her babies milk.

### Inger — 2013-05-22T13:51:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-86660>

Forgot to tell my sister, the kids mom, told me about a friend in their church that was diagnosed breast cancer.. and it had spread to many places in her body already. She lives in Norway. her doctor said she must undergo severe treatments (you know what) but she refused. The doctor even tried to talk to her husband that he must change her mind or she will die. He answered, he's wife makes her own choices and if she will not undergo doctors treatment there is nothing he can do but respect her choice.

She instead went on and researched alternative treatments on internet. They found a doc in USA and went to him for help. He had a anti cancer food plan, that practically made her eat fish and vegetables only. **Now, one year later she is totally healthy, from this change only!** My sister said this family used to have the crappiest diet ever... lots and lots of cakes, coca cola.. plain crap. I thought it was SO encouraging to hear what only those changes can achieve, and that it was fish and veggies... wow.

My sister does want to eat well and change things up but she has not much power.. she is very obedient to her husband. But I do tell her all I can, I told her to quite fluoride and gave her a fluoride free toothpaste for the kids and I gave her my Iodine too and himalayan salt. She struggles with her weight and needs to lose quite a lot. I do told her to go veeery slow, she is breastfeeding and detox would not be a good idea.

### Inger — 2013-05-26T10:58:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-86885>

I had this for dinner last days... it just is so yummy even if made of the cheapest pre-frozen raw wild caught pollock!

I just add lots of curcumin, fresh ginger, fresh lemon with peel, onion, a little raw honey.. etc... to one pound raw pollock and in the foodprocessor with it all.. so easy and quick. I never get tired of it seems! I added some avocado, and EVOO on the top. Had 5 oysters au naturel for first course.

Now the sweet kids are gone. I have been building a second fence for the sheep and lambs. Of course scantily clad and bare foot. I love that work, I could do it every day all day long! Took my little Emme lamb with me in the yard and she jumped and danced around me she was totlly happy, she ate so many dandelion flowers I thought she might explode?! Then she drank from my sunwater I had left on the grass in a glass bowl.. we both enjoyed it a lot

I also have planted lots of zuccini, pumpkins and cucumber.. that was hard work I needed to make a totally new place for them. But now it looks all so pretty! Cannot wait for the fall to come... it is going to be so cool to walk down in the yard and just pick my own cucumbers!

I weirdly have had no hunger last days.. I wonder what that is about? Maybe I should decrease my food intake.. I always eat about the same amounts also without hunger. But I might need less now... maybe only 2 times / day. This is cool! Maybe it is all the earthing and water intake that is making the difference?

### Inger — 2013-05-31T21:49:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87218>

3 chicks died.. one drowned in the water bowl.. so sad. I immediately took the bowl away and now they have only tiny tiny water bowls that I fill many times / day. No more drowning here. Another was dead under her mom.. and the third got sick and died.. nothing I could do.  Still 11 left so I really try to take good care of them. Man I get so sad when those babies die. They are so sweet and tiny.

I managed to come through the theory test for my lisence without issues! yay! But I do exercised a lot. First part is done. Now the driving is another issue.. man I am really not good at it.. my mind flyes everywhere but not where it should be.. my poor driving teatcher. Thanks god he is amazing and so kind and patient! Now Jacks last blog really was spot on for me.. I needed just that.... focus and discipline.. I burned this sentence of Jack into my mind

> So the current needs to be directed and disciplined, to get the action we need.

I feel like a murder too. I have killed so many ants.. I had an ant invasion in my kitchen. Horror! But I won.. me thinks...

### Inger — 2013-06-01T21:45:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87272>

Yes Jack is just amazing. I want him to never stop, really. He's blogs have been a part of my life for two years now and they give me so much.

I recogniced my hands got so very warm.. like glowing - at work yesterday, and also in the night when I went to sleep. I lied in bed and it was like all the heat was wandering into my hands.. wow! It was not unpleasant at all BTW. It has been so warm here now, 22 degree C. and in the night it is warm too. Also my feet got so warm.. funny feeling. Today I am going to sleep in the pasture (not the one where the lambs are now..lol they have 3 different pastures), because I really feel how good it does me to be on the earth. I tanned today and lied on the grass.. and I got so very heavy and relaxed.. oh my. It was amazing. So i thought, no money for magnetico, but hey, I have the whole yard as a magnetico! So... don't wish - just do! I have not been sleeping in the basement lately because it is a nuisance... to come there I have to wander through my parents home and I need to have my own privacy too. And there are so many lights turning on automatically when I walk down there.. I do not like that at all in the evening.. and then I cannot hear the birds and the river either. And no windy air. So I rather go out in the garden, as I do have my own entrance. I am so curious how I will sleep there, I bet great! I will be like Peter on our forums..

Had 2 big nettle + dandelion-flower + water smoothie today. Those were really delicious! nettles are very good stuff, as are dandelion flowers too. It tasted so creamy, almost fatty. Then I had oysters, and mackerel.. and elk meat burgers.. everything raw.
I got 5,4 kg whole mackerel.. finally! I had no for weeks, I missed them so.

I have to say food is HUGE for me. Especially at work (very high EMF there). It is a huge difference in my energy dependÃ­ng on what I eat, it is almost crazy. Yesterday I had 500 grams of raw prefrozen New Zealand lamb (ground), I ate it with some balsamic vinegar and olive oil. It gave me so good energy. It always gives. Or raw elk meat, or raw salmon. Those are all so good. But if I eat goat cheese they have on the menu (not raw)... if I have forgotten to take food with me and the chefs also have no raw salmon.. I feel how my energy get so heavy. I get way more tired.

I really need to be very strict with food to feel the best. And I also need quite much. My mitochondria are not that effective yet.. but one day I am sure I will need less food. But then my body will tell. I do have some days with less appetite.. but then all of a sudden I have huge appetite again the next day huh? lol

### Inger — 2013-06-03T21:13:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87398>

I love you to step up the heat Jack..! I think I need to go back and read BG 14 now to get an idea...

Has been so warm here.. too warm! Water in the river was 20 degree C today mid day.. uh! Now.. me and my brother got the idea to use the old well to water the garden and he build a pump in there. We filled my big CT rain barrel.. and I jumped in. Oh man that was good! It had 10,7 degree C. It felt like the Baltic sea water where I was yesterday with hubs, I swimmed around and enjoyed the oh so fresh water immensely. First time I was at the "ocean" this year. When I have my license I will go more often, it is 40 minute drive there so it is not too close. But it is so very beautiful out there.... from here I went into the water (I can never get enough of those sun warm rocks.. to lay on them gives a special energy..)

and right there was those delicious wild onions. Hubby loved them too!

My sleep outside was not really successful..lol First. so many mosquitos.. I had to go up and bring down my mosquito net. And then I still could not sleep because it was way too hard.. and man it hurt! So I gave up in the end and took my stuff and climbed up in my apartment again.. it was 2 AM. I really wonder how Peter does it? I need to take a mattress for sure, and/or find a place without bumps.. I felt like the princess on a pea really.. I was so disappointed in me.
I do sleep very good up here too but I do wanted to be a bit more magnetized. Now I had put my glassbowl with water on the grass in the yard, to get it more magnetized too, and after it was there the whole day, and I wanted to drink it, the goose couple took a walk around my glassbowl.. and flupps, had they drunk from my water! And if someone has ever seen a goose drinking, the water is just a mess after! My so wonderful clean sun-fresh peppermint-magnetico-water was all of a sudden a grey mess.  No way could I drink it. So I really need to hide my water now.

Otherwise I am feeling so good, mood is great, life is good. as close to perfect as it gets..

For food I had raw reindeer with marrow, 2 huge nettle smoothies, 3 whole mackerels raw, as a delish tartar + heads as a smoothie with linden leaves, and 1/2 pound of cooked mussles cold as a salad + a raw duck egg as foam with lingonberries. Also a few Brazil nuts, and celery sticks. I love those.

Audrey I cannot wait to get the license.. I just quit coffee yesterday because of that! Coffee gives me too much energy - not good when I need to do slow and learn to drive and concentrate. So it had to go.. bye bye. I do not think coffee is healthy anyways so I am happy. To help me stay strong I told myself all day; Yuck, I do not like coffee.. it is full of carcinogens, exhaustes my adrenals, makes me wrinkly.. no thanks. I do not need it at all!

I bet the best thing to sleep on is just a lamb skin or so. Something natural. I have latex mattresses in my bed, and zero metal.. that is also quite ok. I do hope the bromide in the mattress cannot reach me because there is cotton sheet in between.. but who knows? Maybe that is why I got so crazy detox from all the Iodine? Hmmm.. But now I can tell, I have (finally!) not ONE pimple on my face.. yay! But it took many weeks to heal, huh. I just started with Iodine again yesterday, but now I do different. I do only 1 drop with my BAB. And I will let it stay that way until I get money for the co factors.

Just had this for BAB. One pound raw dehydrated elkburgers, with onion, cucumber, Himalayan salt, coconut oil. For dessert a few teaspoonful of wild grown lingonberries (not the whole glass you see in the pic..lol I just eat right out from it for convenience). That is how my breakfast looks most of the time. Very easy and single-like..lol

I was with my bro and he's girlfriend and baby on a free event in the neighbourhood, it was a 2 hour presentation about wild edibles! We sat outside.. and there were so many people, maybe 100? Much for such a small town. People start to get interested in what nature can offer. It was so fun, I enjoyed it so very much! The presentator told there are many hundreds of edible plants in Finland we could use for food.... amazing.

So sunny and warm still, and I have gotten a pretty deep tan...

I have such a beautiful road to my shopping center. I enjoy it immensely every single time I go to buy food. Almost all the way looks like this, on the side of a 1 "road" railway.

The best place is here in the pic where I have to walk over the river. I love the intense grounding effect... I always bike bare feet just carry my shoes in my bag and put them on when I arrive at the shop.

### caroline — 2013-06-05T11:07:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87515>

Beautiful pictures Inger and of course your food pictures are wonderful. I love your apartment - that is so my style - very clean and uncluttered but with only things that matter to you. I have always loved Danish modern style - I love Teak furniture. We used to have the most gorgeous Teak dining room set - with stainless steel fittings - I was very sad when we had to sell that set. You eat a pound of meat for breakfast? that is so good! I really need to buy a dehydrator. I sometimes do GS hamburgers in the oven on low heat for awhile - but my oven turns off in 2 hours - so I can only do it if I am home. I am never quite sure what temp and how long to leave them ......
That wild edible presentation sound so interesting - I would love to go to something like that.

How long do you bike to do your shopping? You are a very resourceful girl. What is the population of your area? It seems so rural and lovely.

I posted that iodine stuff in Christi's journal - I think that book is very worthwhile to have.....

Glad to hear that your pimples are gone and you are once again completely ravishing!!
What about that man you gave your phone number to????? You aren't keeping something from me are you???

### nonchalant — 2013-06-05T16:23:17+0300

### Inger — 2013-06-05T21:18:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87572>

Yes Audrey, next time you want to go and shop some clothes.. buy a dehydrator instead, easy!
I bike maybe only 10 minutes. It is not long a way at all. I love to bike, much more than drive in a car. And it is for free too. Why are the things that are for free almost always better?

The amazing man.. IDK! Sunday someone had called my cellphone 2 times.. at 2 PM and 2:15 PM, but unknown number. I have been thinking so many times, maybe it was him? I have no one I know that calls me from unknown number, ever. I so want to write to him a message as I have he's number as he called me from he's phone to see if my number was right. But he had two cellphones. At the same time I am kind of unsure.. because I feel so happy right now.. I just need nothing? I also am still married to hubs even if we are only friends kind of but I am not really sure what to do yet. Maybe the stranger man also is married.. he just got a hormone rush and then he came to he's senses? lol I sure want not to destroy any marriages. But still I really would like to meet him. So weird..lol Problem is I never carry my cellphone with me when I am in the garden and with the animals. And I am not going to either. We will see.. I'll let you know if something happends...

Sally,
the flowers are from the garden. I picked them to make my apartment smell good.. I love their scent! Okay I love flowers any way..  they makes everything so beautiful!

I am so glad I quit the coffee.. I bet it was a wise move. Now I have eaten all the 5,5 kg whole mackerels I got Friday. Just a few heads are still in the freezer, I put them in there to have some once in a while. I CT:ed in the barrel again today, water 10,7 degree C. So good!

### caroline — 2013-06-06T10:35:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87605>

How are you going with not having coffee Inger? man I love coffee...... probably a sure sign I should give it up! Have you started taking Iodine again? I just got some finally but I forgot to get a dropper - I will get one tomorrow and then start. They recommend that you salt load for a couple of weeks and I have done that - so I will do it tomorrow.

### Inger — 2013-06-06T17:01:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87623>

Dropping coffee was very easy this time..! Too weird! No headache either. But I psyched myself how bad it was.. instead of thinking.. oh I want my beloved coffee.. but instead I told me all bad things coffee does, maybe that helped?

I have been taking 1 drop / day a few days but not today. I decided to do only 1 drop every other day or even less, as I have the 7% Iodine. I MUST be careful I sure want no ugly pimples and dark moods again, no way. Please be careful Audrey, do it veeery slow. ok.

### Inger — 2013-06-06T20:42:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87646>

Actually I feel amazing without coffee! Even stronger well being-feeling.

The great thing about it is I now eat no butter either. Because I was using it only in my coffee, non raw, organic butter and coconut oil. But I know the butter is not good for me. I need grassfed raw butter only, eaten raw, if any. But I had non and used just organic. Oh man I love the taste... but my body does not love it at all. I know that the butter and coffee (and occasional HWC at work..) is why I still have a tiny bit cellulite on my upper legs. Very little but I want non. I am sure now it will soon disappear! No butter, no cream at all for me. Maybe once in a while some real good raw goats or sheep cheese, but that is.

For food I had

BAB = almost one pound raw elk burgers as always, with coconut oil and cucumber. A few spoonful of lingonberries.

Lunch = almost one pound wildcaught prefrozen pollock made into a nice raw pate' with linden leaves,, onion, curcumin, EVOO, salt, tiny bit raw honey, organic fresh lemon with peel..... yum! One big slice of organic pineapple.. was yummy too!

Dinner = exactly the same as above.. but no pineapple.

I also munched on some wild herbs in the garden doing garden work. I also eat some fresh peppermint leaves every day straight from the flower beds, they are so yummy! They grow everywhere btw...

### cmegan — 2013-06-06T22:41:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87660>

Hi Inger!

I was just reading your journal...we eat similar breakfasts but prepared differently. I eat about 12 oz. of grass-fed lamb patties, I broil them, it comes out to 50 grams of protein when cooked. Then I eat seafood or fish for lunch and dinner. I have found after much experimentation that the red meat in the morning gives me a much more energy!
I am curious about using the dehydrator...what does your elk burgers taste like after you dehydrate them? Are they considered to be "raw" even thought you dehydrate them? I think I may like to buy a dehydrator...

Thanks! Chrissy

### Inger — 2013-06-07T07:46:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87680>

Hi Megan
Guess how much protein my burgers had.. 90 grams! That is because ground elk has so little fat. I add lots of coconut oil on the top of them, so yummy. I also sprinkle some Himalayan salt on the top and add raw onion and cucumber. I could eat the double amount to be honest, so yummy are they!

The half dried burgers taste mild and very good. Meaty.. juicy... chewy..yum! I never dry them above 40 degree C / 104 degree F. That way they stay raw. Do buy a dehydrator, I have used mine a lot. Makes the BAB absolutely easy! No preparing, just take the warmish yummy burgers out from the dehydrator and eat. I do not like preparing food in the mornings at all. My mornings are holy, they need to be quiet, beautiful and I have to have much time. No stress. Much yummy easy food.

If you like you can also prepare the ground meat and add salt, spices, raw onion, fresh pepper.. like for meatballs. But just dehydrated. I do not do that because I love the taste plain. You can also eat them with raw grassfed butter. I do if I have. I seldom have though as I need to order that from Austria and it is quite expensive.

### Inger — 2013-06-07T08:16:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87682>

(If you are a sensitive person please do not read this post, ok)

I am going to try something the actress Sarah Miles [http://img1.bdbphotos.com/images/orig/z/5/z5k6g63njfaazakj.jpg](http://img1.bdbphotos.com/images/orig/z/5/z5k6g63njfaazakj.jpg) has done for decades. _Natural hormone therapy for the poor._

[http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sarah\_Miles](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sarah_Miles)

I been thinking a long time to do it as I have no possibility to buy any DHEA or any hormones. And I do think this might be even a better way... if it works. I am going to give it a try, at least for a few weeks. It is for free...

Wow. I cannot believe I just switched my beloved coffee to something like this...lol But so far.. I feel great

### Inger — 2013-06-08T18:48:24+0300

Ok.. hubby kissed me on my lips and held me tight in he's arms and he did not complain.. Hmm. I need to ask him next time if he thinks I smell weird, ok? I love argan oil. I use it only for my face though. It is expensive, on my body I use EVOO and coconut oil.

Oh my. The guy called.. and I agreed to meet him for brunch or coffee, whatever I like, tomorrow 10 AM. Before work. I start to get a bit nervous.. I cannot remember but he's eyes? Maybe he is a total weirdo. OMG. At least he choose some of the most beautiful places I know.. by the Baltic ocean.. right by the water. I just get so confused and hope he does not like me too much, really. IDK what to do and hubby wants me to be he's wife too even if no sexual stuff between us at all. Which is kind of hard for me.. but maybe one day it will be? But he cares for me. Very much. there is something deep friendship that is amazing I have realized. So much trust, in a weird way. I kind of hope this new guy will be my very good friend.. yes. I do hope. Oh well. I should not think too much again. My brain always overheat. ### Inger — 2013-06-09T06:48:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87826>

Audrey I just dropped coffee..lol I have to decide if I take one cup today with him or rather tea... He sure is going to get shocked of my eating habits.  But there I am stone hard. I never compromise on that. Oh man.. my life is too weird.. and I already told him much about it when we first met.. about hubby and that we are still married but very good friends.. because he asked if I am married. Now it sounds like he got that wrong because he said in the telephone.. something that sounds he thinks I am divorced? I did not comment on it because I hate to speak in the cellphone. I always tell the truth from the first second on. Sometimes, though, people hear something different..lol
Of course I could not really sleep tonight.. I was way too exited.

I had something weird happend yesterday evening. All of a sudden I felt nauseous, and my mouth got filled with saltwater.. in a way it used to do when I was a child and before I needed to vomit.. But I did not vomit, thanks God. It passed after a few minutes. But man was it weird. I got scared, I do not want to get sick now! I ditched the golden fluid today morning because of that. What if it is not good.. or I need to go slower? Maybe there can be detox too, like with the Iodine? Or it was the weird mackerel. I had 3 raw mackerels for dinner at 4 PM. One of them had something weird in the meat. Of course they all had this anisakiasis parasites but those I have eaten many times. I always try to pick them away though. They usually are around the organs only. But this other mackerel had some weird strings in the meat.. orange colored. I tried to see if they moved but they didn't. I really wonder what that was. Another parasite? Something else? I still ate it raw. I SO not want to cook my fish! I told myself when I put lots of raw organic ginger in the tartar and then I ate some wormwood from the garden.. that it will not hurt me. Maybe it was virus of sort? I hope it was the centarian-virus.

### caroline — 2013-06-09T07:41:56+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87827>

### Inger — 2013-06-09T20:44:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87849>

Ok.. I can tell it was amazing. He took me to he's car.. (I cannot believe I just stepped into this nice car of a man I did not know at all -scary) and the we drove just a short way and he parked and said now he first needs to go and feed he's fishes before we leave for brunch. I was kind of.. hmmm... how am I going into he's apartment as I do not know him at all! Is this clever? But I went with him.. and he had a amazing home.. wow. So beautiful! Close to where I work. We then went for brunch.. and we had way too little time! Poor man he had to eat fast..lol We had only 1,5 hour time all together. I ate salmon.. and some veggies and pineapple. It was very good! I had a 1/2 cup of coffee.. just because of him...lol he then followed me back to where I work, maybe 10 minutes walk. He kissed me before I left.. and my head went all dizzy and... He's hands.. he had so beautiful hands too... very gentle and manly. Oh my. It was so perfect. He asked so much and I talked way too much! I had not really made my hair.. and I had not really made me pretty either... A little on purpose because I was so confused about everything. I later thought he will not call me again I sure messed it all up. I am way not good enough for him he was so nice. 100% gentleman. After work I just wrote him a message to thank him, and then after a while he called me. He has a very beautiful voice.. He asked me if I have time to see him again wednesday.. 2 PM.... he will leave earlier from work. I could not believe it was true. Is this a dream? he is a teacher.. and now has a own construction business. He is divorced and has a 11 yo girl too. Maybe he is a angel from heaven. I am not going to stress and think further, I will just enjoy.
Oh my.. how am I going to be able to sleep tonight. My hormones.. why are they so strong all of a sudden. It was even hard to concetrate at work.. huh.

I have to say.. my day was so beautiful, I just cried on my way home. Just from joy I think. I biked over the prairie.. I can always feel the "music" there, so strong. It is very special. I think it is the Schumann resonanz. It is almost magic. Now, that "music" + the strong beautiful feeling this guy left me with.. it was just too overwhelming.. and it had to come out in tears, me thinks. It does not fit all inside me anymore it was just too much beauty!

### Inger — 2013-06-09T20:50:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87850>

Oh.. and something more. I had weird stomach issues today morning. After breakfast (raw reindeer) I had some weird pain. I never have! I got scared, I was sure I had some weird parasite from that raw mackerel with the yellowish strings in it. I thought about taking Iodine but I gave it to my sister so I had none. Then I remembered wormwood! I made me a strong tea, a very strong big cup of it, and drank it all. I said to myself, die worms, die! I could not believe it but after about half an hour there was no pain anymore, and all day long zero issues at all! I love those herbs..  I am drinking another cup now just in case..

### Inger — 2013-06-10T07:43:56+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87900>

I could not sleep at all tonight Audrey. From only one kiss? This is scary. When I finally lifted into dream land the sheep woke me up. I looked out from my bedrooms window what is going on down there, they are on their 3rd pasture now that is right downside my window.. and they were running.. running around like crazy, bÃ¤Ã¤Ã¤Ã¤h bÃ¤Ã¤Ã¤h. I quickly dressed and ran down to check, thought maybe some of them is drowning in the river or so.. But when I come down all looked fine? A mystery. Maybe there is a ghost there. They kept keeping me from sleeping.. and then all the other moments there was only this guy in my mind. Now I feel so weird. I am going to not keep the sheep in that 3rd pasture at all nighttime anymore, no way!

Audrey you are just too kind. Maybe flaws does not matter too much if I just keep working on getting better? Guess what. He was totally sweet how he did things. Like, when we was brunching, and was about putting foods on our plates from the buffet, he cut two beautiful huge pieces of a very delicious looking fresh baked bread. He had so much food on he's plate..lol I said, you are not going to leave hungry at least.. and then he said he cut the other slice for me! he was just too sweet! Almost broke my heart to tell him I do not eat bread at all. Then.. we took coffee.. or he did it for me.. and he had some organic milk in he's. Asked if I want too and I said no I drink it black. Later he took both our cups and said he will get us some refill.. and then he come back in a minute and he my coffee was strangely whitish? Hmmm... he had put some milk in it..lol He had forgot I do not use milk. But I knew he just wanted it so good for me. So very sweet really. In the end I ended eating the salmon on he's plate.. yum. he was so sad he had to leave so much food. He opened the door for me in he's car.. he just did anything to make me feel good. Do you get now why I could not sleep at all tonight..

### caroline — 2013-06-10T09:17:18+0300

Or I will lose my home. But how ashaming to say, he might think I just do pressure on him to get he's money? Because he clearly has some. can you see me now? I it crazy complicated. If it turns out into something serious I cannot tell hubby anything before hubs has paid back the debt to my parents. No way can I risk that he does not do that, because I have zero money to pay it and I have no possibilities to earn more than a minimal amount of money here just for food, because of debt I have (I am practically bankcuptcy) that is more than I could ever pay working as a waitress here.. and also this is actually hubbys debt even through my name.

It is not pretty at all. That is why I am tied to be here and just wait until the money is paid back to my parents. I pray hubby will keep he's promises. He do works hard, I think.

My plans are. Go with hubs to Germany in fall, if he manages to do what he promise. There start my life new as I can earn pretty good there. Or. Move to another country, like Norway or Sweden. I could live in my brothers garage for the beginning. There I can also earn enough money to support myself. Here, I am tied to live here for free, take care of the animals and garden.. and not be able to meet men I would like to.. only in secret. So that is the situation. Quite ashameful to tell anyone. At least anyone with money.

Today I do made a decision. To post the divorce application. because I clearly see me and hubs just do not belong to each other in a sexual way. I never felt good he kissing me.. and he does not touch me in a good way either. how can that be right? No, it cannot. He does is very kind to me in any other way lately, and he has not drunk any alcohol at all in 4 moths! But I really think we should just be the best friends and I should stop fooling myself maybe. Even if this guy turns out to be just some fun or a short romance if even that.. I have to do it. Because it is going to stay in my way otherwise. My dear sister told me, when I do that, she will take me out for sushi..lol She does not think hubby is a good man for me at all.

But I can tell you Audrey.. these things are very very hard for me. I just am too tired in my heart even resolve it it is so weird everything. But I have to. It is my own fault, why do I married out of fear instead of love? very stupid. And that is what I have to change now. Even if it is going to be painful. I just have to. Or I will be stuck. Now, if for anything.. even if nothing else - this guy I met might have help me see that.

### caroline — 2013-06-10T11:42:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-87906>

Inger, Inger, Inger ...... everyone has a story..... this man as well! None of us are perfect ... we have all done things we shouldn't have..... we all have regrets. That is what makes us so human and so vulnerable. We all have our own unique story - but that doesn't mean we are unlovable or unworthy ..... we are simply human. When you care deeply for someone .... you care for the whole person - not just the good things but everything about them because all those things make up the fabric of the person that we love.

You must not think that your story is the worst .... it is simple different. You have overcome some challenges and you have more too ..... but that is life ..... look at all the abuse that Dr. K. has suffered and he is only trying to do his best and help as many people as possible. Does that mean he has always been perfect - I doubt it. I do know that I respect the man I see now and I think that is how we should look at people. Anything else is terribly unfair. You are this glorious human being - warts and all! How very boring if we were all perfect - we need a little scandal in our life to keep things interesting!

When you hear this man's story - what will you think? will you think - you have done some crazy, stupid things and I don't want to know you? Some things, of course, would be unacceptable - but your stuff - in the scheme of things - is stupid stuff you did when you were young \[we all do\] You are struggling to put things right now - it is taking time - but you will get there. Always, always remember ..... when you know better - you do better. That is what we need to expect from ourselves and we need to keep moving forward boldly and without fear if we want all the wonderful things that this life has to offer.

Think of this quantum entanglement - how did we all arrive at this forum? how different is our life now than it was a year ago .... we are forever entangled - it is simply too amazing for words .... in my opinion!

You have had great influences on your siblings and parents .... there will be so many ripple effects from all these things that we are learning and taking onboard and changing our own life.

Think of all the people that won't give up wheat or sugar - it is too hard they say - they couldn't possible do that. They have no motivation to change their life it seems.

You are a work in progress - pretty amazing I say!!

Oh man .... this is so long .... so sorry........

You said you didn't use cream then he gets you coffee with just a bit of cream? Have you mentioned to him that you recently gave up coffee? You said you are married then he later mentions that you are divorced? You are having wierd stomach issues?
