Audrey..lol we can promise to not look at each other for sure!  I do think cutting all that grass for the sheep has made me pretty strong.. almost like a man.

### prAna303 — 2013-07-30T23:57:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91195>

It is simple to find beauty everywhere... When you stop to be afraid and let go you will see sometimes pure art and sometimes pure ugly. The thing is to touch everything BUT not to be touched by everything. Life must have the dark and light but we decide which side we stand on. Today it is easy to focus on the cosmetic side on everything instead of the sublime and here we loose much. This applies to everything i think, take the concept of training for example. Now we see that many try hard to work out but forget about the mental side of it. If you are going to do something with a kettlebell, make it with some music and oops, you got art. Pure muscle and loud music in a stressed location, what is that? Lab perhaps? The same the other way around, when you live only in your head and without the body we loose our minds.

A little rant, been away for some time...

### caroline — 2013-07-31T02:24:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91209>

love your rants Peter .....can you tell us what you have been up to?

Inger - I bet cutting all that grass has made you so strong .......I think really hard physical labour pushes all the nonsense out of our head ....maybe we get down to basics? That is what they would have experienced generations ago......up at sunrise and then lots of physical stuff to survive and get food and then a wind down - maybe drumming and chanting around a fire .... and then bed at sunset.....

How are we going to hear from you when you go to Norway? I might have to visit.......

### Inger — 2013-08-02T13:02:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91365>

I love your rants too Peter...! Keep them coming please.  I was thinking about you today, what you mean with the sublime. So beautiful.

@ Audrey... I have a problem now.
I could not wait to look for a job in Norway until I am there, so I already checked something out, and wrote an email. It is a job on a hotel, receptionist and waitress, you do both. Very good paid, and you can live for free in the hotel. The hotel is a small cosy one with 35 rooms at the west coast, right by the sea. The owner seems to be very interested in me.. and I am so unsure all of a sudden. Holy cow, I forgot to think about a bunch of stuff when I wrote the email. Good about it is, I will earn great money! And it is so close to the Atlantic! BUT. Bad is, how on earth can I take my cat.. and they have WIFI all over the hotel! So I will have it in my room too. I do not love to live in a hotel room either. Sure I could find me a own place after I had worked a few months... but I have to work there for 1 year. I did not wanted to work so long. I wanted to spend some winter months on my brothers cottage to write my book. Ok, I can do it at the hotel on my free time too for sure. But I am not so sure about that EMF issue. And I really really looked forward to be on my brothers cottage. Sure, I could drive there on my free days/weekends for sure, when I get a car.. but still.

Oh man. Now I cannot decide. Also, it starts way too soon! Already the 12th august. I will need to go there from my visit to my sister close to that area. I had planned to stay by my sister from 9th to 17th August.. and then come back home and in a few weeks to leave for Norway. But sure this looks like a cool job. Now I feel bad for the owner too, looks like he really want me to work for them. I speak so many languages, and that is perfect for such a job for sure. Now I kind of regret I wrote that email...lol

I cannot decide, is it stupid thing to do, or is it only me that is afraid to jump...?

But... if I earn that much money I could buy me a magnetico too in addition to the car...hmmmm...

### prAna303 — 2013-08-02T16:19:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91369>

SUB = under, close to, up to; LIMEN = threshold, gateway, beginning.

The moment you cannot really describe, like watching a live performance like dance AND you all of a sudden starts to react. You perhaps cry, feel good and cannot say what it is. ThatÂ´s sublime for me. Digital worlds cannot be sublime because everything get down to 1 or 0. In the analog world we get all the small things inbetween, you get quantum where 1 and 0 can exist at the same time.

Hi Inger, I have not been on here for some time but had to check out what's new with you. And wow, what a wonderful opportunity! ### prAna303 — 2013-08-03T08:53:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91411>

When being normal is like making violence to yourself.

Inger, i do not know you by person and i can only speak from my point of view. With the two choices you have now i pretty much read what you really want. If you have to many questions about one of the ways, something is wrong on that road. For sure money can do a lot good but a hell of bad things to, i know because i had it all and gave it all up. Not a single penny can make yourself feel whole, it is an illusion because when you make money LIFE cost a lot of money to.

If you have to work on set up times you cannot escape bad situations, you cannot go away to feel free when YOU need to, thatÂ´s how modern work has itÂ´s function. And with that in the calculation, what pricetag has it? When you wake up the money monsters you better feed them 24/7.

So in my humble opinion: Go with your brother, live free and create your own art.

### caroline — 2013-08-03T11:07:17+0300

### Inger — 2013-08-03T20:59:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91439>

Thank you all so much for your insights! Wow.
Now what weird happend today! I waked up with a feeling, no way, I will not take this job even if I get it. Way too stressy for me now. Then my day went on... pretty awesome. I was with my brothers by my favorite lake too, for many hours. We tanned and cooled off in the water, and relaxed on the hot rocks. Wow. So beautiful. My batteries got full. My one brother is doing pretty good.. I am proud of him. We had great talks too. I was worried about him but looks like he is coming along.  I work on me too, and I see it matters so much how am I. Oh my. Looks like everything depends on me, holy cow!  Pretty awesome though, because you feels so powerful, when you see your actions and words matters. Often you need to do just the opposite what CW thinks but who cares..lol so many paradoxes to explore.
So... as the day goes by my mindset changes totally huh? All of a sudden I feel I could totally do that job! Crazy. Very funny, actually. I have no idea why that happened.. maybe I changed my thinking into a positive way. Like.. I can buy a magnetico pad and Schumann resonator to have in my bed. And I can have my window wide open always.. and I can go into the ocean every day, it is right by the hotel, just a few steps away! And... I will be totally away from my family there... which could also be a good thing. And.... I will meet so many interesting people there... and I could sleep in a tent in the mountains whenever I want too.. it is all surrounded by awesome nature. So I am pretty sure I would be able to compensate that light I will get in my eyes by working until 10-11 PM. I could use f.lux. and make it as dark as possible if possible when I work. Maybe after a while I could even use my glasses. I am sure I would find a way..haha I am pretty good in finding ways.

But, weird is, after thinking all those nice thoughts and getting pretty exited about the whole thing, I at the same time felt like, huh, would not matter if it does not work out either. That is great too! Then I will do as I have planned. But weird stuff, now I feel great with/about both things.. lol. Maybe I can see clearer now. I do not feel stressed about it one bit, as I did previous days. Oh man I was really stressing about the whole thing! But now weirdly enough I feel just so relaxed about it.
He will call me Monday and then we'll see. Maybe he think I am way too difficult already..lol I asked if I could do more day shifts and said I am a morning bird... and some others stuff too.. no I did not tell him yet I eat raw fish head lol. I am not worried one bit if he thinks, no way this weird old lady we do not want.. ha. That is great too!

Anyhow.. if I go there, I can always go earlier if there is something weird going on. Or if my health starts to suffer. The hotel is close to a small town.. very small. Probably there is less EMFs that here, IDK. here every neighbor has a smart meter too. I feel the difference so much when I am by the lake, holy cow. Only 7 km away and totally different. Maybe it is the rocks? Maybe the sun warmed rocks are very magnetic. That is what my bro said...lol

Maybe I feel so great by the lake because I drink so much from the water too?

I have recognized something weird. I always seem to shrink when I am there? If there is anything a little swollen, like my feet or hands.. they shrink.. and get so beautiful?! I really feel that lake (or also when I am by the sea, have the same rocks BTW) makes me prettier. I mean, really. It really is magic.

### prAna303 — 2013-08-03T22:13:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91445>

“You live like this, sheltered, in a delicate world, and you believe you are living. Then you read a book… or you take a trip… and you discover that you are not living, that you are hibernating. The symptoms of hibernating are easily detectable: first, restlessness. The second symptom (when hibernating becomes dangerous and might degenerate into death): absence of pleasure. That is all. It appears like an innocuous illness. Monotony, boredom, death. Millions live like this (or die like this) without knowing it. They work in offices. They drive a car. They picnic with their families. They raise children. And then some shock treatment takes place, a person, a book, a song, and it awakens them and saves them from death. Some never awaken.”
― AnaÃ¯s Nin

I do not feel stressed about it one bit, as I did previous days. Oh man I was really stressing about the whole thing! But now weirdly enough I feel just so relaxed about it.

Inger, the world is your oyster. You can excel whatever the circumstances. You know what makes you healthy, and you can maneuver yourself into situations that are best for you. Don't worry about missing a golden opportunity, you have the ability to create them at will.

### Inger — 2013-08-06T08:00:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91611>

Yes.. the world is my oyster. I just had oysters last days and still have two back in the fridge for today. man I have to confess I love them more than anything else I put in my mouth...

I got so serious yesterday. I decided I will take the job if they choose me. There are others looking for the job too, he told me. I will get to know today. It is pretty scary... there are good and bad things. So I decided to go if I get the change.
Now I need the next hours to pass by fast.

It is going to be much to sacrifice, if it happens. I was with Emme yesterday as I do everyday, stuffing my belly with delicious, overripe wild raspberries, and she was so sweet as always. She stand right by me and eat and eat.. but she eat the raspberry leaves..lol and she wants to be so close to me always. I have not ever seen a lamb like this, with so much love. She follows me everywhere, into the woods, just everywhere. She do not care about the other sheep and her mom at all when she can be with me. It is going to be freaking hard to lose her for sure. And my cat too. Holy cow. I get so much love here from the animals.. the other sheep too. they come to me and kisses me and stand so tight by me as they are able to.. enjoying my company. They just stand close to me so silent and loving, for long..

I looked out from my window today morning and that was so much harmony out there. the sheep are enjoying the morning so very much me thinks, they are always so silent by then. Like there is a special magic?

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

I took a morning pic from my cat too.. my old friend. She is going to have to stay here if I leave.

This is what I have been eating a lot too this last week, raw salmon chevice with squash from the garden + avocado. So yummy... like a sandwich!

And oh my... there are so many cucumbers coming!!! It is crazy! I eat cucumber right from the garden every day now, and there are waaaay too much of them! LOL I love it!

There is so much magic here. I am scared to lose it. But if I go I will find new magic there. It is going to be hard for sure. That is why I am not sad if I do not get the job. Then I will look for another and I will have more time to organize, which is good. many jobs out there.

@ Hope, you can always visit me if you like to, you know!

### Inger — 2013-08-06T08:19:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91612>

Oh.. and me and Emme was on our way to get grass for the other sheep the other day, and all of a sudden I recognized a deer standing not far from us on a meadow very close. I stopped and just stay there and the deer too, and looked at me and Emme. Then it said.. woff. WOFF. Holy cow.. I got so freaked out... I though, this is a huge dog!!! Maybe it will hurt Emme! I said, Emme lets go home, fast! We turned around.. and then the "dog" jumped over the street and into the forest on the other side.. and of course I could see it was a deer..lol Nothing to be afraid of for sure. I told Emme we can go now, it was just a deer. We went a few meters forward, and I checked inot the forest if I could see the deer, and there it was! Standing between the trees looking at us. We walked further and cut the grass and turned back home again, maybe after 20 minutes or so. At the same place I checked into the forest if the deer maybe was still there.. and there it was. Standing at the same place, looking at us. That was pure magic!

Later in the evening I was in front of my computer reading with my dark sunglasses on. I all of a sudden hear someone shouting in front of the house.. hello? Hello? I run down to the terrace and there was the neighbor daddy. I had only my tiny night skirt on and then my dark glasses, I forgot to take them off in the hurry.. I did not even had pants on holy cow. I pray to god my night skirt was not too transparent... So the neighbor said, your lamb is stuck in the fence! I said, lets go and check! There she was, poor Emme.. stuck! I helped her out, and we had a nice long talk with the neighbor dad and he's kids. They are too sweet, the kids. They adore our lambs, and they want lambs too.... they often come and feed them with flowers and grass. I heard how one day when their dad was cutting the grass, how the little girl shouted, DAD, DADDYYYY... please do not cut the grass! We need it for the lambs!!!! My heart melted right there. So small kids and so worried about that the lambs had not enough food.. oh my.

So nice neighbors here.

### caroline — 2013-08-07T01:15:52+0300

### Inger — 2013-08-07T08:34:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91728>

Thank you for the kind words!
Sally.. LOL about the barking deer.. I still have to smile when I think about how freaked out I got..huh

I will share with you how it goes all along Audrey, I promise. I am starting to get so freaking exited! They wait for me at the Hotel, and are really happy I took the job. Lets see what they say when they see me in person..LOL
I have checked the Hotel reviews on internet and the location. Personnel gets great feedback, bad feedback is only that at the other side of the street is a gasoline station where trucks fill gasoline.. not so good. Otherwise very close to the Atlantic, just a few minutes walk, and a small lake is even closer... so I have sweet and saltwater there, both. many lakes around too. Lots of great fishing possibilities... the Hotel restaurant get lots of their food from local producers and hunters and fisherman. I bet I will find great food sources there. Sheep are grassing in the mountains.. so that will be great meat quality I think! I bet I can find some lambs hearts and organs too. The city is so small, only about 2000-3000 people living there.

I can take a tent and sleep in it close to the hotel on lots of beautiful places if the radiation in my room will be annoying. Sure I will try to turn off the breaker at night.. will figure this out. My brother that is an electrician will visit me there next week, sure he will help me figure those things out, yay!

And if everything turns out to be a nightmare... I can come back here or I can find me something else for sure! I have zero issues to get a job... I actually never had. So that I am not scared of at all.

I will take picture for you there, so you can see how I live. Maybe you come visit me  And BTW, if I work over time I will get even more paid, +40%... and then I will have really much money, and then I can come visit you one day maybe! I am so freaking tired to live without any money, it is not fun to do for too long. I have done it for years now. Enough.  It served its purposes, and I am very grateful for it, but now I need to move on.

My sister said maybe I will meet a wonderful man there.. HA. She always want me to meet a wonderful man..lol She is so sweet. She has an awesome boyfriend too. I do not want to meet a man now.. lol I need to be with me. I am a little freaked out about that aspect because to say the truth men likes to take contact with me. Maybe I smile too much . I need to be really honest looking for sure. I clearly am not healed enough to choose wisely, as I showed with my last dating. So I really need to stay strong and be alone for a good time at least. I really need to do some healing. So I pray to god the men will leave me alone for now because that is not what I need. The guests visiting the hotel are pretty interesting people I guess, people that does projects in the wilderness etc. I am going to make some good friends there I guess!

And now I need to start packing.. I am leaving early Friday morning. All I need for one year in a 20 kg bag. Help! This is going to be challenging! How good I need not much winter clothes, as I adore the cold... LOL

### nonchalant — 2013-08-07T16:56:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91743>

Friday! That \*is\* fast. How exciting! Bet you can just feel the dopamine rush!

### Inger — 2013-08-07T21:57:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91755>

Yes Sally. I am not even tired now. That is weird.. I should be in bed. Instead I took some pics..

Thanks to Jack I never use my hairdryer anymore. After using it every single day my whole adult life.That is funny how my hair has changed.. I have some weird big waves now! When I brush right down.. after letting it air dry (using only mud for shampoo) it has such weird waves;

Looks weird now with this shorter cut but I bet it will look nice when I let my hair grow out, because I want long hair now. very long!

The heaven looks like this here now... thunder is on the way. yay. My favorite weather. It just started raining!

I will get rainwater again! Some days ago when it rained really much I collected so much rainwater I had only that a few days for drinking water, tasted so good...

Oh man. I want to write here on the forums but I have no time, I should pack now too BTW. I bet I will have time again when I have settled down on the hotel.. I am sad I cannot participate more right now, so much great stuff going on here! So many great minds

I am so very excited for you ..... so many wonderful possibilities and who knows what is on the other side ..... that, for me, is the best part. You are taking a leap and it is going to be amazing to figure it all out.

Around every corner is going to be something/someone new and extraordinary and you are going to suck it all in...... xo

### Hope — 2013-08-09T23:37:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91969>

Inger, yaye! I am so excited for you too. And of course lots of men will be lining up for you no doubt! How super exciting. And if people there go to do projects in nature, then surely there must be some great people among them. Woohoo.

The hotel sounds lovely.....and I will visit you one day, for sure. I don't know when and where but I will.

I hope you will meet some animals there too. Even one. Or even some birds who will sing for you. I so hear your connection with animals. I have been helping out a friend with a dog, she lives in the mountains here, away from the big city and wifi (there is no cellphone but a bad wifi connection and a regular landline) and the dog I take care of, plus the neighbor's dog, they are so so amazing. Like your lambs. When I don't see them, I miss them terribly. Animals are amazing beings.

You are going to be such an incredible light to the people there, on so many levels......wow. So looking forward to hearing more adventures.....

### SeaHorse — 2013-08-10T00:20:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-91972>

All the very best to you Inger....(I thought I had already written a bon voyage post, but I don't see it .....anyway HAVE FUN!)

### Inger — 2013-08-15T21:22:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-92667>

Finally time to write! This is so exiting... I think I am in heaven..??? In Oyster-heaven...LOL check this.. we picked oysters again today, me and my brother and sister, here are so much of them..huge ones! 2 different kind, and mussels and crabs and everything you can wish for. I just need to bike 10 minutes and ten I am there. I have a bike too now, my brother gave me one. He is just the kindest...

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

I had whale meat raw as carpaccio too, it is not even expensive here! Oh man, it is totally possible to survive without any money here when it comes tofood. It is crazy. The water is so clean it is amazing. Here is a beach 10 minutes away (with bike) and it has beautiful white sand and crystal clear water. We have been CTing there with my sisters, they are tough! I need to take a picture from the beach.. it is amazing. Here are hazelnut trees... so many wild raspberries too.. so much to eat.

It is so beautiful here. just.. wow.

I quit the job at the hotel after 3 hour work. It was not what they told me at all. Only late works, and even night! No way. I left. Now I rent a place for a tent in my sister garden, and I got a tent from my brother, he is so kind. I need no apartement at all! I LOVE to sleep in the tent... I sleep so crazy good! Now I am going to find a new job. That will be not an issue at all.
Ok, that was a brief update, now I will cath up on the forum a bit.. I had zero time for internet all week long, huh!

### Optimalbound — 2013-08-17T22:14:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-92964>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=92949)
>
> @ Optimalbound,
> I am close to Stavanger.... where are you close to? Are you gorging on oysters too? Holy cow they are so huge here! Just huge! And very good. I wonder if it is possible to eat too much of them? I think no? Must be so good for the brain....

Then we are living in the same area, now! Welcome!
I haven't been eating much oysters lately, I must admit, but I find that scallops and blue mussels are nice substitutes. I have no idea if one can eat too much of them, but I am a long way from any such limit, I assume.

Can't believe you turned blue in the sea. LOL... the last time I went for a swim, the sea was 18 or 19 degrees celcius and not much use for CT. Has it really gotten that much colder in just a week and a half, or did you stay in for several hours?

BTW, just a little tip: That small shop by the Tananger bridge that sells fresh shrimp and crabs, will also sell you crushed ice in huge styrofoam trays. One of these days, I might try some for bathtub CT, (My freezer doesn't have sufficient capacity).

### caroline — 2013-08-18T02:44:56+0300

That job sounds perfect for you Inger ..... you have nursing skills right? I am so happy for you .....life is good....no?

### Inger — 2013-08-18T15:28:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-93021>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=92986)
>
> That job sounds perfect for you Inger ..... you have nursing skills right? I am so happy for you .....life is good....no?
> Actually - it sounds perfect......you are living in the present and making the most of every second....

Nursing skills...hmmm some maybe, to say he truth. 15 years since I left that 3 year long lasting school.. and I never practiced as one but hey, I will learn fast!
I am more like a nanny now lol. I play with the kids all day long.. I just cannot face them looking at movies and stuff so I do my best to show them the beauty of life. They are just too sweet! 1 yo and 4 yo - boys. Tomorrow is my first work day.. so exited.

@ Optimalbound, wow you are close to me! That is fun! I pick my oysters close to ormen lange, a beach, do you know it? 10 minutes biking from Sola, where I live. My brother knows the bridge you told about... Today we are going to go fishing, I hope we get some fish! Do you know any good places for fishing? I need to save for a car so I want to use s little money on food as possible, you see!
No I was not hours in the water..lol but it is getting colder for sure, especially if windy. But yeah.. I am not good in staying long in cold water, but I do freeze less "ashore" so to say, as my sisters. I need very little clothes. Oh man.. now I know if I see a guy in the water.. it must be you...!

I know the place, but had no idea there are so many oysters there. Nice find!
Where to fish? Depends.. Casting from shore or going out with a boat? It's been so long since I've fished from shore, so I am not sure where the best places might be. I sometimes see people fishing near HellestÃ¸. I usually fish from my boat, which give me far more choice.

Today's tip: At Ullandhaug there's an ecological farm you might want to check out. Among other things, they are the only ones in the area that sell kale, that I'm aware of.

You have a boat...? Wow! If you ever go fishing and have some free space please let me know. I would love to join you for sure! I bet from a boat you cat get lots of fish. We were fishing with my brother and sister on sunday (it was a bridge.. I think RennesÃ¶y) and we got 10 mackerels.. just in 1,5 hours. They were so crazy tasty and fresh. So much fun.
Thank you for the tip about Ullandhaug farm, I'll check it out! I was at another ecological shop in Stavanger city and they had frozen organic goats butter! Never tasted that before. I made me some bulletproof coffee with it, very nice  They had amazing coffee too, whole beans. Just amazingly tasty. Roasted in Stavanger.

Oh man, I could be your new CT buddy. But I live in/at Sola... it might be far from you..? and sure I would turn blue and green in the water by your side..lol How are you doing with those beasts that burn so terribly? I see lots of them and I am scared to go too far/deep in the water where I cannot see them coming.. you know "brennmaneter". I am not too used to them, Finland does not have those. Is it hurting verty much if you touch one? I have never touched one so far. I usually stay in pretty low water and I just lay down instead, ha.

I am in love with whale meat. I eat it every day now for breakfast. Crazy tasty as carpaccio.

@ Hope,
I had my second working day today and it was fun. So nice staff.. just amazing. I drove the car today too.. I was not good at all but the guy that I worked with today was very kind and helpful, thanks god  (I do think he was pretty freaked out about my driving skills though, but soon they will be better, I just need some practice)
Hope.. at my work I get to see the results from modern life. Very much suffering. It is hard, very hard for me. But I learn to cope and do the best I can, and I go into the nature after work and I breath all the beauty in and I feel so alive again. You know.. there are so much suffering, so much illness and pain. You just do not see it too much at the road. I never thought I would be able to work with this kind of stuff but I am. I just focus on what I can make better for them, and I do that. I know it will be easier every day, the beginning is always hardest. You are just so kind, Hope. I bet I will glow massively pretty soon with all those oysters I am eating..lol

### Optimalbound — 2013-08-21T23:20:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-93368>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=93263)
>
> You have a boat...? Wow! If you ever go fishing and have some free space please let me know. I would love to join you for sure! I bet from a boat you cat get lots of fish.

Uh oh, what have I set myself up for now? I'm starting to fear that there will be MHS in my imminent future! LOL
Jokes aside, I'd love some company for fishing! I trust that your famous blender does not run on 12 volts, anyway..
The weather forecast for the upcoming weekend is pretty decent, as it happens.

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=93263)
>
> Oh man, I could be your new CT buddy. But I live in/at Sola... it might be far from you..? and sure I would turn blue and green in the water by your side..lol How are you doing with those beasts that burn so terribly? I see lots of them and I am scared to go too far/deep in the water where I cannot see them coming.. you know "brennmaneter". I am not too used to them, Finland does not have those. Is it hurting verty much if you touch one? I have never touched one so far. I usually stay in pretty low water and I just lay down instead, ha.

I don't like those jellyfish much, but their sting isn't actually all that bad at all. I've been stung quite a few times and I usually don't notice until I get back on land. Perhaps it is in part a temperature thing. It just smarts a bit for a few hours; hardly noticeable. But I don't think I've ever swum directly into a big one, which I suspect would be quite unpleasant. But even if you don't hit one directly, the tentacles can be a several feet long, and not always easy to spot. When visibility is poor due to waves or low sun and cloudy weather, I have goggles on and scout underwater for jellyfish every now and then. And get some free, cranial CT in the process! In any case, the jellyfish will all have disappeared in a couple of months.

Come to think of it, I have a feeling that epi-paleo has made me more resistant to jellyfish toxins than before, perhaps in a similar way to getting less sunburned now.

A new "CT buddy" would be great! Boredom is my enemy more than the cold, most of the time when I CT in the ocean. Would be nice to have some company, for sure. In my cold tub I can read or listen to podcasts etc. to keep my mind occupied, but as much as I love the feeling of being in the ocean and looking at the sky and feeling the sand beneath my feat, to be honest I often get a bit bored after a while.

I live less than 20 minutes north of you. And I work even closer.

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=93263)
>
> I am in love with whale meat. I eat it every day now for breakfast. Crazy tasty as carpaccio.

Shhhh! You are being terribly politically incorrect!
By the way, have you tried McWhale yet? Norway is the only country where McDonald's sell those things, I think.

MC whale... LOL I asked my sister and she was so cunfused..lol

Wow you gave me lots of valuable information here! When we CT togehter you could look out for jellyfish with your goggles, so I would not need to! I am not sure what all that saltwater would do to my hair if I had to dive myself.. Cool. I cannot believe you would let me come fishing with you...! This weekend already?! Are you sure you are not kidding? Maybe sunday? I need to PM you where to come, I have no car yet but I have a bike and I can use the bus for sure.

I didn't know it was politically incorrect to speak loud about whale meat..huh! I told loud at lunchtime at work I love to eat raw whale meat for breakfast every day..hmmm They asked, you know.
One coworker that worked with me told me she is going to start to eat like me. She has so much anxiety. Holy mackerel. I better do not tell her about my MHS.

\- - - -

I have ben stuffing myself with wild raspberries every day. I cannot believe how much here is, and they are huge. I am fattening up for the winter, very evolutionary..lol
I have been eating way to much dark chocolate too, 85 %. But I forgive myself as it is pretty stressing to learn so much new in such a short time. In a week or so everything will be easier. Today is my first day off after starting my new job.. feels really good. I cannot say it is easy to see all those ill people. Very different than waitressing. But I know it will get easier over time. And many of them are very sweet souls

### Inger — 2013-08-25T22:23:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-93736>

I was with sisters family climbing a mountain today. Here I am with the two older kids;

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

It was so beautiful. Just... it had to happend too fast for my liking. I would have wanted to do it slooow and enjoy the beauty way more. There was not even time for taking a swim in the beautiful lake. I wonder what is up with todays world, everything needs to be so "busy".. or am I just slow  When I get a own car I am going to climb up, stay the whole day and just be

My sisters hubby has agreed to shut off the wifi at night.. which is so good. It is a very strong wifi he has, it comes out into my tent too, holy cow. From the neighbors too, but just a little bit. I ordered the magnetico, 10 gauss, with my younger sister (20 yo), she actually had some spare money and ordered one for me and one for her, I'll pay her back. She is an angel for sure. I cannot wait for it to arrive.

Lovely picture! And I agree with you on the hiking pace.
I'm looking forward to hearing about your experience with the Magnetico. Just make sure the magnets don't start rusting in your tent!

### Inger — 2013-08-25T22:47:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-93744>

Oh.. rusting.. I hope not, huh! I have it pretty dry, so I hope it will be ok. Otherwise I will move into the basement, there are a room I can use too. I am happy you like slow pace too, if we go hiking together one day, I at least will have time to enjoy the beauty

Hemming, the climbing was great! Especially the parts where I had to carry the guy on my back.. I can tell you I got pretty warm lol
And me and my younger sister was barefeet all the way.

### Inger — 2013-08-31T17:28:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-94479>

Ok I so hope I will be able to catch up on the forum tonight. I work late shift and I have a computer here.. yay. Anyways it has been tough. Yesterday I worked 16 hours, practically. I might get an apartement soon... it is kind of magic how it happend. IDK why there is so much magic in my life?
This work is partly very fun and partly so scary for me. One day I got such a looong hug from a patient, and old gentleman I put to bed... it felt like so much love it made up for all the scary stuff I have had to experience that day.

It is scary to see what they get feed in their homes though. Everything is heated in the microwave. And the rest is bread. Never any earthing at all... and no sunshine either.

The feed I give the patient into he's stomach (as he cannot swallow) is made of pea protein and chicken and vegetable oils etc.. And ultrapasteurized.

IDK but I feel so fortunate to be able to run barefeet, swim in the ocean, eat wild berries in the forest and raw fish. It feels like so much alive

### jib — 2013-08-31T17:36:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-94480>

It sounds like you are trying to make the best that you can out of "unoptimal" situations. Sometimes we need to do things in life that aren't always pleasant, but it's your attitude about doing it that is going to get you through. Caregiving is a double-edge sword, as it's gratifying to be helping others, but has a "dark" side as well... Keep your positive thoughts always..it will help you cope.

### Optimalbound — 2013-08-31T21:54:10+0300

>
> I was fishing with Optimalbound today, first time,
> he has a very nice boat.... and we got SO much fish. 4 bags of mackerel... and other fishes too. It was CRAZY. He has promised me we will go fishing again
>
> (i was able to get a computer at work... so I can finally write something. I sit and watch over a ALS patient that cannot move anything else than he's eyes, not breath, nothing. I need to do many weird procedures with him it is all new and pretty hard for me. heavy. I am so exhausted. I have been working so much, and also too late. But it is only until I get my own place, then I will work only as much as I need, nothing more)
>
> We was in the ocean CTing too... it was not cold water but the waves was huge.. holy cow I was so scared but Optimalbound was not and so I followed him and in he end it was so much fun...!!! I am so exited to have a CT friend, and a fishing buddy too!
> Ok I cannot write too long posts as I might have to help the patient every second....

Thanks for the beach trip and the fishing expedition, Inger! Glad you enjoyed it - I certainly did! It was really good fun to meet up with a fellow forum member in real life.

By the way, Inger, did you actually manage to find room in your freezer for all the mackerel, pollock and cod that you caught? I still can't quite get over how many you managed to catch. You clearly have a natural talent for this!

### Inger — 2013-08-31T22:50:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-94512>

LOL Optimalbound you are funny  Guess what my cousin said that was visiting when she saw all that fish? She said it was beginners luck. That everytime you go fishing first time you have great luck. I wish it is not true... but anyway I will hav food for long now . as I left for work the guys in the house had started to clean out the fish. Amazing guys! I told them to save me some heads. I told them I will pay it back in some way and they told me they want me to massage their backs tomorrow. uh!  I will find some place in my freezer, that is for sure. If there is a will, there is alwasy a way.

I told the patients wife that is here tonight I love fish head smoothies for my brain to optimize it and she laughed so hard. She said she will never try one, ever. But she was kidding with her sick husband, that he could surely try one in he's feeding tube. Ha! I do hope he will try one day! It would certainly not hurt him, and he cannot taste it anyways. he seemed pretty intrested by the way....

Sounds like you had a wonderful day Inger with a new friend ....yes, please keep as many positive thoughts as possible. It is so lovely for your patients to have you taking care of them ...but will be so draining on you.

Imagine what Dr. K. goes thru on a daily basis. Imagine dealing with people that could change their life - but say they "can't"

Hi Inger,

Hope here - haven't been here much as I'm trying to be outside whenever possible and also am decluttering our small town home in my free time. It is crazy how much crap we have accumulated that we don't need. Also working on saving up for a new couch - one without chemicals. But anyway.

WHAT a beautiful picture indeed. What a magical place to live near....you are so so fortunate and how wonderful about the magnetico. Your body will get a nightly supercharge! I cannot tell you how happy I am for you about this. Yaye!

And what an angel you are to all those people you come in contact with..your family, your patients....wow. And I agree with you on just 'being'....perhaps you can be an influence on them. In fact I am pretty sure you are and will be.

Sending you lots of love across the miles~ until next time

### Inger — 2013-09-07T18:27:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-95141>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=94783)
>
> Inger - I hope your job is going good and you are able to work a little less and play more. Have you met anyone of interest at your work?

Audrey, my job is going great! I have a few days off.. and I enjoy to be with the kids, picking oysters.. etc. I found lots of wild blackberries today, I just gorged on them  the raspberries are almost gone, but the blackberries are totally yummy too! Have been eating ripe yummu plums too from the garden. I can stomach those way better than apples. IDK I wanted to go pretty ketogenic but my diet has been a bit weird..lol I have had HWC with lingonberries too... The weird thing is, even if I have not been perfect (after my standards - no crap for sure, I never eat crap) with my diet, I feel great! I bet it is because I sleep in the tent. I am in love.
I got the apartement but I could not take it in the end. I just could not. I fear I am going to stay in my tent..lol You know, the apartement was in the basement, but right over my head was the wifi from the lady that lives in the house, and she would not turn it off in the night, as they do in this house, they are so kind to me. And I had no wild forest close as I have here. This backyard is right by a small forest.. and that is my secret place. I love to be there every morning, just to feel the "music".

The children here are so sweet too. I would miss them. I will try to figure out a way to make it comfortable here at least a month or two, then maybe I move together with my smaller sister, she would love to live with me. At least if I stay in Norway. IDK yet. Many doors are open

Oh and my coworkers are AWESOME. They are pretty freaked out over my food (but in a good way..lol) and they love that I live in a tent. One said she would like to do the same..haha. They really are so loving and kind! I get so good energy from them.

@ Hope, you are an angel for sure!  I am waiting so much for the magnetico.. still not here. I bet they will be monday. I hope! My sister is waiting too.. and now my other sister and her hubby might buy magneticos too.. after we try them out with my younger sister. I feel great so IDK what could improve..lol so in case I do not feel any diffenrence I might give the mattress to my sister and her hubby to try.

Inger - sounds to me like your instincts are optimal - trust them in every way. Life sounds very good - you are in a great place for now..... who knows what tomorrow brings......how exciting  I am so proud of what you are doing and how you are doing it.....integrity, love, kindness - that is everything.....

### Hope — 2013-09-08T03:49:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-95185>

Inger, how wonderful, your news about your coworkers.....yaye! And that you are feeling so good...you are eating off the land, what is in season and available to you....so if you have those great blackberries go for it.....i am not surprised you are feeling so wonderful!!

It will be exciting once you have the magnetico...it's true you might not need it now but perhaps when you move indoors? And I feel like your coworkers...you are living the life of dreams...many people would love to do what you are now, including me!!!! Though I do my best here with what I can too......

Regardless, you are in my thoughts a lot and each of your pics and posts are so so inspiriting....and inspiring....so I am sending you more love and gratitude from afar.....the world is your oyster now!

### Inger — 2013-09-23T22:54:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-95840>

Hope,thank you for the love . I am sending you much love too. I have not been as clean with my diet as I could wish. Just too complicated here. Too much HWC and nuts. But the MHS and oysters balance it out a bit. I am missing my home so much, even if I love this tent. But the family I live with are so different. Weather was so nice, maybe 14 degree C, sunny. I had a tiny white summer dress on, bare feet and arms. I enjoyed the sun and wind on my skin so much. I met a few people at the beach as I walked in the water. They smiled at me, and one said, you look like summer! I told her, yeah, because it is summer  She then looked so very happy and smiled at me and said, I have the right mindset.  So many smiles I got again. They always makes me feel so loved! I think people are amazing here.

I CTed with Optimalbound at his cottage too. 30 minutes in 14 degree C. I cheated and took a warm shower after to warm up quicker..lol But it was nice. I did CT first time in my sisters bathtub too, I got the water only to 15 degree C with ice. But I could stand it only 25 minutes and my jaws started shivering so bad! I am such a loser when it comes to be long times in cool water. Especially now after the long summer without any cold really. I need to do it more. Thats it.

I alwasy get this magic feeling when I walk at the beach in the water and the waves... the foam and the power they roll around my legs with amazes me, it is like breathing, a beautiful powerful breath, a soft rythm. I just get sucked up into it! Just wow.

### caroline — 2013-09-24T03:26:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-95883>

Hi Inger ......that is what I think too.....the beach is magic and especially the rocks - I can always feel so much power when I walk on the rocks and the sun on my skin - it takes my breathe away. Then there is all the surfers - it always seems like poetry to me They are so tuned in.....and I have to mention how great they look

Actually - surfers are so lean and strong and focused ....you never see a fat guy surfing........

I wound up in a conversation with a lady in a department store yesterday - she looked great.
It turns out we are the same age. She has swum everyday for the last 30 years at Bondi Beach...out in the open ocean. I asked if she wasn't worried about sharks and she said no ...she has only encountered 4 in that time. Last week she swam over the top of one - but he was busy looking for salmon and didn't pay any attention to her. I wondered if the shark had a shopping list and was only looking for salmon

We then found a piece of wall - next to the Tommy Hillfiger stuff - and she was showing me how to do toning exercises for my upper arms!
She said it was ok to be doing exercises in the store - no one knew us .....just then one of the staff walked by and said "Hi Audrey" you guys look like you are having fun

### prAna303 — 2013-09-24T10:03:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-95927>

> Actually - surfers are so lean and strong and focused ....you never see a fat guy surfing........

Elements and fields... Another clue that food is just the tip of the iceberg, they often eat crap.

### Inger — 2013-09-25T22:17:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-96108>

Yes Audrey, that was funny  nice to see Vickie around too

I see plenty of surfers here too... you are so right. they look amazing! I often stay at the waters edge with bare feet and just look at them exersicing. wow.

I was with my sisters 3 yo son on the oyster beach the other day. It was sunny and +14 degree C. Beautiful weather. We biked all the way there, he and me. He was so sweet. All he wanted to do by the beach was laying on my frontside and warm on my hot skin! I had only my bikini bottom on to get some sun on my body, and he said he wanted to lay on the top of me all the time because I am so hot! lol My skin is very warm for sure. My hands and feet can get a bit cool but the skin on my body is always very warm. He seemed to love the heating effect. I got so much love there in the sun, it was pure magic. After a while we climbed the hill and found lots of wild berries. So yummy. I was angry I had to leave for work, I would have loved to stay there the whole day with him. he do not wanted to leave either. I am amazed when I see how much children loves the nature. They never get bored there. he did not got bored laying on my abdomen either. he just cuddled and cuddled..
He wanted to share his food with me too, carrots with tahini dip and nuts. I ate it.. I have not had a too clean diet now anyways. Holy moly. But I thought all that love and earthing in the sun could make up for the damage..

### Inger — 2013-10-02T08:06:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-96682>

You are welcome to hijack my journal anytime..lol

I am just so glad to be home.

I arrived yesterday afternoon (after filling up on 4 raw mackerels and a MHS before the flight - during the flight I had just lots of Pellegrino and a bit black coffee. I had zero issues with flying, no tiredness or anything.. I felt just awesome ), and I went straight to kissing my Emme girl when I stepped out of the car. And the other mama sheep too of course, that my parents saved. After that I had a delicious meal consisted of lots of raw lambs liver only (own fresh killed lamb) with wild lingonberries for dessert.
Then we just talked with my parents and brothers and it feels so good to be home. I could not sleep in the night though.. but I bet it was just because I felt so overwhelmed. I am not feeling any tired now either! Weird.  I had a raw lambs heart and a handful of raw lambs liver for breakfast, and a few spoonful of wild Siberian ceder nuts. Yum. I think it is the season for feeding on raw lambs heart now.
The sad thing is... I did not got any lambs brain. No one wanted to save them for me.. just sad. 5 brains wasted, just buried in the ground. I came just a little too late. But maybe some fish head smoothies will have the same effect, I hope so!

Going to make a party for family tonight, I think lamb will be on the menu. And then I am going to make some awesome "sweets" I learned about at my sisters house. She has the cookbook from Mark Sisson, and there are those macadamia-blueberry yummies, they are just super delicious! Made of just 4 dates for sweetener, then macadamianuts, walnuts (I have used almonds and pecan nuts too), coconut oil, coconut flakes, wild frozen or fresh blueberries. I added a little seasalt too for flavor. Holy moly they are crazy good. Like a blueberry pie! I bet my family will love them. At least my sister and her family did. And me too. Okay, this is a little bit like cheating but not too bad.

So nice to see my cat again. She is so healthy and has such a thick shiny fur! Wow! She was so happy to see me too. She is a awesome cat for sure, very special. She eats mostly shrimps and raw organic beef mince... some raw salmon and tuna. She is the cleverest cat I have ever seen for sure.

I am going to the shop soon. It is going to be nice to see the staff in the shop I use to buy my food. They are all so lovely there.

My experience in Norway was very enrichening. Hard at times? Oh yes. But I learned a ton. And could have done many things better. I still am so happy I went! Norway is a beautiful country. I do think they have a stronger magnetic field there than we have in Finland. I so would love to have a magnetometer! But they are very expensive.. I think you need to pay around 6000 dollar for the cheapest ones or so. But that would be so much fun to measure different locations.
I am in love with my sisters children too.. they really are special.  Hope to visit them again one day.

Now I am missing my magnetico mattress already! I will get it in 3 weeks though. I am dreaming of getting my parents a 20 gauss mattress. I need to make this dream true. After all, it is amazing to see the own parents thrive and be healthy and strong until the end. They are the ones that made me, after all! And I am forever thankful for being alive and able to explore this beautiful magic life

### caroline — 2013-10-02T08:59:40+0300

I can feel your glow and joy across the miles Inger ........Those treats sound yummy.......

Every experience is so enriching in so many ways regardless of the ups and downs and twists and turns our life takes......it is all in how we deal..... attitude, generosity of spirit, and integrity are everything .......glad you are home xo

### Inger — 2013-10-02T13:28:31+0300

Audrey... I am glowing now..  I went for a swim in the river, + 5 degree C. WOW. Then I made me a smoothie from stinging nettles and mint from the garden.... ate some berries on my way from the bush... and cuddled a little more with Emme.

I feel so good I am flying  I am going to go out and clean the boat by the river now, it is half full with water and leaves from the trees above it. And I am going to take Emme and Mimosa with me and let them eat the rests of our "garden". I love to have their company. If I get too warm I just jump in the river to cool of yay!

### caroline — 2013-10-02T22:21:58+0300

### Inger — 2013-10-03T07:32:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-96766>

Yes... Emme remembers me  She cuddles with me and loves me as much as ever

My schizophrenic brother is getting better according to my mom!  I have not seen him yet but he has been on an all raw diet since I left + 1 week = almost 2 months. He has these vegan tendencies, because he loves animals so much, but I got him to promise me to eat raw organic eggs and raw cheese and if he manages to, fish too, raw. He agreed. I gave him one package of very strong niacin too. It was not expensive at all. I wanted to buy him other stuff too but I just had not money for it and I thought maybe niacin is a good start. So he has been eating those too. He eats veggies and fruit and nuts too. I do said ketosis would be the best thing to do but he just is not ready for that. But now I am so very happy he is getting better!!!! I just KNEW all raw with some animal products will help him huge. Because that way he will eat zero grains and sugar and vegetable oils.. except of olive oil maybe. And he will get a lot of great bacteria from dirty carrots and stuff. My mom said he looks way better and his behavior is so lovely too! I will see him in a week as he will come and stay here over his autumn holiday. I cannot wait.

He is good in being outside too, loves to pick berries and walk barefoot (ok maybe not anymore as it gets cold here). He has had this urge for many years to lay on the ground outside.. I wonder if he instinctively knew it does him good? That he needed that magnetism and earthing? He even lived outside in the woods for long! But his food was terrible by then. Now I am so proud of him.

So that is what have happened when I was away and I just removed the water and cleaned it.  I am not going for fishing right now, maybe one day! I do love fishing.

Oh my, the 5 degree C is so cold! I really need to get used to it, I can feel I have only got used to 13 degree C water.  I cannot really stay in for more than a minute or so for now. But I will increase it slowly. Anyways it feels super refreshing! Uh, I got to run downstairs and make some lamb with cabbage for my family, my other bro will come for lunch... and we will have own lamb on the menu

### Inger — 2013-10-07T14:39:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-97170>

Had reindeer, raw with marrow, for BAB.. and for lunch raw organic salmon with lemon juice and sea salt + 3 raw organic egg yolks made into a nice foam with 1/3 ts wild raw honey. I added wild fresh local lingonberries too. I dipped twice in the river... I got so hot after biking to the shop! I will get mackerel with heads this Thursday and oysters too! Now this is paradise .

I do feel the climate is healthier in Norway close to the ocean where I was. Here I get way thirstier! Weird... I need to drink all the time.. and especially water with some salt in it. I cannot smell the ocean. I miss that. I also really miss my magnetico! I slept so great on it. Norway still have no smart meters like here. And people there seemed healthier and not as overweight as here. I really can tell a difference.

I wish Peter lived close to me. I need to visit him one day.. even if I need to seek through all the woods of Sweden, holy moly! I adore his way of thinking. He understands the nature.. because he lives it. I do know a few people like that most of them online. People that are not scared one bit what other thinks about them when it comes to the truth.

Peter gave me a great idea, to cut down on internet time even more. I plan to do days in between with zero use. I really feel the difference. Maybe when I get my magnetico I can do it more but right now I feel I need to cut. Maybe to use technology only every other day or so. And I am not a heavy user anyways, but I feel the difference in being outside instead so clearly.

I got some nice earthing in yesterday cutting the lambs barefoot outside in the grass. Now they look so pretty! I need to take a picture... I am so proud of Emme, she was super easy to cut, I did not even need to tie her! She seemed to love the whole procedure. I use only scissors. So no EMF either.

When I left here it was still summer, and now it is fall. Pretty weird how fast it goes! But I do love fall, the crispy fresh air... and how it smells

### Inger — 2013-10-09T08:46:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-97325>

I often read Jacks facebook site, thankfully it is open to the ones that have no facebook too. Lots of encouraging stuff on his wall. I just had to copy it into here

> Don't go viral, just set hearts on fire in life. In the depth of 'your' winter, just smile within and slow burn..........

> Are you building? A Caterpillar is a butterfly under construction. People may have looked down on that poor little crawling worm. People may have written you off as a worthless, useless worm that won't amount to much in life. Little do people know that the greatest transformation starts inside where no one can see. Transformation is change on the inside. Don't underestimate the importance of small changes in your life. Don't despise small victories in your life. One day all of the change inside will be manifested outside. Butterflies, Babies, Diamonds, Gold and Pearls have one thing in common- they were all formed and shaped in secret, away from the human eyes. So focus on the change inside and wait for the completed work of transformation inside. The most important part of any building is its foundation that's under ground. If a foundation is cracked the building in condemned. The most important part of a person is the character inside not the exterior. If the character is flawed all the decorations outside is meaningless.

### Inger — 2013-10-16T09:19:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-97974>

I just got amazed again how regenerating sleep can be. Have been working last days in the city, oh man it felt pretty stressing, like worse than a few months ago? Maybe just being away from it made me feel it stronger. It shocks me to see how my coworkers health get worse...  There is something happening, it must be the EMF that gets stronger and stronger. So many complain about sleeping issues, they cannot sleep!!! Some even have started to take medications to get some sleep at all. This seems to be the common issue.. after the sleep webinar, I do not wonder at all. When I finally biked on my way home from the train I felt sooo happy to be back out here where are more trees than houses..lol Yesterday I went to bed at 8 PM and slept until 7 AM.. wow it felt good! Like I really needed it after the EMF bath I had to be in all day long. I am in love with my sleep! Today I feel like brand new  I was in the river after my breakfast (raw reindeer with marrow, dried raw wild mushrooms and wild berries + some seaweed) and I dived 3 times in the 5 degree C water. And took a very short swim. And I had a few glasses of ice cold well water before too. Unbelievable how great I felt after! I just am so thankful to feel better and better the older I get. Magic, huh! I honestly feel as good as when I was a child

Hope everyone has an amazing day!

### caroline — 2013-10-16T09:27:21+0300

### Inger — 2013-10-18T11:24:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-98254>

I was diving in the river and the river was huge... it has rained so much and now it is all like a light brown creamy coffee, just wow. Temp. still maybe 5 degree C. I Love this time of the year before the ice covers it, because it is so nice temps and I need to not dig a hole every day before jumping in!

I wonder if the 2 weeks on the magnetico has made my eyelashes even longer. I really think there is a difference - It stuck me when I put my mascara on the other day. Maybe my hair starts growing really fast too! I wish so, I want really long hair again.
Just 4 more days and I will have my magnetico again! I have been cleaning some houses as my parents are away from their business, and I have to say I do not like that job! To vacuum and clean in overheated houses... oh my I got so hot and thirsty too. I really never liked vacuuming... pretty unhealthy thing to do, maybe that is why. Poor dad. He is the one vacuuming all day long. No wonder his health suffers. He needs a magnetico ASAP! Trying to not stress over it though, we all make our own choises for sure.. the people that lived in the houses were all sick... with cancer and other things.
I miss my sisters kids. They are such a blessing

### Inger — 2013-10-23T07:53:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-98705>

Nicole, our sheep and lambs are so very nice and friendly  they just want to kiss me all the time...! Maybe goats are different? Or maybe our lambs are so nice because they was bottle fed (raw goats milk..lol) and much human contact? Now their new boyfriend Kingi is so kind too, he has such a soft and sweet voice, and just looks at me with his big eyes and comes a bit closer to touch my hand. Very sweet. I took a picture yesterday morning, I looked out from my window and they were munching on the still frozen grass, here are Mimosa and Kingi close.. and Emme is adventuring on her own..lol

... just a minute later Kingi moved to Emme's side and they munched on the grass together

Kingi enjoys his new life so much! He moved from living inside with just a small outside space without any grass (just hay) and women.. to a paradise with lots of outside space, no artificial lights at all and two beautiful women. He is about 1 month younger than Emme but as big as her. His wool has not been cut off yet and I might not do it anymore as it starts to get cold here... IDK. I am bit worried Mimosa is pregnant she has quite a huge belly! Sometimes sheep get pregnant twice a year.... but I think she has just a great appetite. She always had.

First night on my magnetico, connected to the river with a copper wire. I thought I was in heaven!!! Man I had missed it, and weird thing is, before I got the magnetico I slept very well here. But after I had it for 2 weeks.. and returning back here, sleep was not really as good anymore without it. Maybe when we have experienced something better, we cannot return to the old ways, because it feels really bad...? Sleeping on the mattress grounded was amazing... I felt like a baby waking up, and my body feelt so heavy and like filled with silent, sweet music! IDK how to explain it, really.

### Inger — 2013-10-24T10:57:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-98824>

Second night on the magnetico, grounded to the river.. same thing happened. I wanted to finish Marino's book so I read it by candle light in bed until 9:45 PM.. even if I was tired long before that. I just had to finish it. So after that I fell into sleep pretty fast and waked up once at 4 AM I was too warm.. a very warm night, maybe 10 degree C. I changed my blanket to the very thin duvet - I always have two kind of duvets in my bed one thin one thick. I thought.. wow I feel so amazing, I just want to be in bed a little longer. And then I fell into sleep pretty fast again and waked up at 8:30 AM. Felt like a baby

I never want to be without my magnetico again. It just gives me the best sleep ever! And I though I had a good sleep? lol it can always improve!

Maybe you better stay away from your dentist...lol. Since I eat Epi Paleo and ditched almost all carbs I do not go to the dentist anymore. My teeth are just doing so well! Zero issues anymore. It is not that I am afraid of them, I actually love when they work in my mouth.. feels so relaxing and fun to me! But I slowly realized they only made things worse in my mouth... maybe the dentists are so bad here..?

I feasted on this today... a bowl of raw lambs hearts (they are finally available now. I got one lambs kidney from my bro for free too lol) and French oysters.... (sorry the pic is so dark because here it gets dark early and I use just candles)

Me and my bro where food hunting today. We got beef heart and beef fat too, very cheap! I ate some of the fat raw... right there as I opened the bag. I crave it so badly! it is so yummy. Finally real fat. I have used coconut oil, EVOO and butter for my added fats but I rather have the raw animal fat. It is so yummy, and makes me feel so great! I just munch on it plain.

My bro is getting the groove.. HA. He drank raw fish smoothie from whole small herring and swallowed it all down without even holding his nose.. I could not do that!

Read at Jacks facebooksite today

> for most of us it is autumn... and people are getting ready for the winter. Me, I am getting ready to bloom. Winter is when I renew and bloom. The human spirit is a miracle once it accepts new idea or learns a new truth, it is forever changed. Once stretched, it takes on a new shape an never goes back to its original form. When we discover growth on the inside, we experience gains on the outside. Blooming is not a facade. It's a simple change of viewpoint sufficient to convert a tiresome duty into an interesting opportunity. It begins as a focus more on interior alterations, that captures the cold wind that continuously allows you to learn, grow, and create chances for yourself you never saw. Eventually, those targets will resonate on the outside and create the new targets you never saw. Today, begin to return to yourself, to who you are, full force.

What an inspiration

Love is around

He is about 1 month younger than Emme but as big as her. His wool has not been cut off yet and I might not do it anymore as it starts to get cold here... IDK. I am bit worried Mimosa is pregnant she has quite a huge belly! Sometimes sheep get pregnant twice a year.... but I think she has just a great appetite. She always had.
>
> First night on my magnetico, connected to the river with a copper wire. I thought I was in heaven!!! Man I had missed it, and weird thing is, before I got the magnetico I slept very well here. Maybe when we have experienced something better, we cannot return to the old ways, because it feels really bad...? Sleeping on the mattress grounded was amazing... I felt like a baby waking up, and my body feelt so heavy and like filled with silent, sweet music! IDK how to explain it, really.

Oh they are so cute. Do you raise them for wool or for food too? Our next place will be more suitable for raising animals. They will never go on the road, they won't leave the horses.

### Inger — 2013-11-05T19:43:10+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-99957>

My bro is way more rockstarish... he just chewed down a whole Baltic herring raw, with head and intestines and all. Just like that. Not holding his nose or anything... I could not do that! At least until now I just make my fish head smoothies and drink them holding my breath. I have them many times / week. I think they are my superfood

I just learned how to make canned herrings myself, with head, skin and bones included - in glass jars in the oven! I make them for my family as I prefer it raw. But I tasted some and it was delicious! My family loved it too!

That is how I did;

Use whole fish, just remove stomach content and if the fish has shells, remove them too from the skin. Then rinse with water and put salt on the fish, mix it a bit in a bowl, the fish and the salt. Then I added organic ketchup and EVOO too and mixed it well and put the fishes in a glass jar. Close the jar well and put it in a cold oven, turn it on 150 degree C, let it bake for a hour, then turn the heat to 100 degree C and let it bake for 3 more hours. Take out and let cool.
You can use any spices you want and I am right now having one more batch in the oven with curry and garlic... lets see how it turns out!

I am so happy to have learned this recipe! Now my dad can eat this instead of the canned fish in metal jars he loves to eat. My "canned" fish is wildcaught, with head and bones - made with organic ketchup and the very best EVOO, no metals, just a glass jar. And fresh

And I finally have some high meat maturing in my fridge! Beef heart. I cannot wait.... so long since I had any.

### sooperb — 2013-11-06T16:08:30+0200

Wow, just wow. I have finally read right from the beginning and today finished your journal Inger. I hadn't realised you were in Finland until you moved to Norway lol. I am curious as to why you moved back, I thought you were on the road toward moving into your brother's idyll? ### Inger — 2013-11-07T19:15:57+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-100100>

haha.. sooperb my diet is weird, I admit. But gives great well being as bonus  That is why I do not envy people eating "foods that please the palate more". I actually find my foods very delicious most of the time to be honest!

I have a water factory at home now! I take cold tap water (we have an own 30 meter deep well) and fill wide glass jugs and put out on my balcony, in sun and rain. After a day or so I fill the water in glass bottles and put on the magnetico mattress. After a day or so on it I drink it, some plain, some mixed with silica and some with salt. I love it! I drink direct from the balcony too. It rains a lot now so the water tastes like rain too... sweet

I must have gotten some weird bugs.. I had some pain in my stomach yesterday, I ate some fresh papaya with seed and peel and after that had some wormwood tea. It was already better in the evening, today I have felt just a tiny bit off and a little less appetite but I have had quite a bit of food anyways. IDK what it could have been but maybe some detox or just a few sweet parasites maybe. The healing is not linear

### Inger — 2013-11-19T14:21:35+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-101014>

Sooperb you need to come to Finland in Summer time. It is a paradise! In Joensuu there are too many mosquito's though...lol You need to come down here at the coast. The coast of Finland is so very beautiful with all the rocks and islands.
You asked why I come back here... I did not have a place to stay in Norway. I could not stay by my sisters place any longer, I did not wanted to force me upon them, they had a not too big house and I wanted them to get more privacy too. To get a own place I would have had to save up some money and I just could not stay longer by their place. Otherwise my work was awesome, everything was in fact, and I do not regret my time there one second. I learned so much. One day I can go and stay by my brothers cottage if I want to, I am always welcome there. I just need a own car as it is far away from any city. Everything is possible

So I did some bad mistakes, I think.
In addition to having some mental stress going on... I painted the hall here upstairs.. I wanted to make it pretty. It has no windows, and it has an electrical cabinet on the wall, pretty strong radiation when I measured it with my meter. I knew painting the hall in that radiation without being able to air was not a very healthy thing to do but I though, oh well it is not a big hall and it will take me a couple of hours and that is. It will be ok. I guess I do got some kind of a poisoning! Pretty fast I got some pimples and herpes and little itchy skin. Then days later I got a weird stomach and so weird sweating pattern, intermittent fatigue etc. Like I was sick. SO weird! Took a couple of days to realize it must have been the paint and my BBB not working properly because of the electric cabinet, letting poisons into my body.
I almost got scared, WTH is going on?!
I kind of got a strong reminder what poisons can do to you in a high EMF environment... SCARY. I remembered Ivan Drago... and what he experienced too.
I feel slowly better. Have had soo weird food cravings, the only thing I wanted was Brazil nuts with red pepper? lol I still had weird hotness in the night... but I really feel better now.

I had raw beef heart carpaccio for breakfast, with raw beef fat and raw onions and balsamic vinegar... yum. A big glass of Seaweed water. For dinner I had high heart, that is turning so crazy yummy!!! Like Roquefort, seriously. I want to eat it all! But I need to let it ripen even more to get even stronger health effects, so I allow myself to eat only a few spoonful of it. Then some lambs liver raw, some more raw beef fat, and Nori water that is totally Violet colored. Very pretty.

Thursday I was drawing some blood, tests my doc ordered so long ago but I forgot to get it done! Now I got the results yesterday and my doctor called me to tell my cholesterol is way too high.. but he is a old doc I had as a child already..lol so he said; Because your HDL is so high it might forgive your high LDL... I am not going to force any medication on you

HDL was 119 mg/dl
LDL was 193,3 mg/dl
Triglycerides 43,4 mg/dl

Everything else was very good/normal he said. I do not think my blood glucose it too great tho  it was 108 mg/dl. I do not get this at all. My doc was not too concerned tho. But I feel I need to get it lower. Maybe I need to go strict zero carb. 100% And I quit coffee immediately. today, NO COFFEE FOR THIS LADY ANYMORE. It was not even hard. I know it is not good for me, but I needed this push. I know my body is happier without right now. So bye bye coffee

Oh, I also think my Kreatine was pretty low... 49 when the range is 50-90. And I eat so much protein? Unfortunately I have no BUN so I cannot see my ratio if I am dehydrated. But maybe I am. One more great reason for saying my beloved coffee bye bye.. haha.

Maybe I need to up CT too. Of course I need, I know the answer...lol I have too much antifreeze in my body right now.. HA

But anyways, I feel pretty awesome today.  even when it is gray and rainy

### Inger — 2013-11-19T16:43:12+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-101028>

My TSH was 1,29 mU/l, seems to be on the lower side but what I googled it is just fine.

I did another mistake too.

As I got my magnetico back from Norway, I put it on the top of my pretty thick mattresses and just a very thin (2-3 cm thick) mattress on the top of it. I though I wanted to be close to it to get the best effect... but oh how stupid that was. Made my body stimulated by both the positive and negative fields... and about this issue the magnetico site tells me;

> This stimulates both the brain and the body to fix the problem. People can get good results initially, but over time the body’s reserve of energy will get drained and the benefits will diminish. It is often recommended to take a two to four week \`break’ from these types of pads to restore the body’s energy levels because the person is fatigued and sick.

There is a reason why the mattress above should be pretty thick, 10 to 20 cm. That makes your body not touch the positive fields at all. I felt so good, like heavy and relaxed sleeping so close to the mattress, but I really get now it must have been a bad idea long term. How good I did some research because of something else on the magnetico site, and all of a sudden realized I was about doing something stupid! I immediately removed the thin mattress, and put the magnetico under the 17 cm thick mattresses instead.

Now I do not feel as strong an effect as when I did it wrong, but a milder, softer one, still great relaxing sleep.
Lesson learned... not a good thing to be greedy
