### Hope — 2014-05-11T16:21:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-126295>

Hi Inger,

I have finally caught up a little on your journal. I too just love your pics and the videos, wow...just watching that was so relaxing!! Now I have to make sure to go outside today rather than continuing to work on cleaning our belongings

You sound amazing.....and wow the cucumbers look amazing. It's wonderful that you can create a good life for yourself at your parents' house. And how neat about both the new job as well as the guy in the wine shop. You never know...eh?

I'm so sorry about your nieces and nephews too and I agree with you and the others who have said, they let themselves go on food bc they have so many other strict legalistic rules. Rules I don't ever think God intended to be used in this way. It's like the strict Muslims and Jews too, so sad.....from what I've seen in some movies. I think it's all about human control, nothing else. And this explanation of - their only outlet - is one that makes a lot of sense. It sure is heartbreaking.........when you think they would believe God created nature and its beauty for their enjoyment. It's somehow similar to me, when I think of what Tiger Woods did here....I mean he had to work so hard to be this great golfer from a very young age...and having all these women was his outlet. It's what he picked to deal with all the pressure....also quite unhealthy.

I too am glad about you being with those kids. I know they will never forget it. I never was able to meet any of my grandmothers, they both died so young in WW II, but my parents had dear friends that were like grandmothers to me. And even after all these years now I still cherish the memories with them and the love and lessons they had for me.

I just found this recipe for cukes.....not sure if it's any good:

[http://www.simplebites.net/make-old-fashioned-brine-fermented-pickles-like-your-great-grandmother/](http://www.simplebites.net/make-old-fashioned-brine-fermented-pickles-like-your-great-grandmother/)

### sooperb — 2014-05-11T16:52:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-126297>

That's very perceptive of you Hope, I guess we all focus on things that are unhealthy when we are striving to relieve our stress, putting the bad habits back in the box can be tricky if there is nothing to replace them. When someone is in a position of being restrained by rules and/or other people then they seek comfort in whatever they have ready to hand that isn't likely to cause them further problems, food plays a very big part in those circumstances. For others drink and drugs can be a prop but if they're forbidden too, then food plays a bigger role as no one generally looks on it as a sin. There's always the danger too that if you manage to escape one restrictive practice, you can often find yourself another if you've lived long enough in chains, there's a kind of safety in the known, abusive relationships can be like that.

We share the same struggles Dawn. My ex husband too is an alcoholic. But he only drinks in periods but then it is serious.
Now he eats Antabus so he cannot taste any alcohol at all, he said to me the other day he loves them, they makes his life good

The ram stepped on my little toe yesterday, and I did not realize it was hurt until I went to bed and 10 PM. The nail was partly off... and man it started to hurt so bad! I could not sleep... how can one tiny little toes nail hurt so crazy???
I could not bear the pain anymore so I went to the freezer to get a cold pack. I put it in my bed under a towel and my toe on it. And it helped so much! It hurt a bit still, but it was totally tolerable, not bad at all, the crazy pain was gone! I fell to sleep and slept until 9;30 AM
I cannot remember when I last slept so long... great   And my toe isn't hurting at all anymore, just a little sensitive if I touch it.

Emme is not so well today.. she is so silent.. and do not eat much. Poor girl. She will get well. I might give her some seaweed. It is so hard because I never know what people walking by gives them.....  Maybe she just have the flu
I ate so many dandelion flowers yesterday, they are so yummy! Little Alex loves them too

The river was warm today, + 9 degree C... was so nice to take a short swim in the rain    like swimming in cappuccino - that is how the water looks when it is rainy

it is made of glass and has 500 watt. That is about what to look for I guess.

Good for you, hope they grow since they are delicious. They grow great on a something they can climb on. I think that they do like cooler weather since mine never get the hot afternoon sun. They grow in the same spot that I grow my cherry tomatoes. Have you tried grape tomatoes? They are way way way better then cherry.

If they get too hot they don't grow well, oh and natural fertilizer works great. I just add 1-2 year old horse manure to my beds in the spring and that's it. Cover the exposed soil with newspaper and grass clipping and forget it (besides watering and trimming).

### Inger — 2014-05-13T21:45:45+0300

guess what Sue, Emme is perfectly fine again  her "illness" lasted just half a day, maybe she was just depressed

So glad the sheep and the lambs are all doing so great! I have been out for hours every day on the neighbors pasture watching them eat. There is no fence, so I have to watch them all the time.
It has been rainy, and around 10 degree C, i have been barefoot all the time in the wet grass. I can feel it does me so good!
Man, I am sure gray weather is only bad if you sit inside
because i feel so AWESOME now, and it has been gray for many days! But I love when it rains.. I love water in any form I recognize.
I do not like too hot and dry and sunny summers... nothings grows, everything is dusty and dry.

Wow. It is pretty magic to just be out on the wet grass for hours every day - just being there... hearing nothing but the birds... munching on dandelion flowers filled with raindrops... surrounded by green and the heaven - and cutie lambs that come and kisses you once in a while with their wet soft nose
it makes me think so clear. I have been thinking about my issues - and I have big ones! I need to trust more... I need to be more here and now... I need to heal so badly! It is not funny.
But I am running away from myself?
I have been thinking so much last days... and I have gotten some answers I think.
Thank you pasture.

Jaaa... Audrey - I surely do much wrong all the time! But I suffer from it, and hopefully learn.
I have just learned, I need to RELAX. I have been looking for jobs.. and I usually get them, but then I realize it is not what is good for me at all! Like the golf club cleaning. Big mistake. I quit it. I also did it to help my parents I felt sorry for my mom she works so much. But I have decided her problems are hers to resolve, she could do it different! and I need to concentrate on MY healing now! The waking up so early... stressy cleaning schedule.. and add to it cleaning was never my favorite thing, I love to waitress! I love to interact with people... not cleaning alone somewhere. And I do not need the money, now. My ex helps me with all I need without me asking for it, he is so kind, he pays me very good for just a little work in his company, that I can do from home. So why was I stressing and running after another job? I have no clue! And that is my issue. I need to learn to trust, relax and go DEEP. I have such great chances to heal here! If I just do not mess it up!
Gosh I have so many things that needs to get fixed that I can assure you

So happy to wake up today in my bedroom filled with sunshine - from one awesome dream again... so sensual and full of oxy...... wow

### Inger — 2014-05-16T08:45:06+0300

Instead I had 2 raw duck eggs, and a small handful of dried raw papayas, and a handful of raw hazelnuts and a half cucumber.
No coffee, just green tea.
Right after eating I started to feel some weird anxiety in my abdominal area  I do not have anxiety??? this is not so fun  is my body trying to tell me papaya belongs not in my world now? Because this is not the tropics

I felt great after the fish head + seaweed smoothie yesterday so I thought I will not give up so fast. But now it is pretty clear to me wild lingonberries is as far as I go for this time in my life

I will give my papayas (I have a big fresh excellent tree ripened organic Red Lady one too I got me for this experiment....) to my ex and his girlfriend, they will love it. I will do dandelion flowers and wild greens instead.

Ok, heads up me!!! I save money! And the wild flowers are for free, and taste sweet too    and man, they makes me feel good too

maybe.... maybe carbs are no good for me at all living in an EMF filled environment - even if I do my best to limit it, there are still a lot!

### Jack Kruse — 2014-05-16T16:03:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-127223>

its not the mold.
It is not about the offending agent or the organ affect: The loss of electrons cause a loss of organization in those cells. That is why they dont work. So lets consider mold. Is it the mold? no. Mold is ubiquitous. Is it the poor functioning of cell mediated immunity? Yes. If you read the last few blogs you will see the reason an organ system ( immune system) goes south is because there is not enough electrons present within the cell membranes or the mitochondria of these cells or where T cells and B cells mature. That is the thymus and bone marrow. The goal is not to avoid things but to fix the structure of the organ systems involved in cell mediated immunity to get properly functioning cells to deal with the mold as they are designed by replacing the electrons lost. The loss of electrons is what causes these cell not to perform.

Mold is ubiquitous. Is it the poor functioning of cell mediated immunity? Yes. If you read the last few blogs you will see the reason an organ system ( immune system) goes south is because there is not enough electrons present within the cell membranes or the mitochondria of these cells or where T cells and B cells mature. That is the thymus and bone marrow. The goal is not to avoid things but to fix the structure of the organ systems involved in cell mediated immunity to get properly functioning cells to deal with the mold as they are designed by replacing the electrons lost. The loss of electrons is what causes these cell not to perform.

So its not the mold. The mold gets in the body, maybe the immune system reacts maybe it doesnt. The mold gets processed by the liver? The liver is low in electrons and delegates toxin to fat cell? (in people like myself ) As we add electrons the body will choose where they need to be for our survival so we have to push and push until we are so flooded every organ in every system is functioning well and properly; rendering biotoxins powerless. Does being in the presence of such toxins deplete electrons in any way? If in a state of depletion isnt it necessary to avoid toxicity of any kind as not to further deplete oneself in battle against toxins? Or does it just not work like that and I need to get my head out of my old way of thinking's ass?

### Inger — 2014-05-16T17:59:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-127229>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=127197)
>
> Inger - you don't usually have an anxious feeling? I am giving up coffee again ..... I never learn .....crap coffee is not good for me. It has to be the mould. I am now getting some low pelvic pressure .....I have had this before ....... and multiple bathroom trips.

No, not really Audrey. Only f I am stressed and drink too much coffee and if something bad happens around me... If I had more elctrons that should not hurt me either but that is how imperfect I am.

Now... I do not believe it is the mold either. Because this house has mold too.. and I can deal with it collecting electrons like mad
i guess that is why I eat so much too? So much raw seafood and heart? Because I need all those extra electrons?
I still have too little for my liking... so I am working on collecting way more

and I have to deal with not letting my surroundings and what people think tear me down, and that takes electrons too, but I KNOW it is all in my head, and that is the hard part!!!!
i know have a very important lesson to learn! And I will!!!

I absolutely loved what Jack wrote today - this is what I need to burn into my mind

this is the solution for every issue in my life right now- i think I need to print it out in bold and put it on my wall

> People who soar are those who refuse to sit back, sigh and wish things would change. They wander in nature. They neither complain of their lot nor passively dream of some distant ship coming in. They just live the life they create. Rather, they visualize in their minds that they are not quitters; they will not allow life’s circumstances to push them down and hold them under.
> We are unaware that we live simultaneously in two worlds, with two realities: the inner city of our thoughts, emotions and attitudes, and the outer reality of people, places, things and events. Too many of us allow the outer world dominate our sense of what is real. This causes our inner reality to react and not live. In this way you never tap your full power as a person..............Begin by disconnecting from noise of the outer world and connect to the silence within you. When you do this you can make sense of the disturbance going on around you.
>
> Make your mental blue print off your inner world, and begin to create.........

### Inger — 2014-05-16T18:15:16+0300

you know... it gets to me, how my parents want to rule over me with clothes.. and partners etc. But I am stupid! I anyways am not ready for a new man in my life - i need to heal first and make a diamond out of a oyster shell  and I am so blessed, my ex does everything for me and we share a deep special love for each other, that will never end. so the boyfriend rule is not too bad.. i can go to dates and kiss as much as i want they do not need to get to know..hehe.. and the clothes rules... yeah they stress me. But I should not care so much! It would be way worse if they had rules what I can eat! But they have not..lol they even think I eat very healthy and do not say anything bad about it. So.. yeah. When someone push something on you you do not believe in it easily makes your gait suffer  at least for me. like my shoulders are not so straight anymore.
But I know i can easily brush it all off and do not take it that way! So this is my struggle. And I am going to win. I love challenges!? So I should take this too with a smile

anyways, what I wanted to say is, i know my issues are all in my head

I will Tanya

I just got a thought stuck in my head... weird.

I am responsible for me. I can blame no one else for my issues... no one.

I remember one man in our church as a kid... always when he spoke, I had to listen. Otherwise I mostly wanted to sleep... but him, I can never forget.
He was a tall, old man that had fought against the Russian army. And he never hurt a soul. He just shoot in the air... he could not kill. And he was saved, even if in many dangerous situations.. he used to tell us those stories. So, what he preached at those meetings have got stuck in my head.
He used to say all the time

"everything depends on you."

and he's wife's name was Rosa. He was Gunnar. They never got kids. And he used to call her "my rose"... all the time
They were such a sweet and loving couple..

### Andrea — 2014-05-17T07:49:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-127299>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=127231)
>
> But still i to times let it tear me down and I see i have gotten not such a nice gait since i stopped waitressing.  I need to start dancing! When someone push something on you you do not believe in it easily makes your gait suffer  at least for me. like my shoulders are not so straight anymore.

You are so right about that. At my previous job, I often felt "low" because of the workload and general not too inspiring atmosphere. My chiropractor, whom I visited regularly tried to teach me to walk with my back straight and head up, holding my nose upward as if I were a spoiled, proud princess. Walking that way helped my back, and it made me feel better about things.
It's funny how gait and mind interact.

Since more than a year back I have another job, which I really enjoy and appreciate. I walk just like my chiropractor wants, without even thinking about it (and I haven't had to visit him since I started to work here).

Maybe you could think about your lovely sheep and your journey so far, what you in fact have acchieved, when you walk?

### Inger — 2014-05-17T21:39:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-127389>

yes, there is always a way!

I had a great day today... everybody went away and I got some hours totally alone... just what I needed    I immediately went down in the garden right by the river and laid down in the grass nude with a cup of black cold cardamom coffee + bottles of magnetized water... and I just lied there and watched my surroundings. I was in paradise  for hours - it did me so good! When they came home from the event I went down in the garden and planted so much with my one brother that was visiting. The garden is in a place you cannot see form the house -> scantily clad.. he does not care. So I got so much sun all day long and was barefoot all day of course too... and the planting work is almost done, so amazing! I had about 1 kg raw seafood too.... inclusive oysters...

I am just happy and tired now
I made this day into a paradise day and I am one lucky chick
my oldest brothers 12 yo girl visited with him too later and we played with the lambs, she is such a sweet girl, very special, I love to be with her - what a funny kid

I know Jack is right. I feel so amazing when I have spent all day long outside connected to the earth..... this must be the best medicine ever! Of course! But it is too easy to believe?

### Inger — 2014-05-17T22:20:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-127398>

Quote from Jack;

> There is no fate, but what we create. Make sure you visualize what you really want, not what someone else wants for you. Night

I think I have anything that I really want... right now
Wow.. how am I so lucky, I am a shepherdess.... can lie down in the grass and feel the sun on my skin and the cutie lambs comes and kisses me so gently... their nose is so soft
the ram is so kind to me too, and treat me so well! Like he loves me!
the grass is soft too... and the sun is so energizing... the green colors of the spring around me is just magic, as is the blue sky I can watch for hours laying on the pasture "watching" the sheep. I just tie the ropes of the adult sheep (the babies will follow anyways) around my ankle and I can relax - I am one lazy shepherdess!
How comes I got so lucky...
Yeah, I just divorced, and it has been painful - but it opened my eyes (maybe it is always a bit painful when eyes get opened?) to what a great friend I have in my ex husband, and how everything was working out so perfect, for both of us!
One day, I will fall in love again...  and the special kind of love me and my ex share and always had will never fade...

Audrey... you are too sweet  sometimes we do have to make painful decisions...
I was laying on the grass under the tall birch by the river in the garden today.. and I figured I need to be like it. It has all its branches reaching to south... to the sun
and it has such deep and strong roots too, and it is to huge and beautiful!
Maybe it helps you too Audrey to think like that when it gets rough? (((hugs)))

I now have bought me so many cute longer summer dresses... too many!! my dad noticed today and said I was so beautiful... lol They are extra for him! When he is away I pull hem off and let the sun shine on my skin... he does not need to know

It has gotten tropically warm here... today was 23 degree C and so hot! I was swimming so much in the river, and then I drove to my favorite lake and swam and tanned nude for hours... that was true heaven

I was at the Baltic Sea yesterday too, and picked seaweeds for the sheep! I tanned on the warm rocks.... and collected electrons like mad.. Have had fish head smoothies, oysters, raw fish, seaweeds... I am really doing much seafood now. All I eat for meat is practically some raw grassfed beef heart and the duck eggs, that get fed raw fish from me..
I need to fix this brain! Uh oh.. i can tell the rx makes one feel awesome

I some mornings take my coffee with me to the pasture and drink there sitting/laying in the grass watching the sheep. I had to take some pictures, it is so much like in heaven!

Here is Alex, he is enjoying the surroundings as much as I...
and we are both loving the taste of the dandelion flowers

I did pedicure and manicure at the lake today, that is the perfect place for it. Sitting on the rocks using the lake as my foot bath
I stayed in the water for looong.. the water just up under my boobs (I wanted to tan them) and I could have stayed there forever, I never got cold because the sun was warming me up!

### Inger — 2014-05-23T11:47:48+0300

### Inger — 2014-05-27T18:39:24+0300

I rescued a chick today.. the poor thing was almost dead, its mom had left it alone and it is only +8 C here today - chicks get too cold quickly if not under their mom when born. So glad it looks like it will survive! I took it inside and warmed it in my hands. It is back under its mom now

It was so hot and now it is so cold... lol from yesterday 23 C and today 8 C... but I love it! I love when it is cooler    today I have just so much energy!

### Inger — 2014-05-28T07:34:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-128669>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=128632)
>
> Inger - fermented heart ....that is high meat? you do it the same?
>
> could I just put a piece on a board and let it sit for a week or so? I think that should be okay.
>
> what did you say you do with tongue?

Yes Audrey the fermented heart = high meat, needs to be moist (so needed to be kept in a glass jar, closed and aired every few days) or it will just be dry aged like the beef you have on a wooden plate in the fridge with no smell.
High meat/fermented meat it is a bit like those very smelly old cheeses! I always loved them, so that might be why I love my high meat too... taste is a bit like ammonia, you know?

The tongue I like to cook gently, so it is still rose inside, and eat cold sliced up thin. Very yummy! I put salt and some brown pepper etc. in the cooking water and let it cook gently preferably on the wooden stove for about a hour or so, depending on how big the tongue is.
I have eaten it raw too, works but this is about the only thing i prefer lightly cooked

The best part of the tongue is the hind part.. the fattiest, man is it good

I am doing a "safe" biohack lately and gorging on raw seafood as much as goes down... I even eat an second dinner some days if I feel like it = often 4 big raw seafood meals / day... and this is COOOL

IDK why I feel so euphoric, and no alcohol today either! And I am not even in love...? I just do arts... I LOVE that.. must be that + the seafood
I am feeling how I heal, and I can see how long way I still have to go but WOW if the road is this nice... here I come

### nonchalant — 2014-05-29T04:06:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-128772>

I've been ~eating~ swallowing a half dozen oysters every morning for a few weeks, often finishing breakfast with some fermented pork salami. I think tomorrow I'll up that to a dozen oysters. Stock up my DHA stores before I move out to the boonies. Feels like my skin is changing again. I already loved how soft seafood made my skin, but now it seems to be getting even better in the hip area. I suspect it will slowly spread over my entire body again. It's my second brain, soaking up sunshine and touch sensation and grounding.

I had to put this quote from Jack today in my journal so i can read it again

> You are learning now how incredibly important autophagy is for a reversal............but there is another change program that is even more critcal and it works mechanistically the exact same way.......autophagy lets small protein cardiolipin c bound to the cell memebrane begin the whole process of increasing cell mass and volume to lead to change. Consciousness is all tied to a small protein on the cell membrane that does the same. Consciousness is the change program for your Ferrari in your head. We are the only mammal that live outside its biology. There for we had to evolve consciousness to right our decisions to maximize autophagy at the mitochondrial level. This ties together the unconscious part of the brain to the neocortex. Your self awareness and attention are how the process works but without a constant flow of electrons you make bad intuitive decisions because you can not tap you power because dopamine levels are poor int he frontal and parietal lobes.

I waked up with this nice euphoria again... I have realized the magnetico does that to me. Not always tho, if I have eaten too late, I will not feel it as I wake up.

### Inger — 2014-05-29T17:25:45+0300

Sally I look at the sun / skin just like you too  I tan every second I can! When it is cloudy I run out and take off my clothes when the sun comes out just for a short while..lol

Lunch was about a pound home made gravlax made of organic salmon, some wild herbs from the garden

Dinner was a pound raw Baltic herring fillets in ACV and raw onions, 150 g canned Norwegian mackerel, 4 oysters and a handful raw organic hazelnuts + some high heart
i wanted to make a fish head smoothie too but it does not fit anymore in me!

uuu.. i feel so good

[http://www.daneurope.org/c/document\_library/get\_file?folderId=13501&name=DLFE-8.pdf](http://www.daneurope.org/c/document_library/get_file?folderId=13501&name=DLFE-8.pdf)

### Josh — 2014-06-04T22:46:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-129681>

Use 2lbs or so of lead weight on a belt and you become negatively buoyant almost immediately....You can hold a rock and let it go when you get down a way as well...you can breathe out as you descend....at some point you need to equalize the pressure in your ears so you will need to hold your nose and blow gently until you feel your ears equalize....

### Optimalbound — 2014-06-05T00:16:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-129685>

If you just swim downwards, you will notice that buoyancy is greatly reduced after only a couple of meters. However, for the untrained, it might be a challenge to equalize the ear pressure quickly enough.

Using weight, like Josh suggests, might be better to begin with. But you should probably start out somewhere no deeper than 3 meters or so, if you are not used to these things.

Thanks to prAna303 for the great video! I might try that one day..

### Inger — 2014-06-19T09:03:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-131386>

It has been cold and rainy here, some days only 12 degree C. I like it  I have been sleeping great in he colder temps! Just tonight i could not sleep. I am scared... about to lose my home. My 2 religious extremists brothers are going to move up here. So i will have to go. I was planning a move but not so fast. It has been so much drama here because of my youngest sister that visited because they do not accept her choice and can not tolerate that I and mom give her freedom to choose her life partner (and the guy is a great guy I have met him). So now we all (who are not "with them") get to "suffer" their punishment. Hurts for sure to leave this paradise but it might be good i get some fire under my ass lol or i would be living here forever! Ha. It might not be a punishment after all  if i just was not sore still from the divorce. Darn why do it takes so long to heal?

So, i am scared and exhausted right now but i know it is only my brain that is tired and stupid and me who is so resistant to change  so i am doing what is needed even if it is scary. It is going to be great, i just need to stop thinking about the sweet lambs and sheep I love so much and the chicken babies... the garden and what I have planted and that i will not be able to eat anything of it  what is even worse, the other here do not really care much  but I will get a new garden and a even more beautiful place! Stressy is I will have to move abroad. Norway or Germany, where i find the best place. I have not saved too much but thankfully enough to take the steps. Germany is way cheaper, you get a nice house in the countryside to rent for 500 €  At least i know what to look for  just hard when you cannot go and check it out in advance because I do not have enuf money for that. So it is kind of risky but i can always move again if there is something horrible....

I really need to practice now what Jack have teach us all along. With my thinking. I know this was not a mentally healthy place to live in anyways... for too long. Gosh.. it can be so scary to jump! I must be the biggest wuss ever  but i am still jumping - and i will learn. This is the lesson i need. I can see that. even if it hurts

### Inger — 2014-06-19T09:08:18+0300

You know that this needed to happen - you maybe were getting too comfortable? so the universe is pushing you to see all the endless possibilities. I think that is exactly what JK told you a year or more ago.

I think I have nailed it Hope!!!! 20 minutes by car from the west shore.. in the very north not far from Denmark.... a tiny town, and a "reetdachhaus" you know, with that natural thick roof made of I think... straw? 3 apartments, a lonely older woman and the owners, a old couple that are away most of the time... and super super lovely! No mold, no antennas or other high EMF sources close as far as she knows, I get a landline phone and internet... 2 room, 75 m2 apartment, ground floor, with a wooden stove in the living room, very beautiful kitchen and bathroom! Big garden, where I can tan as much as I desire! Not too far to nice markets (I think the closest is 8 km away) with all the fresh seafood I can dream of from the Atlantic! ### Inger — 2014-06-22T13:45:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-131747>

It is nailed now. No way back........  I even paid the first months rent, and will leave around the 10th July....

man I have so many feelings.... Good and bad. I really think this was a great step to take. But still, I wonder about so many things. What makes people to be fundamentalists? And in the end, I am pretty fundamental about avoiding EMF, fake light... crap food.. etc. too
where does it go wrong? When we force it upon others? Because sure, everyone usually thinks they do the right thing. Also the religious fundamentalists....
now my brothers and dad thinks they need to clean up in this house, throw out everything sinful. I wonder if it is, when brains are sick people cannot see and the decisions are screwed... because they sure are all fire about that they do the right thing. So it is kind of good people is on fire, but it is just a fire that destroys instead of building and creating. I think.
I really think it is all about how healthy the brain is, so it can judge what is important or not - and stuff. I am myself a bit exhausted now and feel my brain is not at its best these days, I have had to be way too much in front of the computer to find a new place - and it has been some work because I have to find a good one! I checked the antenna map too and not too many antennas there. Sure, a few, but the closest was maybe 2 km away. And there are very few in that area. When I looked at Hamburg... I got shocked. How good I did not decide to move there. I have lived there for so many years that would have been the easy solution for sure....

Now, it is just the packing and moving there. Much work but I feel the hardest part is done. Now I have a new home. I just have to travel there. My ex have a good friend that will bring me there and my stuff too. I know him he is a nice guy for sure. We will drive with his transporter and I will sit on the front seat holding my cat all the way down there. It is going to take close to 30 hours.

It is cold and rainy here all the time and will be so for many days so excellent packing weather

Must be Angels looking for me. I cannot believe I got the nice apartment without them even seeing me at all...... but the old German lady wrote me, he and her husband have a good feeling..... maybe because I asked so many questions about where I can find oysters and seafood, if there are antennas.... if there is peaceful and also forest close and lakes for swimming.... IDK. I am just so very very thankful it all worked out so well and so fast - the first one I really watched and asked about, it was it  quantum magic

### Andrea — 2014-06-24T05:24:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-131962>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=131762)
>
> Looks like I did a great job.... I just searched oysters in that area... and the coast is... FULL....... for free!!!!!!     max a half hour drive away
>
> I am going to be like Jack and eat 150 / day  and it will not cost me a cent

Inger, I don't want to be negative, but are you sure they are free to take? Here in Sweden, oyster fishing is regulated differently than any other fishing. Even though there may be lots of oysters here, and the _Crassostrea Gigas_ is considered an invasive species, it's not ok to just go pick them. One would need the permission of the land owner who has the fishing rights at the property where you want to pick them. Most people don't know this, but then again, most people don't care about oysters. My German is far from good enough to investigate how this works in Germany. Maybe you ought to have a look?

And one more thought: The native European oysters, _Ostrea Edulis,_ that are now basically only left in Sweden, reproduce from Midsummer through August. I suppose that the ones you are most likely to find in Germany, _Crassostrea Gigas,_ reproduce at about the same time - that is, when the ocean is warm. So if you don't want your local oysters to go extinct, you should take it easy during this period.

A sidenote about the different oyster species. Once, _Ostrea Edulis_ existed all around Europe, but in the middle of the 19th century they went extinct in continental Europe due to a parasite. Imagine: France, mid 19th century, no oysters. Panic! Some bright guy suggested that they import the extremely fast growing Pacific Oyster, _Crassostrea Gigas_, and farm them - and they did. This was successful, in a way anyway. The French got their oysters. And they grow extremely fast. But the oyster larvae didn't stay at the French coast and the critters spread all around Europe. And they are spreading like crazy. Here in Sweden, they fortunately reproduce only once every 3-4 years. I would suspect they reproduce more in warmer waters. From what I know the _Crassostrea Gigas_ are taking out our population of blue mussels (the water filters), and maybe some other species as well.

### Inger — 2014-06-25T08:22:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-132169>

lol......... ^^

So, I and my brother that is here for visit (he is not "converted into fundamentalism" .. i have so many brothers and only 2 are that lol) have checked out many things about radiation - and have found this area is bad!  We have every cellphone and internet provider (here are a few of them) coverage except of one, 4G. But that might come any second, you have coverage just a few 100 meters way from here, closest tower 800 m away, the next is about 1000 meter away and then there are more. Not good. Smart meters are in every home.

You would not have thought, because it is so silent and green here. Scary. The danger you cannot see, touch, hear or smell... and this is not even in the city - I cannot imagine how bad it must be there

I now understand better why I feel way better when it is cold here! People complain about a rainy and gray and cold summer (just 12-15 degrees C or even colder, in the nights there have been only 3 C...) but I feel pretty amazing! We had some very hot weeks in May, almost 30 degree C, and I had trouble sleeping.... and did not feel that great at all if I was not in water and by the lake

I now can see, much EMF + hot weather = very bad...............  seriously, the cold really, really helps!

My one sister have moved to a very remote place with her husband and children... they had some many problems, and I said please move to the countryside. They lived in the city.. and now they do not even have internet coverage, just 1 cellphone providers coverage, the very oldest one - all streets/roads are sand, no asphalt... and they are all feeling so much better already after just a week or two!!!! Yay!!!! I am SO happy for them!

I have not been taking any supplements at all, nothing, for many weeks now. And I am not planning to...

I eat wild greens and herbs instead. Amazing

### Inger — 2014-06-26T22:56:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-132359>

Yeah Hope, I and my 2 brothers drove there today - it is a pretty long drive, 2,5 hours one way. It was such an amazing peace there! _I could literally feel_ the non presence of non native EMF!!! Very every cool. We fished 3 quite big fishes in a tiny lake (my brothers got one each and my nephew did catch one too - he was so exited about it his legs trembled LOL) by the house and we ate them for dinner, super fresh
That was nice... very nice. My sister told me, as they lived in the city, she had bad diarrhea all the time, the doctors did not find anything wrong with her, she did so many tests! She lost so much weight and got skinnier and skinnier.... Now, from the FIRST DAY in the new home, no diarrhea..... not at all anymore. They have lived there for 2 weeks now. They just love it. It is very very remote!
And they eat the same, everything is the same, just the location changed.

It is just so AMAZING. I am so freaking happy for my sister!!!!! And her 3 kids...they are just too sweet, seriously.... I am going to miss them. I will visit more often for sure.
I am so happy so many of my siblings understand the crazy EMF situation and how bad it is.

I got real saturated fat cravings starting yesterday evening , so today I had lots of undercooked grassfed beef tongue, oh man i feel great now! If I have not had saturated fats for some times I really start to crave it like mad, it is pretty interesting!

### Inger — 2014-06-29T14:35:41+0300

Tread lightly. Mastering others is strength. Mastering yourself is true power. Power lacks a moral compass and principles. It only has interests. ### Inger — 2014-07-02T11:36:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-132980>

Little sad stuff - as I have to say goodbye to the people I love.... there are so many! Man, I just want to cry! They will all be in my heart for sure! My parents said it is not easy for them to have me leave... like a part is being cut out of them. I feel the same. We have gone along quite nicely despite of our differences.... My dad has become so interested in all of Jacks protocols lately too.... like he feels he is in hurry, soon he has no more Inger to push him lol
But they will come for a visit and oyster feast, my dad is very eager to lol as I told him what the oysters do...
I do feel deeply inside this is a thing that will be so good for many in the end. My dad hold a talk to me yesterday we had a small party and what he said was very beautiful indeed.
It is kind of hard to go when there are so many needs.... but yeah... i know it will be all good in the end, for everyone. I have my plans....
Not only the family is hard to leave.
The lady I buy my grassfed meat from, she and I talked so long the other day I was there for the last time - and i told her about my move and we hugged and shared deep details from our lives. She is getting divorced too after 20 years of marriage. We are in love.... I admire her and how she is and her personality - she has everything I have not! And the old man I buy the hay from, I was there too and loaded the car with hay and oats for the chickens so they have some after I leave. I love him too so dearly. We always talk so long when I am there, it is far out in the countryside. He is an amazing man too......
gosh... this is real painful!

### Inger — 2014-07-05T21:05:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-133256>

I am enjoying the beautiful summer days I have left here to 200%    (and try to pack in between..)

Have talked a lot with mum too last days. It is so weird to me how she find dads and brothers behavior uncorrect and she suffers from it, like they do not allow her to go to her daughters wedding etc, many rules. They demand obedience/submission from women. So, she sees this is not right and I tell her, mum, their brains does not work, believe me. You need to feed them fish! From morning to evening! And you too mom, so you can be strong and stay up for what you believe and not be scared. We need to always start with ourselves first! So yeah, they have way more often fish now than they had before I moved here. That is good. But I have told her how bread and sugar etc is bad too for a broken brain. And she goes on baking her bread and cakes to them. Like it is a good thing she does. Barbeque party today again here... and mom brings her cake and ice cream for dessert. I said, mom are you going to poison their brains even more? Don't you want the to be able to think well? She just do not get it lol she does not quite get, it is serious. To get serious changes we need **to do** serious changes too!
That made me think.... what does I do that is stupid and weird? That i do not see, but others do? I so wish me friends that tells me, where I go wrong! Those friend are so hard to find.
I do think, I have them on this forum tho. Maybe friends try to tell but I do not listen. I need to listen better.

### caroline — 2014-07-06T01:19:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-133261>

Inger - so many painful changes ..... but so beautiful too. You will all grow from this - you can see in all the conversations with all those you love - you have made such an impact ...and will continue too!

Now - you are moving on ...but they will always be in your heart. This move is for you and all about you ...it is time!

I think being scared is good ..... makes you know you are alive! living large isn't for the faint hearted!

All we have learned here will always see us thru ....and there is so much more to come!

I can't believe all the twists and turns our life is taking ..... It is all impossible to imagine ......

You asked about stupid things we do and don't stop to think......

I was out for coffee the other day with a friend ..... and I put one of those horrible sweeteners in it.
Margaret said - "I can't believe you use those - you care so much about everything you eat and do" "why do you use them - they are poison ???"

I really understood the impact I was having ...... I really felt ashamed of myself ......
I need to be much more conscious - 100% of the time!

xo

### Inger — 2014-07-06T08:24:37+0300

She put only little sugar so they are not so sweet and sometimes use whole grain flour.. and thinks they are healthy then.. but she totally do not get how bad grains are for broken brains...... I have realized many do stuff out of habit - it is like they are not capable to switch their brains to something new? They see the new is good.. and all that, but they just cannot change their habits themselves. Weird.
She would eat and enjoy my cakes every day and my food too BTW but are not capable of making it herself. because of old habits. But I just cannot be their chef.. i have other things to do with my life....
But, maybe one day she will get it and have enuf of the suffering

### Inger — 2014-07-06T08:31:19+0300

Cinnamon, I am so exited too!!!! I start to get a really relaxed and good feeling inside me! Like yeah, this is it! This is going to be good! I have had hard time to really relax here when others are home, because of all their rules over me and such. It is like you get mentally pushed down somehow. When I am here alone in this house it is amazing... i relax immediately! But now, I can relax even if they are here  and that is a great thing! Like their power cannot grasp me anymore

I might buy one of my parents cars too.... i just have to check out first it is not going to break down soon, as I have no clue about cars! Then I will drive that car down to Germany... i am sooo exited, I have never drove that far! But I will have a car to drive and load up with oysters with. My parents are so kind they let me pay it little by little.

Audrey... talking about stupid things... I did an "Audrey" too the other day...

I went to the store and parked the car at the parking lot. I come back, and my car was not there??? I was like WTH? I look around and see the car a bit further away in the middle of the parking lot... with a grandma and grandpa and a police man by its side. I had forgot to put in the "P" - it is an automatic.. and I usually do not use the hand brakes. So it had rolled... and the old couple run to the car to hold it and call the police... I was so ashamed i wanted to disappear through the ground, seriously!!!! The policeman was a young guy and he seemed pretty embarrassed... said nothing and all of a sudden just walked away. He must have thought this girl is very stupid  I am glad no one got hurt or anything got broke! I for sure thanked my two saviors from my heart.....
But such things just should not happen. Seriously stupid of me.

### Inger — 2014-07-06T09:15:56+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-133282>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=133279)
>
> I have told her how to make nut-coconut-honey-berry cakes Lah, and she loves them and whole family too - but she still makes her apple pies with wheat and sugar! She put only little sugar so they are not so sweet and sometimes use whole grain flour.. and thinks they are healthy then.. but she totally do not get how bad grains are for broken brains...... I have realized many do stuff out of habit - it is like they are not capable to switch their brains to something new? They see the new is good.. and all that, but they just cannot change their habits themselves. Weird.
> She would eat and enjoy my cakes every day and my food too BTW but are not capable of making it herself. because of old habits. But I just cannot be their chef.. i have other things to do with my life....
> But, maybe one day she will get it and have enuf of the suffering

To this I have something more to say..... I have lost interest in using food as entertainment... increasingly. I do not see a reason to spend time inside in the kitchen, when I could spend it outside? This might sound harsh... but to me, it is wasted time. I refuse to spend any more time than needed with food. I make my chevice, and carpaccio... that is about it. They are super fast dishes and I eat the same thing every single day. I even like it! My time is limited... and i am so happy to be able to choose how to spend it  like everyone
I see how much time my mom spend in the kitchen..... i used to help her.. but no more. I have said to her, mom you do not need to do all that. Come outside with me in the garden!
But habits are so hard to break it seems. And I even know she loves to be outside in the sun........ she is, but not nearly enough

I walked through the magic forest yesterday from the lake to the car, barefoot with just a tiny summer dress on.... and all the beauty around filled me with joy... i was about to explode...! I thought, if you suffer, please come and take my hand - come with me into the magic, and healing will occur! Just take my hand... i will lead you to heaven.......
because that is real, the healing could be so easy......

### caroline — 2014-07-06T12:30:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-133288>

me too Inger ..... I have no interest in food as entertainment anymore - simple and mostly raw ...what could be easier?

When Yew was here - we went to the fish market and the fish guy cut up some tuna and salmon for us - sashimi style.
He even cut up an avocado for us that I had brought - I forgot a knife!
We had a great picnic at the ocean overlooking the yacht basin with oysters and shrimp and the sashimi...... under an amazing blue sky ..... absolutely perfect!

An instant picnic! sharing simple seafood and conversation with friends is by far the most important thing.

Hi Inger, I have not been on forum for sime time and I see now you are moving. Good luck with the move and I wish for you you will continue in your new home/life as happy and full of life as I know you so far. You and Caroline inspired me a lot when I felt my life is over. Too bad I cannot give anything as valuable back to you both. I hope my warm thoughts of you both will travel to your lifes and bring at least one smile on your faces! Take care!

You have no clue how much you have given me already Kovita

I am so very happy I cannot even tell, that you are doing so well too...!

I was at the lake again yesterday, 4 hours tanning and swimming nude and eating blueberries that grows plentiful around the lake... no one was there
laying on those sun warmed rocks by the water truly is magic! I wonder what magic powers they have, I do feel it
I cannot help to feel like the luckiest person in this world    i have everything i could ever wish for    and more!

### Inger — 2014-07-08T08:57:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-133486>

I was sitting in the cafe by the auto repair shop yesterday.... I waited for my car getting fixed. So I got me a coffee and wanted to read the newspaper. But it bored me to death, and I started to watch my surroundings instead. That was like being in a movie... but way more exciting....
I have to say i almost started to cry right there  People looked so sick... and stiff! It was lunch time and workers came for lunch. The town vicar was there... I remember him - this is the town I was born in and grew up in too... some police men... an old couple.. that did not say a world to another and both appeared stiff and dead even if they lived somehow... oh man it was too sad. And lots of construction workers.
One young guy looked healthy and tanned. Not stiff at all. It was a painter, I could see that. He was maybe 20 yo. He watched me all the time.... very funny.... he was about the only one that looked real healthy!
Maybe he loved the nature too... and could see I did the same and we had this connection

The whole experience do shocked me a bit. After spending so much time out in the wild it is kind of weird to see the civilization of today

I have to say my parents look very healthy in comparison to many..... so i am used to see them all the time, and then this...

### Celeste — 2014-07-10T08:05:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-133824>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=133281)
>
> Audrey... talking about stupid things... I did an "Audrey" too the other day...
>
> I went to the store and parked the car at the parking lot. I come back, and my car was not there??? I was like WTH? I look around and see the car a bit further away in the middle of the parking lot... with a grandma and grandpa and a police man by its side. I had forgot to put in the "P" - it is an automatic.. and I usually do not use the hand brakes. So it had rolled... and the old couple run to the car to hold it and call the police... I was so ashamed i wanted to disappear through the ground, seriously!!!! The policeman was a young guy and he seemed pretty embarrassed... said nothing and all of a sudden just walked away. He must have thought this girl is very stupid  I am glad no one got hurt or anything got broke! I for sure thanked my two saviors from my heart.....
> But such things just should not happen. Seriously stupid of me.

Inger believe it or not this also happened to me. I'm ashamed to admit. I was a young woman then and had driven home from visiting friends late at night. I stopped to get gas and was walking into to pay. I heard people yelling and turned around and my little civic was rolling backwards towards the street, with my baby in it.  I ran after the car and two young guys caught the car as it was rolling into the then empty street. I ran and jumped in and started up the car and pulled it back around. I yelled out my window at the two guys, "THANK YOU". I was so grateful nothing happened. How unconscious I was back then. I would never want to go back in time even though I was younger, prettier.

Sounds like you are really embarking on a new journey in your life! I want to go through your whole journal and learn from your experience.

### Inger — 2014-07-20T18:25:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-134985>

I could never have imagined how nice everything has turned out.... it is like magic!

I am at a hotel now because I will have internet and landline not until next weekend... lets hope it will work out, I want to read on the forums! Uhhh... but man I have enjoyed my time here already, exploring my environment every day - oh man how many treasures. I never thought it could be this good

My landlord and his wife, an older couple on my parents age, they are just too lovely! She had bought me a sunflower.. because I had told her I adore the sun... and then a champagne bottle was waiting for us in the fridge... I shared it with the guys for sure... They slept here 2 nights, in my living room... wanted to share my bed... err.. but I said for now I have to be a nun  because i need to heal... for a year or so... oh man those situations are just not my favorite – but in the end it all went well, and the guys were so kind to me and helped me with everything! It was a bit my fault too, because I frequently touched them and hugged as we made stops during the 10 hour drive – i just needed the energy, and I sure got some, just by touching them! How cool is that! Male energy is the best

There is only one bad thing about this place, really – there are wifi signals i can see them on my laptop. They are very weak to medium, no one is full force. 2 are alwasy present, 1 is sometimes. Must be from the neighbors.

The good things are _so many more_!

This house seems to be earthed.....! Yay! The floors are all stone except of the bedroom that has carpet... and when I measured it with my body volt meter the living room flor is earthed... the terrace too, it is stone..... and I bet the kitchen and bathroom are too! And the house is stone, such thick walls, and the roof is super thick natural straw roof... my landlord said they have troubles getting good wifi signals and I have poor cellphone coverage in some spots inside too.... very poor. Yay me!!!

And...... i have found a beautiful tiny tiny lake 10 minutes biking from here... in a big forest/nature reservate where is no buildings or roads, just walking/biking paths. And by that lake, when I lay by the water on the sand, it is a bit like a crater, (a very shallow one).. I have zero cellphone coverage on my both cellphones!!!! I just cried from happiness as I lied there and realized it..... i have a place in the nature to tan and swim where is 0 coverage.... When I walk just a few steps from the water line there is coverage again.
How weird is hat! But very good!

Later i discovered (i was tanning nude...) that it is a place where people come and let their dogs swim... haha.. I had to put my bikini on and off a few times..lol Good thing is the dogs always come first and then I had time to dress before the owners arrived. I thought yuck now my beautiful magic little lake is full of dog dirt. But then I thought a bit longer and realized dog dirt might be just what i need now! Because all the bacteria will tune my body into this environment faster than fast

And then I do not think dogs are that dirty at all. And natural water always get cleaned from the sun.

I have had so many nice chats with the people walking their dogs there, very nice  people are so nice here i just cannot believe it!

I was over for a coffee by my landlords to sign some papers etc. And then he had baked a cake.... oh my. I said i have gluten intolerance and i am so sorry i cannot taste it! They seemed ok with that. After 2 hours... they knew a lot more about me. That i eat mostly raw seafood...... and raw meat too.... and use only candles in the evening... and love ice baths....... and that my dad drinks mackerel head smoothies to not get alzheimer! Haha... i figured it is good to be radically honest from the beginning, i will have it easier that way. And they thought it was all so funny and we laughed a lot lol

they said... oh my, now we have a vampire renting in our house! Ha!

They have given me plenty of maps... to explore the environment, and given so many great tips! The landlords wife told me they moved here because she had such a bad asthma, and here she got healed! She said people come to this area to heal, it has such a healthy air because there is sea/ocean on both sides, and it is pretty windy and cooler temps. YAY!

I could see it on the berries in the forest, they were just losing the flowers..... it is going to take a month or two before they are ready for sure!

I was at the shore, 20 minutes by car, and it is very special! The whole shore is just mud, when you step into the water you sink maybe 10 cm... I talked to a old lady by the ”beach” and she said it is very healthy and the water quality is very good. The "mud" is very healing... She lives here. Many people were going to swim and walk in the mud. How funny! I did too... that was too cool haha.... but the water was very warm! But nice.. and so salty.... I just kind of floated...lol swimming was super easy!

No 3,5 G coverage here... thanks god

I was shopping for oysters yesterday. The oysters costed 1,40 € / piece. I bought 50 oysters and they have to do until I drive to Denmark for oyster hunting! The nice man in the wine shop told me where to go and how to drive there. Maybe 40 minutes with the car. I have been asking so many questions, and I have gotten sooo much information, unvaluable!

Whole mackerel here is only 7 € / kg.... in Finland I had to pay the double... Roquefort is only 22 € / kg.. in Finland it was 52 €. I just cannot believe it is true. They have plenty of organic raw sheep and goat cheeses from this region...... I have tried some of them and they are sooooo goood! I have never seen such a great cheese selection anywhere until yet. The sheep are grassing on the shore line right by the ocean, must make super healthy meat and milk.....

I am just so overwhelmed with all the good things here I just cannot believe it yet. It is just so freaking awesome!!!!!!!

I think I am the luckiest girl in the universe, seriously.....

I was at Sylt yesterday, an island close to here with a HUGE beach, white sand... and there is a oyster farm too......... YAY and I was at the part of the beach where people tan and swim nude...haha first time in my life. It was nice! I had oysters and salmon and cod roe.... and herrings... oh man. But I still like my silent little lake in the wild better - I just do not like those tourist places too much, I can literally feel the EMF... 3 G was there too... I could see it on my phone - so many people on that huge beach . That is the Island where all the rich people around here come to party and relax. Beautiful, yes, but I am in love with the wild....
I can get into the ocean at places where are way less people and I can tell it feels way more regenerating!

I was at that beach yesterday 6 hours... blue sky... white sand and windy... I thought i would get burnt. It felt like that yesterday a little... but today, nothing! yay.... not one bit red! Must be all the DHA I have been getting here... I wonder if one can get too much??? I have had so much mackerel... and SHRIMPS! I bought them directly from the fishermen! They are tiny, Busumer shrimp... 3 € / liter unpeeled. My cat loves them, and I too! Totally fresh, boiled on the ship in seawater. I peel them for my cat and I eat the heads lol
I got the guys on the ship to promise me they will sell me raw shrimps too! I got their card....  i am making contacts fast.....  they could not believe I want them raw haha......

Ok this turned out into a book... ouch. talk to you later guys! I love you all....!!!!!!!!!!!! Miss you!!!!!!!!!!! I one week I can participate again in my favorite place (here)

### Inger — 2014-07-20T18:28:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-134986>

Oh... just one more thing! I live just a few steps from an old church... 10 meters from my door... and a graveyard! I could not be happier!!!! I love the silence there... I often go and sit by the church on the lawn in the mornings.. with my coffee.. and no one is there - just the birds. and me. Very magic. Very healing.

I have to say.. people here are way less tech oriented as it was in Finland where I lived... I have had serious troubles to find a place close to me with wifi to use! haha... but it makes me laugh  because that is exactly what I want  I have had to drive 20 km to this place too....

I am soon going to go down there and tan and swim a bit  The good thing is you can use as much or as little clothes you like, I do like to use my bikini bottom tho..... in public... but let see maybe that changes too

### Inger — 2014-07-23T17:33:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-135307>

Yes, exactly - i live about 25 minutes drive from Sylt. I sit in Bredstedt now in an internet cafe... i was swimming and tanning on the Hamburger Hallig for 5 hours.. that is my new favorite place - barely any cellphone coverage... you need to bike about 4 km to get out on that "island" - people go there for swimming and there are sheep everywhere grassing... on the beach... haha they are so cute! I have taken pictures I will put them in when I get internet working at home!

I was there yesterday too... in the evening. It was so magic! No water at all around the island as i arrived... people walking in the mud on the ocean floor..... and then, as the sun set, the water started rising.... I watched it rise, I could see it - bit by bit..... it was totally magic. here are the difference several meters between high and low water

tomorrow I will go to the fish market, and loading up on mackerel and herrings and shrimp.. and then next up - oyster safari - on my own

### Hope — 2014-07-24T19:03:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-135465>

Oh Inger I am so excited for you! Sounds like you have found heaven on earth, as I figured you would! So glad you found the FKK Straende also.......I haven't been to a beach in Germany where they didn't have one, even on lakes...and I see people and women not wearing much even on regular beaches, no matter the shape! And yes the wattenmeer is also great with the mud...so great for your skin too bc of all the minerals in it etc. I am certain you will meet many more amazing people there who get nature and fish as you do. Even when you get a job.....there are so many little towns - away from the well known, high priced places like Sylt, where you could use your gifts and talents and languages. Also I am certain you will love Sylt too once the high season is over and people leave and you will have the whole thing to yourself when you go for an afternoon etc.

Wishing I could be there with you.....I just got back from Germany and miss it terribly already. I love the cleanliness, the smallness of it and the Gemuetlichkeit. But most especially the beaches on the Nord and Ostsee.

Hugs and happiness

### Celeste — 2014-07-25T07:38:32+0300

### Inger — 2014-07-26T12:20:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-135619>

Hope, looks people are certainly more open minded in that regard here... the other day on Hamburger Hallig island several women around me took off their bikini top after swimming and tanned their breasts... loved that! Oh man, one topless tanning women was so stunningly beautiful, I still have her burned into my mind... she had such wide hips and amazing curves and was carrying herself with such a grace, she had 2 kids and her husband looked like Danny de Vito and shorter than her...lol They were such a loving family! I can tell i sucked up their love without even talking to them huh
we did smile to each other and said hello as they where right by me

Celeste, I wish i can get wise one day. Like Jack. All i can say this is not easy! I am suffering so badly from the excessive solitude
I love to be alone... but to leave all friends and family and dear neighbors and animals and all you loved behind, it is so darn hard.
Not knowing one single soul here.... like, really knowing.

There is that dark voice speaking to me - ahh i cannot stand the pain, lets go and buy some wine and drink, it will help. So cheap wine here.
But I do not. I am going to go through this pain - sober - i know it will not last forever. Soon i will have home telephone, then I will call my mom. And I will get new friends, it just takes time. Friends does not happend over night, i know that.
It is just a bummer my internet connection and telephone is still not up. Some trouble with the lines. It makes it all way harder I can tell. I cannot come to this site either easily (this site always lifts me up!), i need to save money too and cannot drive all the time and spend money on internet cafes.... like now

...so I just spend my time thinking, and reading, and being outside. I did not know there was all this pain inside me still, oh man I have so much debt to pay. That is why i need to go through this pain. No movies, no distractions. No one to talk to Just me and my cat. and my thoughts. It is time to grow up.

I do have found some more treasures! Wild raspberries... finally! And wild plums, those small yellow ones... oh man they are yummy too.....

It is so weird, when I am outside, i never feel lonely, or sad. Why is it that those thoughts appear only inside? It really is mysterious to me.
But my dreams..they are so nice... I get all the "things" I do not have... in my dreams  isn't that magic!

Oh... and I have gotten a huge herpes on my upper lip!I have not had that for sooo long! It is very pretty....
Of course right as my period started. What is great is my period is totally regular again since months! So happy for that, yay! But I eat zero supplemets, and it was as I tried all those supps in winter that my period got weird....

### caroline — 2014-07-26T14:44:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-135621>

It is so hard to move to a new place Inger....that is my experience too. I know lots of people casually - but real friends - that is much more difficult.
I was thinking the same thing the other day ...I am always okay outside - but inside, in the evening can be difficult.

Of course - it will get better ..... for now you have your dreams! dream big - the sky and beyond is the limit!

xo

### prAna303 — 2014-07-26T15:00:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-135622>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=135619)
>
> It is so weird, when I am outside, i never feel lonely, or sad. Why is it that those thoughts appear only inside? It really is mysterious to me.

It is a mismatch.

We where never meant to be inside like we are today so being indoors makes us loose all kind of natural sources of energy. When this is done we start to sink in mood and many troubles becomes obstacles.

Inside we loose energy big time, it is not only about the technology i think. When someone is used to nature, indoors and its mismatch giving effects puts stress on our systems. After a while, if you are sensitive you feel and can listen to the warning signs before it gets cronical...

Just give in to the feeling and go outside, we belong there.

### Inger — 2014-07-29T22:53:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-135953>

Yep... I am outside now too.... on my terrace. I am addicted to the grasshoppers beautiful music... it is just awesome..... it is strong!

This is the tiny lake/pond I found.... i was there 3,5 hours again today, and tanned almost the entire time nude -the water was 24 degree C so really warm but it still cooled me down nicely as the weather is so warm now! Oh man it alwasy makes me feel so amazing. I take lots of water with me to drink too. When I am at the waters edge laying on the sand, there is no cellphone connection at all....
I do think they do chemtrails here... i think you can even see them on the picture. In Scandinavia i have never seen those... weird. I wonder if it is bad for health?

No internet still.... this is hard! So I went and got me a stick  i just do not want to drive around to internet cafes anymore. I hope next week i will have my wired connection tho! Working on it!

### Inger — 2014-07-29T23:00:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-135955>

I might do a "Peter" soon. As here are 2 to 3 wifi signals night and day in my apartment even if otherwise very little EMF, I am thinking about going to sleep in the woods once in a while. I do sleep great here, but still. I already have watched a nice place for that.... ouch I wish I had a man to take with me! Little scary to go alone as a girl but hey, i needed to grow up!
Maybe i need to join an internet dating site to ask for a partner to sleep with in the woods....

I wonder what a "blind date" is? Anyone care to tell me?

### caroline — 2014-07-30T03:45:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136009>

just saying "Hi" ..... blind date???? personally - I can't get my head around a dating site ...I tried and chickened out!

seems like if the universe has intentions for me .... it will happen - or maybe I have my head in the sand?

### Inger — 2014-07-30T11:29:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136059>

Thanx guys. Audrey I am thinking too, maybe i just have my head in the sand? Maybe some dating site could at some point in your life - be a good thing? I am not sure yet about that.
But I am like you, I like to not mix myself into what universe has for me..... i like stuff to be spontaneous, i am a very spontaneous girl. Maybe too much.... but i was always like that

I am sitting on the grass in the Church yard now, and here are no wifi signals at all... maybe I have to come and sleep here?
or maybe in the church.... it is mostly open.....

I slept from 10:15 PM to 8;15 PM tonight.... ouch! But I felt great by waking
I seriously sleep very well, even if the wifi signals are n all night. Maybe the magnetico helps! Or all the grounding and sun. I am grounded most of the time, i only use shoes if I go into the bigger town/shopping. I can be without shoes everyplace around here where I live, it is such a tiny town and no shops at all - and my stone floor is grounded too, I walk barefoot all the time indoors too. I try to avoid the carpets! They are all wool and animal skins, but I still think you will not ground through them as they are dry, at least not much.

I am so curious how the winter will be here!!! I cannot wait! But until then, I am going to enjoy this summer 100%

My ex is so kind he has taken care of me so well, i have not needed to look for a job yet! He loves me and I love him, in a very special way! His girlfriend cannot understand and she is so jealous, it looks like she destroys it for them  so sad. I have tried to explain to her so many times but it is like she get caught into some negative thoughts all the time. She gets it when I talk to her, but the very next moment she falls into her old thinking again.
I do have been thing about looking for a job to earn some extra money (or to be able to support myself if the ex could not help anymore - he says he wants to all his life but one can never know what happens with him for sure), it is not so easy to find one that is good for health, but I am keeping my eyes open.

I was thinking about milking cows, I have done that before in my youth.... they are often needed here, seen several jobs in the local newspaper.. but then I thought ouch there must be much EMF.....

and then I thought about working with children... that would be fun....
well... it is not that I do not have stuff to do, I have - and lots - I am never ever bored.... It just does not give me any money.... but maybe i should just relax and let the ex take care of that lol as long as he wants it so badly!
Now, I am his personal health couch..  and best friend

i sometimes think, my life is way too good to be true..........
i can be as much as I want outside.... listen to the birds... like an Eve in paradise nude by the lake, alone.... it all fills me with joy..... and I am thinking, maybe that is how it feels to die? You just melt into the universe..... and everything is light and beauty
I sure want to die outside, that must be a beautiful experience! But first I want to live a long life as there are so many things to explore and experience yet......

### Inger — 2014-07-30T11:46:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136060>

and I have to finish the thing I have promised myself to do before i die, my debt i have to pay back to all my dear siblings... i have hurt them.. and I have not been there when they needed me so badly...... and i love them all so dearly my heart is about to explode! and i am right now working on how to pay back that
I have forgiven myself for what i had did wrong because at that point in my life I had no clue it was wrong - even if it was really really bad. I just was way too broken to see. Makes it easy to forgive others too that fail, because they just might not see it, and they might think they do the right thing, just like I thought too

### lavendercat — 2014-07-30T11:46:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136061>

my brother had great success with the guardian personal ads. its a newspaper in the uk. now he lives and works in japan with his wife

not that personal ads are for everyone but it was unexpected for him to use them and he got a great result.

i met my boyfriend on a music forum online. bit cheesy but he really is my "soul mate" if you could call it that.

### Inger — 2014-07-30T14:18:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136078>

interesting lavendercat!  I am open to anything.... good  just not desperate at all and very happy alone too, well, who knows what happens - anyways i need to heal that is my priority nr 1
You are one lucky chick that have found your soul mate - wow! Very lucky

Just got an email from my bro in Norway that tells me he found oysters around where he lives so big, the biggest was 18 cm big and weighed 780 grams
told me he could pick some with him to me as he will visit in a few weeks! I cannot wait    I am so blessed that have so many dear siblings, seriously I could explode from love and thankfulness - and I am proud of them too
he is an electric engineer and will help me with some electrical stuff here, I need to shut off my electric stove it has bad readings on my gaussmeter and i cannot get it shut off myself, it seems very complicated! I do not need a stove at all. I will buy me an gas stove, a tiny one, if I ever need to cook anything.

This internet connection (the stick) is painfully slow..... but I guess it is a good thing after all  might mean the radiation level is lower here... i hope!

### Lahelada — 2014-07-30T15:03:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136084>

Hi Inger,
I am glad that your new paradise is still that. Fancy that, I am German but I dont know the places you do.
I would ditch the stick as quickly as possible as being amobile device will be power hungry and always checking back if there is not a bit more speed forthcoming.
It looks like we are in the same boat. I also need to reinvent myself workwise. When you mentioned milking cows I could see that for you. Why not visit a place taking your meter with you to verify . I would imagine that the floors are concrete so touching the animals might ground you. Or have I got that wrong?
About someone special maybe join a forum of something that interests you? I hear that way one achieves a high compatibility ....
Anyway gotta butt out of your life and back into my own.
Have a great day up there,have an oyster for me please as there are none here at the moment.

### Chrysanthemama — 2014-07-31T06:20:21+0300

Oh Wow, Inger! your new place sounds so divine. I love how you just told the landlords all about you right up front. So brave and honest. I so hope that I can get to Europe in the near future. I would love to visit. Keep listening to your intuition. You have it all figured out, Love.

### Chrysanthemama — 2014-07-31T06:25:11+0300

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=134986)
