> Oh... just one more thing! I live just a few steps from an old church... 10 meters from my door... and a graveyard! I could not be happier!!!! I love the silence there... I often go and sit by the church on the lawn in the mornings.. with my coffee.. and no one is there - just the birds. and me. Very magic. Very healing.
>
> I have to say.. people here are way less tech oriented as it was in Finland where I lived... I have had serious troubles to find a place close to me with wifi to use! haha... but it makes me laugh  because that is exactly what I want  I have had to drive 20 km to this place too....

Graveyards are pure magic. I live about 1 km away from one and it is also a very peaceful and wildlife filled place. My daughters also like to go there. It sounds like you have truly found a wonderful place!

### Chrysanthemama — 2014-07-31T06:31:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136275>

Inger, are you interested in rock climbing at all? Beautiful men. Usually lots of them. If I were single, I'd rather find a man who was interested in rock climbing, ice climbing, trail running, or mountain biking. I would not use a singles site. Just go find those climbers. So many men, and so many of them beautiful. So much amazing climbing in Europe! I am certain you will find the right man for you. You do not need the internet to help you find a man. You go find a man that is outside all the time, swimming, climbing, walking, trekking, exploring. They are there!! Forget about that stupid internet, okay? Love to you.

### Inger — 2014-07-31T09:31:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136287>

You are always welcome to visit me Ch-mama! That would be so much fun....!  I am pretty sure too it is not ideal to find a partner through internet... i actually do not like the idea at all you need to find someone. Hmmmm feels so weird to me at this point in my life. I hate to spend any unnecessary time on the computer too. I am very happy alone too that is for sure - i entertain myself very easily
having 14 siblings makes one never really feel lonely i can tell..... I just need to stop thinking what "should be" like one should have a partner and such thoughts. That is, when i start to think those thoughts, only then it feels kind of sad to be alone, but otherwise, it feels perfectly fine! I do need to heal a lot still, I am far from optimal, very far! This tiny brain of mine needs much healing. So i guess clever is to concentrate on that first... and who knows what happens down the road  i just need to stay open to life as i travel along!

I do love climbing and stuff! I am not just a super sporty person like, i do not like competition too much, I like to move and play in he nature.. have fun, and relax  I am going to see what possibilities are around here when I have settled down a bit - it is going to be very interesting! Mountains are here no... the biggest mountain in the forest behind this tiny town is 45 meter high.... lol and it is not looking like a mountain at all lol
North Germany is very, very flat!
I love to explore my environment - i guess that is my favorite thing - to walk and bike to new places... it is so exciting, what will i find? Maybe berries? lol they are like gold to me, i cannot feel any happier as i am staying in the forest barefoot eating wild berries from the bush..... ohhh that is heaven to me    i can do it for hours....

### Inger — 2014-08-02T21:24:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136527>

I am sitting by the church now, scantily clad on the grass…. and it is so sublime.. as Peter would say

I took my breakfast, raw herring in a bowl and chopsticks.. and my cold coffee out here to suck up some morning sun. I was on my way to the fish market, the 1 kg herring and 1 mackerel I bought yesterday are all eaten by me, in one day, ouch! So I stood there by my car and felt the amazing morning sun on my skin and then I thought, i need to put my priorities straight.. went inside again – changed to bikini top and shorts and went to the church yard to get some infrared therapy….

I am so lucky to be free to make my choices.. I cannot believe it even! Man it is so beautiful out here in the morning sun.. and I am so often here but I need to do it every single morning  No wifi either…. i am just writing on my word now without internet and will post later. I took this laptop into the church and there was no wifi either and my cellphone showed pretty bad connection, at some places even none….. I now know where I need to spend more time.... Who would have thought… a church will be my best friend….. I need to make some connections! Maybe I can do some voluntary work for the church.. i just know one thing – i need to spend much time here

A butterfly visited me…it was a big, beautiful one… it come so close.. and was very interested in my coffee cup and the empty fish bowl! As I admired the butterfly, there comes a unicorn, such a sweet sweet unicorn, jumping over the lawn… and just a few meters from me, plays a little on the grass and jumps further.. what a paradise.. I just could not help I got tears in my eyes from joy. The wind touches my skin so gently…. and here is so peaceful.

It is all so sublime… i did not know that word before Peter learned me. I like that word.

Oh man I could stay here forever… it seriously is like time would stand still

I did not know about the church when I moved here… must have been a gift from God. I wonder why he gives me so many gifts all the time! Man, I gotta love him!!!!! It is just a bit overwhelming

another gift from God…my toilet! It is the best toilet ever to squat on  I need to post a picture..haha

I realized I have eaten 1 kg raw organic Hazelnuts in one week too…. i love to eat a handful to dessert after my raw fish chevice. What a perfect meal – i eat those all the time! They just never bore me. I now often make me a big bowl of raw fish, herring, mackerel, cod.. whatever I have, I mix them too, and then raw onion and ACV and some sea salt. And then I eat right out of the bowl until it is empty, usually 2 -4 meals. Very easy and convenient! And nicely cool right out from the fridge.

Well, today I will drive to Denmark for oyster hunt…. so exciting..!

\- - - -

later.
Did not found 1 single oyster.. only empty shells. I almost cried! But I found lots of rosehip berries and bladderwrack, very delicious combo. Must be too warm for the oysters to come close to land, I guess.

later.
Was at my favorite beach today and I found a few oysters there that I picked and had beside me on the grass for 6 hours in 28 degree C... I just ate them as i came home, after a fish head smoothie... and they were very yummy! Pretty small but so good!

I have a "room" in an old horse barn by this house where I can keep stuff, I might make me a bedroom there. Cant lock the door but who cares. The landlords cats live there. There are no wifi signals in there. i measured it - I am not thinking it is too good to sleep in my bedroom where I get the neighbors wifi too. Not sure a 10 gauss magnetico mitigates the damage? I need to watch how I feel/sleep. But I am so glad I have the horse barn, i kind of like the thought to sleep there - i think it is kind of romantic

### Inger — 2014-08-02T21:35:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136529>

Germans are funny.. when they changes clothes at the beach they just strip off naked in front of everyone, dry off and put on their clothes...hahah young and old, man and woman.

saw some amazing daddies on the beach today, they took so good care of their children and swam with them and played with them in the water, it was deep at that moment, you could not reach the ground even... there are stairs that goes into the sea though. I just was amazed, sat by the water and could not take my eyes off them, seriously. It was a magic moment... love was around
kids looked so loved and healthy, very tanned and so cute... the daddies too....
it was very special.

I have no doubt, Inger, you will make great friends...whether at the church or otherwise locally, once you get settled and make connections...I am so excited for you and that you are doing so well. And how neat about all that great sleep you got too!

I also cannot imagine that some great German man won't snap you up.....I am sure pretty soon there will be a line of them in front of your house.

Enjoy and thanks for sharing all you do ~ love it always...

### caroline — 2014-08-03T02:18:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136561>

just beautiful Inger .... I think maybe we make our own paradise .......It is a state of being.....that we can choose - or not.

### Celeste — 2014-08-03T03:07:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136570>

Inger, I am having such joy just reading your journal. I am only to page 9 at the moment. You are very lucky. If only we could find joy and happiness in the things around us as you do. I also love the postings of your meals. Eating raw mostly, I look for different meals to make. I get lots of good ideas from you.

I need to make my way through your journal. I know you are looking for work. You have an incredible aesthetic sensibility. Also a sensitivity to your own emotions and those of others around you. Also so connected to the magical. I'm curious if you have ever taken the Meyers Briggs and what you got.

As for finding a man, you are so lovely inside and out. But finding someone attuned to you and the things that matter to you. Solitude is wonderful. I tend to gravitate to that myself, but companionship, friends, family, or those that become family to you are important too! Take care Inger. You are such a lovely soul.

### Inger — 2014-08-03T10:11:56+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136592>

> [Optimalbound said:](/goto/post?id=136542)
>
> Wait, did you just say that you saw a unicorn? Did you mean a squirrel, by any chance? If not, I'm starting to worry about your mental health. LOL

I sure meant squirrel.... but i was sure unicorn means that  there you see my language skills... excellent
I do that all the time, i believe something means something it does not at all...  that is when you carry 5 languages in your head and speak them sometimes all in one day and is not very intelligent.... Hopefully this will improve with time.... but now you see why i have to drink so many fish head smoothies! I still cannot believe how i got the drivers license either... i am totally not in control many times when i drive... my thoughts and mind fly to higher places and it is not too good when driving.... somehow I must have plenty of angels around me tho, as I have not crashed once yet.... and not hurt anyone either. My biggest concern is to drive into a human being

My older sister says I sure have always had ADHD/ADD
i think too. That is why i have to eat so weird stuff and live such a boring life, because i crave that! I have s much that needs to heal still.
Weird... i should go out having fun and meeting people, but i have no desire at all to do it. just want to be in silence and go early to bed and get so tired at 9:30 PM
Tonight I slept from 9:30 to 7:00 again.... when others were partying on a festival not far from here...haha.. i just love my bed
I am feeling so great living a very very boring life. I crave boring. But it is not boring to me at all. I guess because my mind is on overdrive so easily. So i am going to do what feels good to me and not what other think i should, that i have learned the hard way

### Inger — 2014-08-03T10:29:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136593>

> [Celeste said:](/goto/post?id=136570)

I tend to gravitate to that myself, but companionship, friends, family, or those that become family to you are important too! Take care Inger. You are such a lovely soul.

aww.. thanks Celeste! You are way too sweet!
Yes.. you are so right we need other humans too... thankfully i have so many siblings and they have kids too.. so there is lots of love to share, i never feel lonely as they are always in my heart
I also cannot compromise one bit on what is important for me in the terms of my health. I just cannot. Not as long as i have not fully healed yet - then i rather be alone
I think women are so sensitive they need to really take care - or at least that is how i feel personally.
so if there will ever be a man who fall in love with this troll.. he needs to accept i want it cold, dark and boring... and i need fish head smoothies and raw, rotten heart. Yeah.

I sure like the Germans! I like how they are so earnest - i hope i got that word right? I wanted to say "earnst" in German. They can have fun too, but they are very honest, and hard working, very disciplined. Great stuff. They are so easy to talk to too, I have talked to so many different people here already, very interesting! They very kindly answer all my questions and give away so much information! Very nice indeed

((((((((Hugs to you)))))))    hoping you are doing well too in your new home

### Inger — 2014-08-03T16:49:54+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136621>

This is the road to the beach i mostly go to. I need to park the car and then borrow a bike for 2 € / day and with that you bike about 4 km straight out to the sea, you can see the beach cafe on the right side of the road, at the horizon;

Sheep are everywhere.. it is so funny, they are fat and nice looking, for only grassing on those huge pastures along the shore. Must make awesome iodine filled meat

This is the electron pool - pretty huge!

There is a beach cafe on the "island" too.... the only houses around btw. They are grilling lambs meat from the area some nights.....
I saw something else so beautiful yesterday as i was there. A women with her kids and her old mother and how she took care of her mother was so loving i might never have seen something like that before.... the grandma was sleeping on the ground/grass barefoot and as they got hungry the momma woke her up so gently, helped her raise, took her mother by her hand and they both was barefoot and walked hand by hand up to the cafe.... the kids coming after them... oh man that was such a joy to watch - they were so cute!

> I am feeling so great living a very very boring life. I crave boring. But it is not boring to me at all. I guess because my mind is on overdrive so easily. So i am going to do what feels good to me and not what other think i should, that i have learned the hard way

I liked the unicorn reference. Like Jack's writing, and error here or there forces me to stop and figure it out. I end up paying more attention, I think. Like a fun little puzzle that happens my way. Makes me smile, anyway.

I especially like "errors" caused by someone who normally speaks another language. It teaches me other ways of thinking a thought.

### prAna303 — 2014-08-04T21:39:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136738>

> [nonchalant said:](/goto/post?id=136735)
>
> I liked the unicorn reference. Like Jack's writing, and error here or there forces me to stop and figure it out. I end up paying more attention, I think. Like a fun little puzzle that happens my way. Makes me smile, anyway.
>
> I especially like "errors" caused by someone who normally speaks another language. It teaches me other ways of thinking a thought.

Just something i thought about today when i was at the mountains, chewing on blueberries...

Today we have a lot of persons that go mayhem about spellings and other stuff. The funny thing is that often they do not have a vivid language by themself, they are so strict in rules that the become boring.

The same with this issue with quoting... Some get really pissed of if you take words from someone without credits, they funny things is, do they say i quote for each sentence they say or write? If you take a line of words meaning something, bet you can search your ass off for the one who said it first... So why care?

If someone would borrow a line from me, would i be pissed of if i am not named? No way... Steal ahead, use whatever you want if it makes any difference for you... Words are just a small part of how we communicate but the thought about the words can mean a lot more if they make you think...

### Optimalbound — 2014-08-04T22:03:45+0300

Unicorn or no unicorn, that sure looks and sounds like a very nice place that you've relocated to, Inger!

### caroline — 2014-08-05T01:15:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136762>

I so agree Peter ...borrow away if it means something to you ...that always makes me very proud. Dr. K. has always said if you worry about the spelling etc. .... you aren't getting the message.

I always have this mental image of Dr. K's brains ....stuffed full of stuff to the max ...and occasionally, when we get lucky, it spills out!

The grammar or quote police: Here is how I feel about it........While Rome burns the critics fiddle.

### Tanya — 2014-08-05T02:20:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136783>

Here is a quote, but I don't remember who said it - at least, I I am being honest to admit that it was not me: "I don't like fake cheese, fake butter and fake people". I personally find it shocking that somebody tries to pass somebody else's words as their own - speaks a lot about their integrity....Is not there a word for it such as "plagiarism"?

### Jack Kruse — 2014-08-05T02:32:49+0300

Integrity is not about words.......it is about deeds. Actions always matter most. If you are trying to help someone I say you use all weapons you have. But you can lead a horse to water but you still can make them think.

I will never forget how fun it was to be at your place  hope to come visit one day again! It is not all that far from here, just with the car up to Denmark and then with the ferry to Norway and then to drive a bit  You are welcome to visit me whenever you want!

### Inger — 2014-08-05T09:08:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136829>

I like when people point out when i write something wrong... it is a bit funny - and i learn a lot! Otherwise i would soon develop my own language no one would understand lol

if there is something good, we want it to be spread, no? It is the message that counts to me, not who come up with it. Like Peter says, it would be impossible to know who really come up with it in the beginning.... thousand of years are gone....
I do not think people who speak out proverbs etc. try to make anyone think they come up with it either.... at least that thought has never hit my mind - proverbs are there for everyone - they are just in the air like that
truths sailing around us  and they belong to everyone that understands them

### caroline — 2014-08-05T09:16:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136830>

What you write Inger is always so interesting ....... you often have a slightly different spin on a word that adds a whole new dimension to the conversation. I love it!

I find the same with Peter and Stella.....If Stella has something very important to say to me ...she will say it first in Spanish! or something that isn't all that important - but she needs to convey a certain meaning and feeling.

it always sounds very sexy in Spanish btw!

### Inger — 2014-08-05T11:14:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136839>

I would love to learn Spanish too... but I think French is very sexy language too

I like to try figure out what he person has meant to say when spelling is off - like Sally says, it makes one stop and think

Sometimes time is way too valuable to go back and check the spelling... there might be something more important to do... I so get Jack on this issue
people who complain about his spelling... they have no idea.....

### Inger — 2014-08-05T20:14:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136866>

Oh lala..... I was at that favorite beach of mine today - with the lambs on it... and picked 85 oysters..! Against the law  but i could not resist... They look way different than the ones i get at the shop so i thought there was none... then i started searching... and found some - and then some... and in the end there were so many but I had to stop collecting because my bag was about to burst
70 was pretty small and 15 pretty big
I just had a mackerel head smoothie and the mackerel meat from 2 mackerels as chevice and then raw nuts and 4 tiny oysters. They were very creamy and good!!! But i cut me pretty bad at the first one with my oyster knife, very hard to open that tiny bastard! My blood looked very nice and bright read and thin so I must have had enuf water tho

It was so much fun to walk on the sea floor looking for the beauties - the funniest thing ever

Many people have warned me it is dangerous to eat the oysters now as it is so warm, i need to wait for the fall. But I just cannot wait. If I get sick in my stomach it is not so bad, that way I will save some money for food I think! I have never got sick from an oyster yet so sometimes I need to try that too

### Inger — 2014-08-05T21:30:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136879>

Well, I washed the oysters.... and ate one of the biggies too... oh man it was so crazy creamy!!!!
Look how big the biggest are, almost as big as a coconut! But there are way more smaller tho.. very small! But they have surprisingly much meat even if they are clearly babies.....
The oysters on the left are not even half of what is still laying unwashed outside the picture

I cannot believe how beautiful they are, everyone is so different
I am so totally proud... I have finally found my oyster paradise

I know you never have to give up! Always keep searching! And you will get what you look for
Biggest secret in life

You just need to know what you want, so you know where to look

Inger, last year we had some problems here with oysters. But it had been very hot, about body temp each day for about a month. This year it has been cooler, and I don't expect any issues with them. What temperatures have you been getting up to the last few weeks?

### Inger — 2014-08-05T21:58:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136884>

Well, Sally it has been around 28 degree C for weeks, some days a bit cooler and some days 30 C too
and the water temp has been 27 degree C i think
I was swimming a little today after picking the beauties as the water rose and the water was surely warmer than the air! Air temp was maybe 22 C today, it is getting cooler

My belly does not hurt yet
this is very exciting - like in a movie-drama

### Inger — 2014-08-05T22:09:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136888>

The oysterpicking in Germany is illegal except on a "wattwanderung" and that was exactly what I was doing...lol but just alone. A wattwanderung is a walk you do with guides on the muddy ocean floor at low water.... it can be many kilometer long walks out to tiny islands, very cute ones.
Some time ago there was not too many oysters here and it was feared they will get less and less.... but now there is the opposite problem.. there are getting too many of them because of the imported ones that are not native to here and they are invading the coasts... The Germans should update their laws

### Ken23 — 2014-08-05T22:27:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136891>

Wattwanderungs sound fun

### Optimalbound — 2014-08-05T22:59:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136895>

In Norway, we have [a similar problem](http://www.imr.no/nyhetsarkiv/2014/mars/kronikk_osterselskere_besinn_dere/nb-no) with the imported [pacific oyster](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pacific_oyster) that is said to be a threat to the native [european flat oyster](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ostrea_edulis).
The recommendation now is to harvest the intruders and leave the natives behind in an attempt to let the population recover. It is kind of sad to read about the enormous amounts of flat oysters that existed here not that many decades ago.

### caroline — 2014-08-06T02:53:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136919>

Inger please be careful when opening oysters! There is a special glove for this - or wrap something heavy around your hand.

### nonchalant — 2014-08-06T03:58:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136928>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=136886)
>
> did you get sick last year Sally? Did you pick the oysters by yourself?
> I wonder if one can smell and taste it if they are bad. Those smelled and tasted great tho

No, I had oysters from a restaurant that must have been tainted. No bad smell or taste, I just had some tingling in my lips and tongue. No other issues. This was during a time that many batches of oysters were failing inspections, and the restaurants were usually out of them. I think I should just stay away next time there is a problem like that. I had more oysters a few weeks later, and they were great.

I'm amazed the water gets so warm up there, Inger.

### Andrea — 2014-08-06T07:43:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136947>

Inger, you little criminal! What a wonderful, wonderful place you have found!

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=136866)
>
> Many people have warned me it is dangerous to eat the oysters now as it is so warm, i need to wait for the fall. But I just cannot wait. If I get sick in my stomach it is not so bad, that way I will save some money for food I think! I have never got sick from an oyster yet so sometimes I need to try that too

I've heard such rumors too, but then an oyster diver told me that as long as you eat them directly from the ocean or make sure that they are constantly cooled, without interruption, they are fine. The problem in the warm months is that this is when they reproduce; the shell of a female can be filled with tiny larvae which isn't really a problem except that it doesn't look very appetizing. And if you kill a female with larvae, there will be far less oysters for later years. I'm not sure about how often they reproduce where you are, but up here they manage only every 3 or so years. So killing a bunch of females can have quite some consequences for "your" oyster bank.

> [Optimalbound said:](/goto/post?id=136895)
>
> In Norway, we have [a similar problem](http://www.imr.no/nyhetsarkiv/2014/mars/kronikk_osterselskere_besinn_dere/nb-no) with the imported [pacific oyster](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pacific_oyster) that is said to be a threat to the native [european flat oyster](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ostrea_edulis).
> The recommendation now is to harvest the intruders and leave the natives behind in an attempt to let the population recover. It is kind of sad to read about the enormous amounts of flat oysters that existed here not that many decades ago.

Normally, the two species prefer different depths to live on, so that shouldn't be a problem. But the Pacific oyster lives on the same depth as the blue mussels - in Sweden, anyway - so this is where our problem with them is.

### nonchalant — 2014-08-06T16:49:00+0300

I am drowning in oysters... HELP!!! Somebody come and help me eat them up!!!

### Inger — 2014-08-06T22:46:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-136998>

So i had a crazy day again... seems my solitude is broken

by the lake... people come by.. and they talk to me - and i tell them about all what I have learned from Jack.. and they are in awe! Said they know it is all true.. a lady and her husband were talking to for an hour at least - it was just amazing. She asked to take some of my empty oyster shells with her.. she said she needs to tell it all to her friends, abut the fish head smoothies and all LOL

then come to kids, 9 and 10 yo to swim, and they talked to me too
and it all ended up like this - we all 3 sit on my terrace and the kids are opening up my oysters for me to eat LOL
first time in their life! They tasted them too.... i have too oyster knifes and man i felt like a queen haha the kids fighted with the oysters and i just had to eat oyster after oyster - the kids said they want to come visit me always! because they love how i live  they are coming tomorrow at 11 AM too lol

then...later i drove to the oyster beach... and i see a paper on my window outside the car. I stop the car, take it off and read the paper. A man has written me his phone number - says he saw me at the oyster beach - and please call me beautiful lady.... oh man. I of course called, and he was on his way to the beach too! And then we meet and now i have a new friend  he is a maybe 65 yo teacher, very nice, and we talked sooooo much on the beach - and we picked oysters together and we ate them on the beach (35 oysters i took with me home tho, as I could not eat more!), I had my knife with me, I teach him to open oysters and I told him all about what I have learned from Jack. He was pretty amazed too! Tomorrow morning we will go to a fishmarket he know together! He know all the places here where to pick mushrooms, and many other things
yay... i now have a good friend (oh well, I guess he is a little in love with me but that's okay! I think he was very bold to write me such a nice letter on my car - and he is going to get great gifts from me because of that. Not a girlfriend maybe, but something way better     )

Thanks Jack. You, dear, have made my life way more awesome I could have ever imagined, in my wildest dreams..................................

Rerun i would love you to come...! Yes, come in fall and we will go oyster hunting together, we could do 1 week oyster fast if you like, just eating oysters all day long nothing else

we might get dangerously pretty

### Andrea — 2014-08-08T04:55:42+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-137245>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=136866)
>
> Oh lala..... I was at that favorite beach of mine today - with the lambs on it... and picked 85 oysters..!

One more note on this, that I forgot to mention. The oyster larvae need to settle on something made of calcium. They say that when the female releases them, they sniff and seek out other oysters to settle on. So if you clean your beach of oysters, young larvae won't be able to settle there very well. So, please, don't pick all oysters in an area, if you want to have more oysters there in the future.

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=137137)
>
> Rerun i would love you to come...! Yes, come in fall and we will go oyster hunting together, we could do 1 week oyster fast if you like, just eating oysters all day long nothing else
> we might get dangerously pretty

That sounds great! Oyster fast - or maybe feast?  That would be lovely. And to meet you! You're such an inspiration on this forum, and I'm sure I can learn quite a bit from you. Darn, I want to leave right away...

Oooh, dangerously pretty? Does that mean I'd have to get myself a red dress?  Interesting thought...

### Inger — 2014-08-08T21:12:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-137305>

Audrey... my grandpa... he was one amazing man, I loved him more than anything. Guess what... he had red speedos.....!  And he was always brown as a brownie!
Thinking of him feels like love....

You and I Rerun, we are exactly the same age, isn't that funny
I was at the beach today and tanned nude.. and realized where i was was actually a nude beach...lol there is no official nude beach but i went so far away, and climbed over a gate.. and there was no one.. so i just went totally nude. Then later there dropped a few more ladies for nude tanning close to me...haha so nice to swim and tan nude,
and then I ate oysters right from the ocean floor as the water went away and opened them by the waters edge and ate until i could no more - i lost the count
on the way home I got me an organic Bordeaux, some raw organic sheep milk cheese from local farms (oh man that was crazy yummy) and some raspberries with HWC, quite the sinful party
My fridge is so full with oysters, i have to eat them before I pick some more....
Rerun I took care to leave the shell along the shore, but you do not need to worry, the whole shore is full of oysters shells, tiny one, that are attached to the stones
but soon i will drive to Denmark and pick some there too. I promise to try to limit my oyster-feasts until you come

I have not heard the bees summing like I hear here for so long. It is amazing. Seriously loud! This bush is blooming outside my bedroom window, it is right behind it

....and it is full of bees, right now too! When I go to sleep i hear the grasshoppers singing so loud... and i hear the bees hum too

I bet it must mean something good

Where I lived before, there was way less bees... i did not here them hum like this.. even if there is many apple trees and they were blooming.. and i would often have to rescue some bees as they got lost inside the house even if it was second floor.
Here, I have not found one bee inside yet - like they know way better what they have to do and where they should be

### Inger — 2014-08-09T15:22:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-137364>

my cat is very wise, and we are so much alike. To lonely wolfs. She is just way wiser than me.  i am really not wise yet.... that is why i make mistakes often - but I do work on it!
IDK if it is good or bad but I have shaken off my new friend. I just cannot... it feels like he is clinging to me and i really do not need that now. I feel a bit cruel tho. but if he does not get the signals i give i cannot help it either. I wonder why people seem to not want to be alone? I crave it... must be i need so much healing still. I need to run away from people  i just have some work to do. I need to find out who I am. I am not by far ready yet. And i need to go through that alone. At least i do not need anyone to take my energy, and if it feels like that i back off fast.

Oh man... it made me almost anxious... he wanted to plan something to do together almost every day, holy cow.
I seriously need the solitude, feels like without that i cannot heal truly. So weird. Sure i can have moment where i feel sad or lonely but i want to go through that (alone too) and not running away from the deeper issues.

### Inger — 2014-08-09T15:28:09+0300

i do not care that he wanted to go pick oysters with me, he would have traveled around the world with me i am sure... but it gives me nothing.
I am going to follow my heart every single step on the way, that is for sure, and my heart said.... spend no more time with that guy.

Had a funny episode with a unknown cat yesterday...

In the garden of my house we have bushes of wild berries... Me there, eating, just hanging... Up comes this dark, black cat, purring and starting to push on my side. I watch what is going on, it points me towards a bush as she crawls on the ground... In a short second, a leap, a small sound of panic and death and here this cat comes with a dead bird in the mouth... Dragging it to me and starts to pick it...

Good cat, gave it a pet so she should continue this good manor.

### Inger — 2014-08-11T21:15:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-137576>

I have not seen bats here... not in Finland either, they must be not so common.. but here are lots of spiders! One evening there was a huge one right above my head..lol unpossible to feel lonely here  Now, I am just a bit unsure if I feed the mouse or my cat  but I have not seen the mouse anymore.

I got a bit sick in my belly from the raw cheese and cream binge friday evening. I have no clue what was the cause in the end, as i was at the beach that day and ate as many oysters as my belly could fit.... right at the beach. Maybe it was too many? Why do I have to be so greedy...?  But I did not feel anything in my belly that day, just in the evening it felt a bit too full, a few hours after the oyster binge I had 200 grams of raw sheep cheese and 1,5 dl HWC with raspberries at 7 PM, and 24 cl organic Bordeaux. Very sinful - and i rather think my body did not like that. In the morning i woke up and felt the food was still in my belly.. and that is very weird because my digestion is normally so good. My sleep was crap too, alcohol in the evening really destroys sleep. Jack has said, not after 5 PM.... how right he has bin
I did not have to vomit even once but i felt a bit nausea.. and i had way less appetite. But I still ate raw herring and some avocado salad and raw hazelnuts and one huge oyster but my belly still felt not right.

Today morning I was not better, really had the runs and my belly hurt a bit... and i felt a bit weak too.. oh man i did not like that at all! So i decided to really listen to what my body wanted. And it wanted something cooked. Cooked meat. I craved that. I did not have any meat so i sauteed some cod gently in grass fed butter. Oh man that was good. Ate a few pieces of my high heart but it was only 1,5 months old and not really high yet, unfortunately...
I wanted more meaty stuff... i drove to the shop and got me 550 grams of grass fed ribeye. I ate it all in 3 hours, just gently fried in the pan, still raw inside, with black fresh pepper and salt and some grass fed butter. Oh man, I craved it so badly!!! No coffee... i did not wanted any. I wanted dark chocolate. So I got me some of that too.... mmmm

My belly seems just fine now, amazing! I went to the shop and got me another 500 grams of ribeye for tomorrow... i could eat it all right now, I again have appetite for it, even if no hunger - but I will wait for tomorrow.
I needed to get healthy fast because i had an appointment about a small job today. And it worked out just well! I think that must be a quite healthy job, it is housekeeping/maid a few times in the week in a big house where both parents are vets. Very busy, they have their own practice. They have 2 kids. They need someone to help with anything that needs to be done in the house, taking the kids from school, cleaning, laundry, anything. I love that! Working hours are perfect, from 8:30 and never in the evening or weekends. Just a few times / week. 10 minutes drive from here, can ride the bike there too very well. They pay good too. I guess this is a good thing, I am very happy

My ex is so kind to support me with anything I need even if I do not ask him to, but still, to earn money myself was my plan anyways. I also want to buy a tub for the terrace.... and I do not have a bed yet, just sleeping on the floor.. and I want some green plants in here too. I do not want to ask him for that, it is so generous what he gives me anyways!
Well, later i might as well get me a full time job, but for now this is absolute perfect for me

### Inger — 2014-08-11T21:33:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-137577>

so the guy i met on the beach he called again... he had called me twice when I had my cellphone switched off and left me messages to call him. I did not. I did not wanted to. So he called again, i then talked to him and said we can be only friends, nothing more. And i can meet him only a few times / month, no more, as i have lots to do. So he was kind of sad and said he will miss me a lot, he already had missed me. I might be hard hearted but i almost felt a bit nausea from him talking like that. Holy cow.... i guess he must be a person that is not happy with himself? I also do not care if he eat oysters or does anything with me - I want him to do it for HIM, he needs to love himself and do good stuff because of him! IDK but it is not first time i experience that people do stuff because of me, not because they care for them... when I am away they just fall into the old habits. What good does that do?
You cannot live through anyone else... this feels very creepy to me
At least i said it clear and loud what i thought, and i think he got it. I have learned some important lesson. Do not ever call anyone that leaves their number on your car. I should have known that, I realize now. A real man does like Peter - direct contact, that is. I can learn many useful things from Peter I have to say. I am a slow learner and that is when it becomes a bit painful too, darn. Yeah, I was very stupid I can clearly see now.

Well, lets run forward..

### Inger — 2014-08-12T12:17:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-137649>

tonight was the worst thunderstorm i have ever seen in my life... just amazing. It started yesterday evening, I sat and read a book by a red salt lamp and otherwise it was completely dark and i could feel and see every lightning... what a nice evening - i have always loved thunderstorms
In the night I woke up it was that loud! And the could not sleep for a while because of the lightning and thunder. So I slept until 10 AM - and felt just great
And my belly is doing so well, no issues at all anymore! I had a 300 g ribeye steak for brunch... just in case - but for dinner i will have oysters and raw fish again

### Inger — 2014-08-14T15:40:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-137824>

Nice.

I did not know oysters are so high in carbs... and i did not know they are high in cholesterol either! The nutritional advice of CW is to not eat them too often, too unhealthy as they can give you heart disease
who would have known....
I had 11 oysters for breakfast today in the church yard in the morning sun.... so nice

My ex husband keeps saying he wants to move here too. In with me, he misses me. So, I said of course, just come - my home is yours home too - just follow the rules (dark, cold and boring, no crap foods in the house, no TV.. he knows it all already ).
You are welcome into my life, or out of my life, just do not block the doorway

Well, it would be nice to have him in the house to be honest.... for special issues i am not so good to deal with... like the one with the mouse  it ended very sad. I found the mouse behind a door after a few days and 2 legs were broken and the other legs moved so i could see the mouse was alive. It was way too sad i just could not kill the mouse I just could not. I know I should have but my mood have been a bit on the sensible side lately and this was just too much! So i have to wait until my brother comes so he can bury the mouse. I was so angry at my cat how can she make a mouse suffer so bad. But my cat just looked at me with her beautiful, innocent big eyes like she did not understand anything what she has done

I could use some man electrons for sure! He says he might be here in a months or so. It is going to be interesting...

lol Rerun... thought better to eat them close to the graveyard in case i will drop dead.. less work for the community

I am watching the videos on Osteo Josh blog, about bioengineering/chemtrails. It is scary. They sure do them here, I have seen it on hot days on the sky. I even recall the Swedish newspaper in Finland had an article about them some time ago where there was a map which countries do and who do not. Germany was on the do map, Scandinavia was not doing yet.
The video said Russia is trying to do stuff to limit it as it seems... I wonder why Russia is clever in many ways, at least when it comes to the Nature and the Earth? The USA seems to be the opposite... like they care less

i had to stop watching it, just too sad. Going out to watch for the squirrel instead

### Inger — 2014-08-16T12:19:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-138006>

cant stop thinking about how to arrange my future with all this craziness. I think i need to get a camper. That would do for a home.. and then drive to Norway and stay there close to the shore where are plenty of seafood.. and maybe a spring, for water. I could alwasy find a place with no cellphone coverage at all for sleeping... ahhh that would be nice. Would be very cheap living too, I could take jobs here and there - no rent, just electricity and food
But I am broke, have no money at all. I need to talk to my ex about this. He might be willing to do it with me and he might get the funds, after all he is a Jew  and my best friend
It does not need to be a new car, just one that works - should not cost too much... i hope. Might be worth working for a few months too, even as a waitress and later in the evening... temporarily.

This seems like the best thing to do to me now.

### Inger — 2014-08-16T18:24:41+0300

Seems i am not able to get fatter than this. I eat so much... i am shocked myself at times... still mostly 3 meals / day, all pretty big. if i feel like it I even eat a "double dinner" i guess i average around 3000 calories/day and i do no exercise at all. IDK where my good appetite comes from  I do not even CT now i just take short cold showers and dip shortly in the barrel.. say a minute or so. I do face dunks in the morning tho. Sorry my bikini is starting to get old and washed out

Have been thinking about starting walking a bit soon and do some fun stuff outside but so far I just have been relaxing it has been enough (emotional) stress with the moving i can say.....
Very curious if my appetite is going to decrease here eventually... so far no

I just had dinner, a big bowl of fat and meat and blood vessels and other stuff that i did not wanted to have into my high meat... sliced and warmed/sauteed gently in a pan in some grassfed butter, with curcumin... so yummy even if it looked pretty horrible..lol. What a delicious dinner. If I could get off butter I would, but it is hard to find a reliable source of fat, that is not suet (dry, chalky). Love that ... oysters for dessert.

### Inger — 2014-08-21T11:28:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-138433>

Can you get muscle fat, Celeste? I have that in my fridge too, from grassfed beef. It is very delicious raw, thin sliced and eaten plain, it is soft and like a pastry, yum!
But maybe in the USA they use all the fat for the steaks? I know they have different cuts there... here it is hard to find really fatty steaks....

I do eat butter too once in a while.. i really really love the taste. Like candy to me.... i can eat it plain with a spoon - i am so much like my dad, he always do that too.. eat butter by the spoon..haha

I love my new job, i just love it!!! The family is just so kind and lovely, i still cannot believe it makes so much fun to clean someones house and make their laundry etc...haha but it is like i am part of the family now.. and i like that. I like the feeling they have.. i am in love with all of them already...lol she pays me very nicely too!

My brother was here and he helped me so much... he is just too kind! My car did not start one morning when i had to go to work and he drove me with his car and when i finished he had got me a new battery for the car... and changed it for me. He saved me that day - i would have had no clue what to do!

Now I am laying in the church yard on the grass, and it is raining around me, the morning sun is shining too and i am under a big tree so i just get a few drops. Very nice

### Inger — 2014-08-21T14:28:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-138442>

Two things i have experienced again and again and is pretty sure they are true.

1\. HWC (pasteurized, have no access to raw) makes wounds I get walking barefoot heal slower and makes them hurt (inflammation?) Usually they heal so fast and do not hurt...... but HWC changes this. Tells me again it is no good for me

2\. Eating raw increases my awareness.... i am so amazed by this and sometimes I think it might just be my imagination, but again and again i am struck by the difference.... it is a delicate difference but i am 100% sure it is there.
Increased awareness is something very amazing to me..... i even sometimes think, this is how it must feel when one takes magic mushrooms
a little painful at times too because it makes me see how slowly i progress  but i just need to stop watching/compare to how far others have come and it helps

### Inger — 2014-08-27T22:47:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-139063>

Yeah, perhaps, Sally... i cannot wait it to increase even more

Well... so much happening here.

I drove to an island in Denmark yesterday, where the hugest beach in Europe is, me thinks... it was so broad you would have had to walk pretty far to reach the water, so it is allowed to drive the car until the waters edge, which I did, as I saw there was other cars too. I wanted into the water!
Nah.... little did I know the sand is dangerous... and when I started to feel like driving on ice it was too late. I was hopelessly stuck in teh sand, and my car did not move a centimeter anymore. I stepped out of the car and asked some people close, WTH to do... they said I need to find someone with a Jeep to drag me up! Ok, I went for searching and I found! So this muscular bodybuilder rescued me with his Jeep... he looked a lot like Sylvester Stallone but in blonde...LOL We ended up talking for quite a while, and I wanted to pay him but he said no way. So I gave him a big hug as I was so incredibly thankful he had helped me out of my dilemma. He must have liked my hug, as he then said, wait, and went to his car and got his visit card, and said, call me! He even took a second one and throw it in my backseat and said - do not forget! LOL He was sooo kind! But so huge! It felt like hugging a mountain, seriously!  I am sure he has tasted some hormones..uh! He loves to go fishing... and i of course told him about what I have learned from Jack...lol I guess he will be my friend, yay! Maybe i can help him no suffer too bad a fate with his training and lifestyle. He does looked very healthy but I know how bad all that is for his organs... i need to tell him.. slowly. Well, I am not in love, but he was a funny dude and it was nice to talk to him for sure, very nice!

So... my little friend Lena, the 9 yo girl in the neighborhood... she is an ANGEL. She came on my door Monday.. and she wanted to bring me a gift. Guess what it was... as nice small bag with lots of those mini books for children, one was about a black cat (like mine..lol) and then there was some cute small toys and a cute bag for my cellphone - with flowers on. She said she thought i might need that. I was just so moved... how come this little angel wanted to bring me gifts like that.... We sat on my terrace and chatted for quite a while in the evening sun. I love my little Angel girl. She is so thin i am almost scared she will get carried away with the wind.....

I got a cute postcard today from my neighbor in Finland. It moved me so much i just cried. OMG, i just miss my neighbors so much! So heartbreaking to be so far.... but i will send him and his wife a gift for sure. We can love each other forever, even if we do not live close! That old man was special. He always had time to talk. He could not stop! lol but very nice deep thoughts. Very non tech guy - he had a camera that was so old i have never seen anyone use that kind of a camera anymore. It works manually - no battery i think...lol so cute. I have to say honestly I am in love with him too... because we are kind of the same... but a different kind of love

well... many more crazy things have happened too... but to not turn this into too long i will save it for another time... maybe

### Inger — 2014-08-28T19:22:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-139157>

Hi Audrey

I was at my fav beach today and picked over 50 oysters and many were huge! I ate quite some at the beach too. I picked them totally nude walking on the ocean floor... it was low tide and no water at all. It felt like the most amazing way to work, walking nude on wet sand/mud and search for oysters.... in the morning sun.... later i tanned for hours and waited for the water to rise so I could swim. The water was so nice..... i LOVE that beach, it is so silent and no one comes where i pick my treasures at low tide... i am totally alone not one soul to see, and the beach it huge!
I just take water with me, no need for food as I can always eat as many oysters as my heart desire... I still cannot fathom what a lucky girl i am! But i searched this place out so... when you search you will find

My ex husband comes next week, i guess.. he moves in with me..lol he misses me so much! It is going to be so much fun! We will go pick oysters together and do many fun things, he loves all my healthy stuff! And i have a blind date... tuesday.... i am so freaked out! I told my ex about it too! I think i am doing crazy things but i have nothing to lose except some fuel as i have to drive 20 km to that date. Someone successful in life searches for a woman who loves family, and is strong... i thought i do. So i have not spoken to, or even seen a pic of that guy as there is a lady who organizes it all - all i know is he is 40 yo and 182 cm. And a owner of a big company. I think this is really silly and i am sooo freaking nervous but i will learn something for sure. I think very small chances are that anything emerges out of it as i am stone hard with my food and habits. They are weird, i know. I would never give them up fr a man ever. And then... we have to like each other too. Worst scenario is if he likes me and i like him not.... I am thinking way too much.... My ex said maybe he want to remarry me? LOL I said yeah if we fall in love i promise he will have first right...  but not if he continues to think i am fat
I do look forward to my ex coming.
I have no clue what to put on for that blind date...  i guess not too sexy. Oh man i really do not know why i do this! But somehow... i have to start. I do love family, and i have not been thinking to be alone my whole life even if i love to be alone. I so not feel to go to any bars or such as there are always stuff happening in the evening, after 6 PM i am always home and love it to spend the evening in silence.. It might take many years to find a man who accepts a women who eat raw brains and fish head smoothie and rotten heart and who loves to be in the dark and hates wifi and electronics and living in the city. so i thought better start keeping eyes open. So my eyes were open and i saw that message in the local newspaper......... thought it was cool, cooler than internet dating sites.

### Inger — 2014-08-28T21:21:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-139168>

Food today was (typical day for me)

Breakfast; A bowl of raw grassfed beefheart (maybe 300 g) and 1/2 raw onion, some olive oil and balsamic vinegar, 6 oysters

Lunch at the beach, maybe 7 oysters

Dinner was 6 oysters, a whole young coconut (juice and meat), 1 dl raw soaked almonds, 5 organic raspberries, 300 grams of raw wild (frozen and thawed) salmon with 1/2 raw onion and some ACV, a handful of raw organic pistachios, 1/2 cucumber, 5 hibiscus flowers from the garden.

Lots of bottled mineral/spring water...

### Inger — 2014-08-30T11:53:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-139367>

My bosses took me out for dinner yesterday - to an amazing fish buffet! It was just.. wow.....
We had a very nice evening
I ate so much raw salmon and herrings and shrimp, octopus, crab salad... until i could fit no more into my belly. Had a nice glass of Riesling too... very very good. Of course it went way too late.. and i did not put on my blue blockers, i had them in the car as i did not know it will be so late. That was the first night i have gotten blue light in my eyes since many many months. I am very strict with going early to bed and having it dark in the evening
so it was interesting. It was pretty painful and felt weird, that it was dark outside and so much light in the restaurant. At 11 PM i got into the car and put on my blue blockers and drove home.

In the night i dreamed of war.......
the message i got was pretty clear

I found grass fed local Galloway meat on the market as i was shopping for herring and mackerel.. and that is i think the best meat i have ever tasted in my life until yet... just WOW
I talked to the lady and i will get the hearts too
I am so happy

### Inger — 2014-08-31T09:40:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-139453>

Yes, they do Nicole... it really was way better than my expectations - and i am very picky with wine!

Well, i think i need to work on my behavior a little. I am way too spontaneous, no kidding.  I am like a wild troll... and i do not want to be like that! Darn. This is really hard to work on because i am so much in the moment and do forget to think about how i behave and and look to others. I am like a kid but i am an adult. This is not a good thing in my case, i adore people who are disciplined and "collected" in their behavior! Especially here in Germany it would be useful to be better behaved.... Scandinavia is different. You can be pretty wild there and no one thinks it is a bad idea.
I will figure it out.

I had got me some whole herring on the market last week on the way to work and i then asked my boss if I can put the fish in her fridge as long as i work so it does not go bad. She said, of course! May I ask how are you preparing the herring?
I said.. uhm.. it is weird, are you sure you want to know? She said, yes of course, I am sure it tastes good! I said.. no it tastes horrible.
She looked a bit shocked but said oh..haha tell anyway. Her husband stood behind her and said, yeah, tell us!
So I stand there in the kitchen, both vets in front of me.. and start yo tell... how I make a smoothie of the roe and fish milk and fish heads.. and the rest - what I do with it.... oh lala.. they were pretty shocked.....

Yesterday my neighbor asked me to come over for a glass of wine... I said, i rather take water.. so she made me a glass of water, and we sat on her terrace and talked for quite a while. She smoked and drank a beer... Of course I could not keep silent... and in the end she knew about everything that I do. I told her about the toxic blue light... ho to embrace the darkness of winter and what magic it will bring.. She laughed so hard when I told about my eating habits... and what magic oysters and fish heads makes for the mind.. it was pretty funny! She had eaten fried brains many times as a kid! I think she suffers from depressions, because she is in the hospital for many weeks, she is separated from her husband and she said she needs to go back to the hospital tomorrow. I did not ask what she suffers from but I am pretty sure i know. She really really needs to do the Kruse protocols! I told so many things.. and she really liked it, at least it seemed so to me. Lets see... maybe i can help her!
It is not very easy to do it in a sensible way.. as i am not so good in behaving. Way too direct and spontaneous.  I sit weirdly with my legs and forget how to do it in a feminine and proper way i get so excited when i speak to someone  and i need to dress better! That is why I really really need to work on me. So I can help better. I so so want to help this beautiful lady that lives next to me. She is so sweet and kind!

### prAna303 — 2014-08-31T19:39:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-139474>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=139453)
>
> Well, i think i need to work on my behavior a little. I am way too spontaneous, no kidding.  I am like a wild troll... and i do not want to be like that! Darn. This is really hard to work on because i am so much in the moment and do forget to think about how i behave and and look to others. I am like a kid but i am an adult. This is not a good thing in my case, i adore people who are disciplined and "collected" in their behavior! Especially here in Germany it would be useful to be better behaved.... Scandinavia is different. You can be pretty wild there and no one thinks it is a bad idea.
> I will figure it out.
>
> It is not very easy to do it in a sensible way.. as i am not so good in behaving. Way too direct and spontaneous.  I sit weirdly with my legs and forget how to do it in a feminine and proper way i get so excited when i speak to someone  and i need to dress better! That is why I really really need to work on me. So I can help better. I so so want to help this beautiful lady that lives next to me. She is so sweet and kind!

But then again, what if your way of being is more right than the rest?

Just because we visit a social place, do we have to take all parts and make it our own?

I am thinking that many or most of us is suffering because we want to blend in, not stand out. It is a thermodynamic problem once again. Blend in and entropy rise, stand out and it lower itself, who are you? The famous demon...

Okey, perhaps it is just me but i feed on people who are odd, weird and outcasts... The normal does not do anything for me other than run in the other direction. If you do not get accepted for what you are or becoming, do not allow yourself to become them.

In Sweden today, we have lost generation after generation of these odd persons, slowly we see them grow up like flowers in the spring, why? In a lukewarm world of global communication, some start to feel that life has to be lived and not be kept alive. What does this mean to you?

Like i said... Normal by terms of today is bad. You will always have fights with yourself if you try to adapt, the separation from you and the environment will make you ill, always being in a longing state. Rather choose to fight against the world of today because we must, it is an alien place now, filled with aliens.

Is it hard, yes. Will you loose many in your life, yes. But in the end, those who stick will be a part of you forever... Read between those lines, what do we see? Quantum physics once again.

This is such a great subject to discuss because many will need inspiration to be odd, get clues to why we can not do what makes us sick and ill.

### Inger — 2014-09-01T10:30:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-139533>

Peter.... you make me smile again! Maybe it is okay to be a troll
I rather expand my heart and not looking so good on the outside  somehow so far both are a bit hard for me to achieve... so i have to choose the one that feels more important to me for now. yeah i am going to loose something but i am very sure the gains elsewhere will be even bigger. I choose to believe so
You Peter, dear, always encourages me to believe in me... i am so thankful that you exist!

This is a nice piece of Galloway grassfed meat i have in my fridge on a wooden plate, and just slice off slices and eat plain. Oh man it is too delicious! What a yummy fat..mmm..m

My breakfast today. Tiny oysters, wild salmon with onion, ACV and ginger and a tiny bit wild raw honey
everything is wild except the ginger and the onion and the ACV. I had a 1/2 cup of raw organic soaked almonds for dessert too... and am now sipping on my black cardamom coffee

I was swimming in the rain in the sea yesterday... it was very cool  it started to rain so much and i then jumped into the water and thought well, i am now protected from the rain..haha

Today at 4 PM i am going to play football with my new friend Lena, the girl from the neighborhood.
She called me yesterday and we talked on the phone.. she was so cute..lol She will come and pick me up  I cannot believe how lucky I am to have her to my friend

Now off to read the new blog......

### Inger — 2014-09-03T09:31:02+0300

Notsoperfick, I ate some samphire with raw grassfed Galloway meat slices.. just those 2 things nothing else.. it was divine...........

Well... my date could not turn me on
He does looked good, if he had only been healthier... but he was a bit overweight, i did not like his scent either - it was like "old man" scent (sign of unhealthy body?)
I had the feeling i was a feather exploding from energy and he was a slow.. heavy rubber stone.... but he was very kind, and we talked a lot! I told him about everything i do.. and he constantly said.. oh man.. the Norwegians are tough.... LOL but he was open to do it all... cool what! He has a farm.... and really a nice kind of guy but so no hormones....  I told him he needs to lay in his yard nude and eat raw fish and oysters! He laughed and said oh yes he will do that..lol He was older than it said in the newspaper.. 53. I thought he should be 40? He looked way older than 53. My ex is 54 and looks way way younger and has lots of energy and a great gait, very manly! But this guys gait was horrible
He seemed to like me a lot even if i told him i dig out brains from lambs skulls and eat raw  kind of hard to scare away men. IDK what to do now, he wanted to see me again.. maybe i can just be his friend?
He seemed to dislike to be alone... and seemed to think he can only be happy and "having a life" with a partner... at least that is what he spoke about. that was a red card to me

He would never have contacted me in real life i am sure.. men who get interested in me are hormone bombs normally... that is the bad thing with those dates. You just do not get the natural attraction - it is made artificial... but sure if one does many of them it could all of a sudden happen to be a match! hmmm... but just too time consuming for me at this point. I just am not so desperate at all for a man. It might just happen spontaneously too. I like that way better. Maybe me and my ex fall in love too, who knows.. life is pretty magic!

### fitness@home — 2014-09-03T20:29:26+0300

Inger, it sounds like he wasn't totally honest with his newspaper ad. Bummer but at least you had the courage to find out .

Flip side of this coin is that sometimes you _do_ meet someone worth dating. Met my DH thru an online dating site in 2004 and married in 2009. It took a few dates before I felt any sparks, but he was intelligent (a must have) and fun. His profile was pretty accurate too; i.e., no tall tales  .

### Inger — 2014-09-03T21:15:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-139839>

I know what what was wrong. I thought about it today when i was at the beach.. I do not care too much about age or outlook, really. Jack was a fat guy too and look what he is now
But that man totally lacked PASSION.
Yeah. I am a very passionate girl myself.. i get so excited about almost anything.... often get euphoric feeling when i am just alone. I just could not fall in love with any man that lacks passion.. it just does not work - how much i try
I had to tell him how to forgive family members that had hurt him, he just had not been able to - his outlook was so so different than mine. He does listened and got it, still he was lacking energy...
I am NOT going to take a man that i have to drag up. No way. I want a man that drags me - or we both drag each other
The man needs to be stronger. I need a stronger man than me, or it is not going to feel right at all... that is what my belly tells me! If not such a person exist, yeah then i will be by my own, no problem. I am super happy alone too, I have an amazing life    I was picking oysters again today nude in the morning sun... and before, as the water was still high, i CT a bit and danced around in the water. Crabs kissed my feet gently.... I embraced the ocean.... all i could see on the horizon was the sky and the water... what a magic... no one was there. only me on the whole beach, so huge
i felt so much joy i was about to burst
On the way home on the bike I stopped and picked more samphire
This is such an amazing place to heal. I still cannot believe it. It is all Jacks fault I am in heaven now. THANK YOU JACK.......... he has shown me what to look for and what not to look for. I am forever thankful - and i have this urge to pay it forward... it is why i tell it to everyone i see. I want them to feel as good as I do too

### Inger — 2014-09-10T17:11:00+0300

I am a little swollen now...hahaha.. I eat so much Roquefort, organic raw Salami, and drink Bordeaux... (do not tell WinterMermaid  i am not supposed to eat dairy now! But I do it on purpose, not because i crave it - I do not crave it one bit BWT, weird? but we are making great great progress... she is starting to get that me and the ex has a very special relationship, and her fears are diminishing    , that I want her only good, nothing else! I would never EVER try to take him away from her! She needs him.... I know......... we just talked on the speaker phone all three, and we laughed a lot....lol
I love this  I love life    so anxious to meet her and the girl  She is so beautiful and I LOVE her voice...lol the kid is amazing too, so so clever!!!

### Inger — 2014-09-15T15:02:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-141065>

Little did I know it will hurt so bad.

The ex;s girlfriends and her amazing kid left.. after spending 2 days with me. The girlfriend is gorgeous... just amazingly beautiful......
the kid... a 7 yo girl, she saw me first time in her life and she wanted to sleep over... unbelievable. She refused to sleep in the hotel close to here, with them, but wanted to stay by me, alone. She slept close to me in my bed, and in my arms.... she wanted to stay here too - forever! She is such a clever and gorgeous kid.
but man, if I had known how much it will hurt to spend time with my ex husbands new family I would certainly not have done it. After they left I could nothing but cry cry cry
I wonder why kids fall in love with me? She wanted to be with me all the time
I must have regressed into childhood again

But I am going to make this work. I do not care if it hurts.
I want them to be happy, the kid loves my ex too - when he does not drink. He does not now. She deserves to have a dad and get all the love she need so desperately!
I am finished now. I gave all I could, it was not much. But again... time heals any wound.

### Inger — 2014-09-15T15:26:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-141067>

it is like the kid sensed my hidden pain. She wanted to be close to me all the time... and i am a stranger to her......
i am in awe

### notsoperfick — 2014-09-16T15:38:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-141152>

Maybe the child finds herself in the middle of a strange relationship in which she struggles, mother in love with a man the child may or may not embrace, a man who you say drinks who may appear to like the child because he wants to be with the mother but who's deeper feelings aren't so warm for her? Being able to stay with you gave her a break, a sort of haven with no one requiring anything from her, maybe it wasn't your pain she felt but her own? You were safe as you made no demands.

Children pick up on such a lot that adults miss or just simply ignore. I think the whole situation is an odd one, a story being played out in chapters, who knows what the plot will be or how it all ends? One thing that always seems to happen is that it is the child who is left struggling emotionally because of the lack of attachment both from it to the adults and from the adults to it, 7 years old is such a sensitive age.

### Inger — 2014-09-16T22:15:54+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-141192>

> [notsoperfick said:](/goto/post?id=141152)

> Maybe the child finds herself in the middle of a strange relationship in which she struggles, mother in love with a man the child may or may not embrace, a man who you say drinks who may appear to like the child because he wants to be with the mother but who's deeper feelings aren't so warm for her? Being able to stay with you gave her a break, a sort of haven with no one requiring anything from her, maybe it wasn't your pain she felt but her own? You were safe as you made no demands.
>
> Children pick up on such a lot that adults miss or just simply ignore. I think the whole situation is an odd one, a story being played out in chapters, who knows what the plot will be or how it all ends? One thing that always seems to happen is that it is the child who is left struggling emotionally because of the lack of attachment both from it to the adults and from the adults to it, 7 years old is such a sensitive age.

Well, it was pretty heartbreaking how the child shared her fears with me.... Yeah, she hates when he drinks (but she loves my ex when he is sober - he loves her too, dearly! It is funny to watch them...lol. My ex have always loved children very much, more than most. He truly has a golden heart), and also her mother does it at times, she gets uneasy when drinking too much and they start fighting then.. But my ex have not been drinking lately at all, he cant as he have decided to take the pill that makes drinking any alcohol very dangerous. She always asks if he has taken the pills! I talked to her about many things... she seems to trust me deeply. I told her I will do anything I can that she will be safe and happy, and I will. She is gorgeous. I start to think, all children are

She reorganized my bedroom that looked no good as I have no bed yet (got it today) and no place to put my clothes yet too, just boxes everywhere.. but she made it all into a beautiful place, I was truly in awe. She fixed and built me a couch from pillows too by the bed, so I can rest there if I want to...... and a nice little paper cottage... and many other things... I got the very cute hedgehog she had bought her in Hamburg... she gave it to me. And I know it was dear to her! It is so soft... she put it on my pillow...
As they left she said to her mom all the time, mom I want to stay by aunt Inger... please..
I think she liked it so much because I played with her, and I was outside with her in the nature, swimming in the lake, and in my barrel... she loved it... we fed the goldfishes in the pond and all kind of stuff

I have no clue how this story will end to be honest.... but whatever happens I am going to do my best. My ex tells me repeatedly, he can only feel really home and relaxed by my place/with me... weird too.
I have some power and I am going to use what I have. Children always come first in my world.... i cannot help it
they are just so vulnerable
I have talked so much to my ex about how she has gotten hurt and her fears.. and I think he really gets it now. And he will talk to her mom. I think all will be very good in the end, I am sure about it!

My heart is breaking a bit because of my other little friend the neighbor girl. She tried to introduce me to her mom but it went no well. Her mom actually got angry. She does not want her daughter to have me as her friend... she finds me weird. That I have a weird life. She is not allowed to come to my place at all... but she still comes. Secretly. She calls me by the phone too, often. Land line.. when her mom does not listen. She is not allowed to go with me to the lake nearby either. I told her to ask her mom to go with her but the kid said her mom never want to. She is only inside reading newspapers etc. I think to the mom I am very weird, because I play outside with children and run barefoot all the time. So she might be scared of me? It hurts for sure. I feel so much pain for that girl.... she so longs to go swimming but her mom will not let her.
Man... this world is so weird. It is way too sad. Why are people scared for the good? And why... oh why.. don't they want to spend time with their children?

But not many are like her mom I think. At least my landlords and my neighbor lady are very nice and fun people. And I live close to them... makes me very lucky

### notsoperfick — 2014-09-17T19:58:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-141273>

One reason children like you is possibly because you can give them your undivided attention and are happy to do fun things with them. In a world where everyone is so busy, parents never seem to have quite enough time for their children. It's not surprising that they will gravitate toward someone who not only seems happy to see them but actively encourages them to stay and play a while. This will be magnetic for a child who feels a bit pushed out at home, Mum always busy and telling the child they don't have time to take them for a swim/a walk/a cycle ride etc. Plus you are kind to them, positive toward them, what's not for them to like? The downside of course is the busy mum suddenly starts to feel annoyed that their child prefers to be out with someone they hardly know, it makes them feel pushed to one side even though it's their own "fault". In essence, you're getting the fun bits which you're happy with because it's all the fun and none of the hard work of having children. Parents are the ones who apply the discipline and the boundaries, you I'll bet aren't telling them off or remonstrating with them in any way. You're like a favourite aunt, they can have a great time with you because you are interesting and different and carefree simply because you don't have the same heavy responsibilities that make their parents much less fun to be around.

Mum/Dad isn't so pleased because they tell themselves that's what they'd love to be doing that too if only they had the time. You appear as both a threat and reminder that they are short changing their children. They can't be rational about it because then they'd have to admit their own shortcomings in not spending enough time with their kids. It doesn't surprise me that she has stopped her little girl coming round, she doesn't want her child liking you more than her, perfectly understandable but hardly the right approach as she will have a bored child on her hands again instead of the happier one she could see her turning into. The fact that you have a completely different lifestyle will be the perfect excuse to keep her away, you're not dangerous, just "strange".
