### kovita — 2015-01-13T16:04:00+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-152641>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=152388)
>
> Thanks, Hope
> now you need to visit me and come eat in the restaurant
> it is wild and windy here
>
> Well... the oysters here are wild.... i have to search them myself... and that is so cool  But... I actually did not mean to say the oysters were so different, just i can have more of them here... and i get fresh Atlantic herring and mackerel.. and other fishes too, wildcaught... that i could not (or barely) get in Finland...... and salmon is cheaper, I get wildcaught frozen salmon here very cheap so i can eat a lot of that  the best is the herring for sure... dirt cheap and sooo full of DHA! I had a huge smoothie with herring heads, soaked seaweed-water and herring fish milk and roe yesterday before going to work. And for dessert 150 grams of gravlax (raw cured salmon). That was at 4 PM and after that i had nothing.....
>
> Well.. there is a lot to improve on this body still...lol but i feel great i have to say.... like a 10 yo
> I do quite a bit of IF lately i realize.... mostly my last meal is at 4-5 PM.. and first meal (except the fat coffee in the morning) anywhere between 11 and 2 PM. I am not pushing anything tho.. and a few days i have been eating at 7:30 PM  but i really try to avoid that. It is easy to stop eating in the evenings when you make it to a habit! As soon as i do one later meal i want it the next day too... but if I say, no, today no more food... it goes away. Weird! I eat as much as i want when i do eat.... the other day I had 700 grams of raw fish in a 4 hour window...... + butter.....lol

last few weeks I was able to finally go and pick my own oysters straight from the sea. There was a little saline channel and lake very near to the place we stayed during our holidays. I originally wanted to take a bath there, but realized the bottom and sides are completely covered by oysters so there was no way to walk in without cutting out my feet. It felt great however easy it was to pick them because they were everyehere. I noticed a difference in the taste comparing to farmed oysters (they undergo cleaning phase before going to the table). The wild ones had strong ocean smell and taste and a lot of dirt inside. I think these just matched the perfect pregnancy diet well ;-)

### Inger — 2015-01-16T22:00:28+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-153046>

I got a letter from one of my sisters today... it made me so happy! Looks like what i have talked about (dangers of EMF) has been to help after all
Big thanks to Jack again who has shine his flashlight for us...... it is helping more people than he can imagine i guess...

Now... they lived in a pretty bad EMF place even if right by the sea.... and they were not feeling good/healthy at all. Now she told me they have moved to a wooden house far into the woods...
nearest cell tower is 5 km away...... no wifi no neighbors... house is by a lake where they go fishing

and... they are feeling SO MUCH BETTER!!!
They in fact feel just amazing now, she writes me! And only change is location....... this is my second sister that has done this move.. and had the exact same experience................
HUGE difference in health... immediately

I am SO proud of my siblings... I just LOVE them all

### Inger — 2015-01-23T17:14:07+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-153700>

> [Hope said:](/goto/post?id=153614)
>
> Hi Inger....are you OK? I read some breadcrumb the other day and truly hope you're OK....thinking of you.
>
> ((((((((Hugs)))))))

Hope...  yeah.. I am doing just fine now.. actually pretty amazing
I have gone through some darn hard days/weeks.. very hard! But hey.. life was not ment to be easy...lol
That would be boring, true, no?
I know i will figure it out and I did  I am now flying again  I am alone but i am not alone...  that is the Magic of life, the Quantum Magic! Alway when i go into the Quantum state... (and i quite often do..lol) then I feel so good nothing can tear me down!

\- - - - -

So I was thinking about the wild herbs i love to eat in the woods... i ate a LOT yesterday again and I just CRAVED them! I wondered if they have a lot of biophotons in them? I watched the Video Jack posted... Alexander Popp, the son of Friz Popp, was lecturing.. about biophotons.. and what he said in there made me think...... a lot! Wild herbs... in natural, wild surroundings.... picked freshly from the ground directly into the mouth... they must be full of biophotons... which are very healing!!! So that is why they help People so much? I know quite a bit about the raw vegan community.. and many do very bad long term... BUT. I know a few that do very well.. and they all eat LOTS of wild greens.... despite of being vegans eating some amount of fruit year round... The wild green harvesting takes you out in the wild too.... double plus.

There was a tiny little bit of snow out there too.. and i just had to eat it.... just licked it sraight off the moss on the ground... it was so yummy! I went to the lake.. it was frozen.. and it was so magic in the sulight as the sun set.. there was a lot of art on the surface... frozen art.. all Kind of the most beautiful figures, they were all so organized, lots of triangles and rectangular figures... wow. I have no clue how is it possible that they can appear!

### Inger — 2015-01-23T17:20:29+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-153702>

I was at work today and cleaned the oven for my boss.. and as i clean i always think a lot..lol
I thought about how stupid it is to cook... your food. Or at least it seems very stupid to me!

First... it taste no good... raw is way better and juicier and vibrating
And... you get no dirty and greasy ovens that needs to be cleaned with some chemicals that hurt the nature..... you save lots of time as you can just rinse everything off with hot water and it is clean
You get more nutrients.. more Sulfur... more biophotons.. cause heating destroys many things....
you get more time to spend with your Kids... you save electricity... you save Money... you get less EMF!

The ex husband tells me he eats almost all his fish raw now..lol he just loves it! He makes his own cured salmon and made himself raw tuna carpaccio today  His girlfriend and the kid loves to eat salom chevice... they eat it all the time now
So cool

### Inger — 2015-01-23T21:09:25+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-153710>

Well..... I have a issue I guess... I want to see the good more than anything else............ and my hormones are very much alive too...... this combo.... it can be dangerous

Now... I still love the boyfriend... I am also not an easy chick... to be honest. I am drinking fish head smoothies... hello? Not talking about... I hate to watch TV.... i always want to be outside... dipping in lakes etc. I very very much understand this is not easy.
I am scarred too.

I will not be able to fulfill his expectations...

It does not feel much like he is valuing me. But I understand him... why he is like that... I do. I can see through it all.... above it all. It is kind of weird! It is very weird...lol
My belly does was unsure the whole time.... there was this tiny feeling that did not gave me peace
I am very thankful to the boyfriend cause I have learned many things from him too! Good things  I still love him so much. I will always help him if he needs my help. He can come visit me if he likes., this is my home and my rules..lol I know he have done the best he is able to.. I think so. It is just such a different world he lives in. It feels so foreign to me. I do not want that kind of world i think. I can see where he is going... and it hurts to see.... I need to go my own way. I am not alone. I have friends. I have family. I have you here on the forum.. you mean a LOT to me! I have the ex husband. He always supports me and trusts me I know what is good for me. It feels very good

### Inger — 2015-01-23T21:19:18+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-153711>

It has been very hard to come to where I am now, but I am coming out of the other side of the tunnel.....
I am going to face the truth does not matter how inconvenient it is. Sure it hurts. But that is life. The pain will go away and joy will come instead....

I am not going to compromise my health ever. Small compromises can be ok... but I know where is the limit. I sure can feel that

### nicld — 2015-01-23T22:35:57+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-153721>

Did you have some fun in the relationship?

At least now you know more of what you want and what you don't, so I say the relationship was successful even if the ending did not turn the way you might have hoped.

You are such a star fish that at some point, you will find someone who shares the same ideas as you at the right time.

### caroline — 2015-01-23T23:38:13+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-153722>

Many life lessons every single day that we take each breath ...we are the lucky ones...lets make no mistake about that.

We have come such a long way ..... I don't even think MHS are weird at all......LOL

Maybe that is the thing .... all of this feels so right ...how could we ever turn back? ....There is no going back!

We need to place the highest value on ourselves ...and of course and without question - others in our life must
do the same for us and themselves. There is no alternative to respect and love and kindness. That definitely is a door that swings both ways! When we have that - we have everything!

This is just another baby step Inger on our road to optimal ....Jack never promised us a rose garden! There is always lots of background noise in our life. We are so much stronger and so much more alive and the background noise is just that - in the background. We have learned to listen to the beautiful music in our lives ...and it is simply awesome!

We are going to the Opera house today to see the movie "The Artist" it is a silent movie that was done in 2011.
The Sydney Symphony is playing the music score.

I can't wait to be a part of this ...to see how music advances life ...no talking necessary!

xoxo

### Inger — 2015-01-24T12:18:46+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-153755>

> [nicld said:](/goto/post?id=153721)
>
> Did you have some fun in the relationship?
>
> At least now you know more of what you want and what you don't, so I say the relationship was successful even if the ending did not turn the way you might have hoped.
>
> You are such a star fish that at some point, you will find someone who shares the same ideas as you at the right time.

Yes.. Nicole.. I did have fun too  sure. I so would have hoped it to work out otherwise but i could not ignore the weird feeling I got. That said i still sometimes think there is something wrong with me but how comes i got those weird scary feelings.
I will explain some stuff..... he has guns. I was a bit shocked at first.. this is Germany, people do not have guns here except if they are hunters.. he is not. He has them in the bedroom, the office.. the kitchen... when i asked why he said because of security reasons. He has so much of value at his place, that is why. I though... ok.. reasonable. still i did not really understand, I hate guns. They make me feel unsafe. I live here.. alone.. and i sleep in the horsebarn that has no locks at all on the door.. when i sleep inside i have windows open anyone could come in easily. He was shocked about that when he visited. He said it is dangerous. He said i need to be careful when I am out in the woods too. And it is not safe to dip nude in the lake.. someone can wait behind the trees and want to hurt me. I never had those thoughts ever here. I feel very safe.. i am not one bit afraid to be alone in the woods. There are animals... deers.. birds... the trees and the sky, it is beautiful! I sometimes meet people there but they are all nice, we talk, and they are my friends! Maybe I am very naive?
Still... I do not understand his fears. So at his house it felt so weird.. he lives on the countryside, very safe place, nice neighbors... i could see no danger at all.
The turning point came one evening as I was in the shower... and he was still working... i was in the shower wanted to go to bed.. and all of a sudden i got overwhelmed with fear.. i got this weird feeling he has put a bomb of some sort on my bedside... I then told myself.. WTH are you thinking you are crazy!!! What is up with your brain! You are totally out of your mind, girl. I then decided to go to bed anyways but I had to watch under the blanket to make sure there was nothing
I was so worried why i got that kind of feeling in the first place. It is NOT normal for me. And i got than in a big luxurous house that was armed with cameras and guns and security stuff...... but it felt like a prison.... i just got the feeling i need to come out of here! I forced my thought into another direction but after that i started to realize i cant make it. I decided it was my unconscious that wanted to tell me something.
Maybe I am all crazy. Maybe I just got too little sleep...... maybe .. but when i came home i was so relieved. I felt so safe!
too weird huh.

He has them in the bedroom, the office.. the kitchen... when i asked why he said because of security reasons. He has so much of value at his place, that is why. I though... ok.. reasonable. still i did not really understand, I hate guns. They make me feel unsafe. I live here.. alone.. and i sleep in the horsebarn that has no locks at all on the door.. when i sleep inside i have windows open anyone could come in easily. He was shocked about that when he visited. He said it is dangerous. He said i need to be careful when I am out in the woods too. And it is not safe to dip nude in the lake.. someone can wait behind the trees and want to hurt me. I never had those thoughts ever here. I feel very safe.. i am not one bit afraid to be alone in the woods. There are animals... deers.. birds... the trees and the sky, it is beautiful! I sometimes meet people there but they are all nice, we talk, and they are my friends! Maybe I am very naive?
> Still... I do not understand his fears. So at his house it felt so weird.. he lives on the countryside, very safe place, nice neighbors... i could see no danger at all.
> The turning point came one evening as I was in the shower... and he was still working... i was in the shower wanted to go to bed.. and all of a sudden i got overwhelmed with fear.. i got this weird feeling he has put a bomb of some sort on my bedside... I then told myself.. WTH are you thinking you are crazy!!! What is up with your brain! You are totally out of your mind, girl. I then decided to go to bed anyways but I had to watch under the blanket to make sure there was nothing
> I was so worried why i got that kind of feeling in the first place. It is NOT normal for me. And i got than in a big luxurous house that was armed with cameras and guns and security stuff...... but it felt like a prison.... i just got the feeling i need to come out of here! I forced my thought into another direction but after that i started to realize i cant make it. I decided it was my unconscious that wanted to tell me something.
> Maybe I am all crazy. Maybe I just got too little sleep...... maybe .. but when i came home i was so relieved. I felt so safe!
> too weird huh.

Totally see where you are coming from. You followed your gut even if it hurt the heart a bit and that does take bravery and a whole lot of smarts.

### Inger — 2015-01-24T20:24:26+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-153774>

well.. Nicole.. i am not smart and my head has to work twice as much to figure stuff out as normal heads..  so that is why my brain is on overdrive all the time  maybe why i need so many fish head smoothies too
but my gut is pretty sensible, yes. Weird.
so now how to figure out how to finish stuff nicely and that is not easy. I am not the one who leaves anyone who want to be with me.. i hate divorces and always did. So instead i will just go in my direction and do no compromises anymore and think forward.... i know stuff will resolve nicely  and no one will get hurt  I know i will know what to do when i face the challenges. It is going to be fine, everything will be fine in the end  I just need to steer my thoughts that is all...

you are so smart to listen to your gut. your gut is always right....

so I forgive her eating so expensive food

### fitness@home — 2015-01-29T03:44:46+0200

>

>
>  There are a few items I am going to try...

Inger, I tried the AlkaBath tonight in a hot bath. It was heavenly. When I got home from work my muscles were tight and tense. Not anymore... It definitely helped. My skin also feels very silky.

Purchased some 100% cotton leggings and a pair of extra long leg warmers (my substitute for the stockings). Going to play with this product for a while. Will let you know later what I think.

### Inger — 2015-02-06T20:23:58+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-154916>

@ Hope2Learn, I am definitely not wise,  but I will be one day, sooner or later... I am working on it

@ Dawn, so cool you tried the AlkaBath , it really is relaxing, I have no idea how it works but it does . Also it really makes the skin soft and not dry
It is awesome in summer over night when it is hot and the legs tend to get swollen a bit.... I guess I need to take my socks and salt with me to the Cruise... LOL you too?  not too sexy looking but who cares  we can have our own salt socks party...hehehe....

\- - - -

I just paid my ticket to New Orleans the 19th June..... now it is for real

I was with my 9 yo friend Lena in the woods having a dance party on the big hay bales in that old barn.... she had music with her and we danced and danced. She told me she needs to get some work to save some money for stuff she needs and i said well, you can give me dance lessons out here, 1 hour a few bucks  and she really liked that  So now we will be having dance lessons on the hay bales..lol i really enjoy it  I told her she can help me find firewood in the woods when the snow melts too, and she will earn a few bucks from that too.. and she was all in  She really is a gift from the Gods I must say  She helps me spend more time outside, how cool and how good for both of us! I was walking at the sunset for a hour too in the woods and the sunset was amazing, bloody red aganst the white snow........
so beautiful.....
At work everyone is sick around me... coughing and having the cold.... lets see if it catches me  I am feeling really great and have lots of energy tho
I can feel how very important my daily walks in the woods are.. it is like in winter it is crazy important to spend time oustide! Like.. that is really healing time...

### Inger — 2015-02-06T20:57:07+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-154923>

Dawn... come to think about it.. when you have that AlkaBath salt, try to mix a bit with raw honey and use as a face wash/peeling/mask.. it is awsome! After that, put some avocado or eggyolk on your face, you need just a little bit - like smearing a cream on it, and let sit for a while... rinse.. even more awesome

### Inger — 2015-02-06T21:00:18+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-154925>

if you have tartar buildup on your teeth... brushing with the AlkaSalt will get rid of it
you can dip your moist toothbrush in AlkaSalt, then drop some hydrogen peroxide on it..... and brush.. nice and foamy  teeth feels Super clean

### kovita — 2015-02-09T16:29:22+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-155137>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=153710)
>

>
> Now... I still love the boyfriend... I am also not an easy chick... to be honest. I am drinking fish head smoothies... hello? Not talking about... I hate to watch TV.... i always want to be outside... dipping in lakes etc. I very very much understand this is not easy.
> I am scarred too.
>
> I will not be able to fulfill his expectations...

> It does not feel much like he is valuing me. But I understand him... why he is like that... I do. I can see through it all.... above it all. It is kind of weird! It is very weird...lol
> My belly does was unsure the whole time.... there was this tiny feeling that did not gave me peace
> I am very thankful to the boyfriend cause I have learned many things from him too! Good things  I still love him so much. I will always help him if he needs my help. He can come visit me if he likes., this is my home and my rules..lol I know he have done the best he is able to.. I think so. It is just such a different world he lives in. It feels so foreign to me. I do not want that kind of world i think. I can see where he is going... and it hurts to see.... I need to go my own way. I am not alone. I have friends. I have family. I have you here on the forum.. you mean a LOT to me! I have the ex husband. He always supports me and trusts me I know what is good for me. It feels very good

Inger, it can be difficult even for your husband. It is still being sometimes painfull with my husband since I am changing so much everything that was ever thruth about me. I so understand you. I too experience a LIFE I always dreamt about, ia m happy and I need almost mothing at all to be this way... frankly, it is not very usual to be around people like this... Of two want to be together they have to respect and accept everything about each other and if you do not want the TV and want to be naked in the lake in the coldest day of the winter, it devinitely requires someone very openminded. Sometimes I find myslef in the same situation, my husband wants to watch movie sometimes and stay at home instead of going to freeze his ass outside...sometimes it is me who must be more tolerant, but luckily he is changing much more to my direction than myslef to his direction ;-)

### Inger — 2015-02-10T10:35:21+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-155193>

Well... I quit the job.
Maybe I am so out of my mind, and I thought that was such a nice restaurant and it was! BUT. There was something very off! My belly told me already from the beginning....... but i wanted to be sure. So Sunday at work I got very sure, I cant stay here, OMG! No. So I told my boss I just do not fit in there. She was so surprised and wanted to talk and we sat down and i tried to tell her gently.. it was SO freaking hard. But I did it. OMG... these things are very hard for me! Cause i did not wanted to hurt her either and I know she really wants me to work there. So in the end we shaked hands and she said I can come back anytime and it was pretty moving moment where our hearts touched... and i cried in the car at my way home but I am so glad i did it. I am so happy now, it felt so right!
The boss was not completely honest..... that was one of the reasons i could not stay. She filled spring water bottles with tap water and sells full price... I felt so bad about bringing that crap water to the guests that for sure thought they were drinking nice gerolsteiner spring water... no no i cant work like that.
I am now looking for the next place, I know i will find something way better

And as you did, ae as well did get fed up with lies and dishonesty. it is not easy to be a honest person. most of the people Sucumb to lies every now and than, because everybody else does and if you do not you are making yourself a fool ;-)

### Hope — 2015-02-10T21:07:22+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-155272>

How sad about the job, Inger - that this woman does this. It kills me, in a way. She has a great business, I am sure...makes great money...and it is not enough........whew. Crazy stuff.

I wish I could come on the cruise......but not this year. I will be with you in spirit. More on that later.

Wanted to share with you I ordered your lovely Jentschura products from the company Sally found in Canada. I also spoke to the guy who owns it for some questions - I hate my water here, so chlorinated - so now I cannot WAIT!! to try everything. I will be thinking of you when I do it...and wishing I could purchase them at the German prices....so much less than here!  I love that the bath salts are made of precious stones!!

He also said something I didn't know - our feet are the third kidneys....whew.

Big hug to you......ANY place would want you, Inger.....

### Inger — 2015-02-10T22:13:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-155276>

Hope... it is kinda cool but I do not feel one bit sad about the job.. instead I feel like it was a super interesting challenge for me that I managed through
IDK what is up to my mind lately but I am flying... like.. come on world, give me challenges, I will face them all, I am not scared...... i just love it
I am not even doing things perfect at all. I just do not get it but I take it
I am feeling kinda high - but my life is just quite chaos...lol But it is like the chaos does not bother me that much at all........
OMG.. maybe I AM chaos.. that is why it feels good......
I was sprinting a little on my walk in the woods today, but only 4 times. I have no rules... I can sprint only 1 if I feel like.... or not at all....... i actually have very little rules in my life
but i like my rules that I have  the rules about light and dark... and there are a few more but just a few

Hugs to you too Hope..... who knows maybe there happens a wonder and you still show up on the cruise    the we could speak German

\- - - -

The ice has melted on my tiny lake in the woods... I could not resist to undress and jump into it.... i took a short swim.... man it was divine
and i got to eat lots of wild greens again as the snow has melted. YUM

Just read this on Jacks facebook site...

> Everybody is standing, but you must stand out. You should handle adversity well enough and have stamina long enough to breakthrough your cloud cover to see the light.
> **The light was always there**, your environment just blocks it. Every challenge you encounter in life is a fork in the road.
> You have the choice to choose which way to go either backward, forward, breakdown or breakthrough

and this too... exactly what has been on my mind lately.. how weird

> There is no avoidance in delay. Delay is not always denial or procrastination. Delay can bring more success.
> So when we are faced with a delay, instead of being frustrated to the point of throwing in the towel or stop trying - pause to ask the question.
> What is my opportunity here? The interval can bring about the chance to review a plan and make changes if necessary;
> it may even be the case that there is peace of mind in concluding that a plan is good enough to remain in place -
> But the most significant purpose is the chance to be better prepared to crush it.

and a little iodine on my boobs...
and some hydrogen peroxide too

and.......lol

> and.......lol

That is awesome, Inger - about how you feel about life, meeting it etc.......and everything. That is just so cool that you went swimming. I am not there yet that is for sure. But I shall one day!

That's great about the socks. I can't wait to get mine and try them. How do you wash them in the morning? I am glad they send you two sets because I am not sure one pair would dry by the evening...but we'll see.

We have had lots of cloudiness the last few days, and now brilliant sunshine - I am always amazed at much I crave sunshine!!

Hugs back to you

### Inger — 2015-02-13T21:31:13+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-155548>

I just rinse them well in hot water... and the use them again, once in a while I wash them in the wash machine too.
I lately have put on a pair of tighter wool socks on the top of the long wool socks to make it tighter, they are a little loose on my feet

I am no CT queen, that is doe sure...lol I am a very spontaneous CTer
My CT is as little as;

A few face dunks here and there
Ice cold rinses after my hot showers, every day at least once, mostly twice (I love showers...)
A minute dip in the rain barrel on my terrace most days
Very cold bedroom but I have warm covers
Walks in the woods
Once in a while a dip in the lake

Very gentle and easy CT. But I feel so amazing. I have never felt so good! I am starting to think this is a very healthy place to live.....
I am just about at sea level. Close to me in the woods is the only "mountain" in north Germany where I live... and it is 40 meters high...LOL
I guess where I live is 1 to 2 meters above sea level? I have the Atlantic on the west side, 10 km away, and the Baltic Sea on the east side, 20 km away.
I was i the woods yesterday and I just got amazed at how beautiful the fir trees looked. They were so green, perfectly healthy, like unreal beautiful.
Made me think.... the air here must be very clean... and full of minerals from the sea... the earth must be rich of nutrients too.
I can buy pastured eggs, fertilized eggs (I believe these are way better than unfertilized) and the hens are on green pastured close to the shore that are so rich of minerals.
Those are amazing eggs! One day I had 8 yolks with 4 TBSP butter and 1/2 teaspoon raw honey... for dessert! Gosh that is so yummy... fatty egg yolk cream.... I am crazy I eat so much fat.... and so much food, but I do not get fat? I guess all the stuff just goes into hormones cause I feel my hormones are boiling as never before. haha... it is funny. I wonder if the MSM helps too....... cause I take 1-2 TBSP of it every day since the end of last year.

One day I was doing errands... I was on the road... had to drive a bit and change the oil in my car. So I bought me food to eat on the road, 200 g Roquefort (raw sheep milk cheese), 100 grams of organic salami, 150 grams of raw, graved salmon. Ate it all. Had some grass fed butter with the salami... I make rolls... put lots of butter inside and roll the salami around... yum. I know.. I am quite the pig  Next day I though my fingers had turned into sausages....lol They were so swollen!
Must have been all the salt. All 3 products contained table salt.
But in the evening they looked pretty normal again and next they they were totally normal. Regular table salt makes me retain water, sea salt does not. Weird!

Today I had 100 grams of butter in my morning coffee, and after that maybe 300 gram raw herring, for breakfast before work (8 AM).
For late lunch (2 PM) some celery (discovered organic celery in the shop and wanted to try and I really like ..have not had that it a long time!) plain, 6 egg yolks whipped with butter and 1/2 teaspoon raw honey, 3 egg whites that I just drank raw, I like that too, and 80 grams of dried coconut flakes, and for early dinner (4:30 PM) cooked fresh mussels. I need to do them more often! Man was they good, just plain like that, just cooked in little water a few minutes. I get one kg for less than 3 € = one meal. It is super cheap! Not raw... I do not like them raw... but they are great cooked too, makes me feel great

### Inger — 2015-02-23T16:46:13+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-156386>

I LOVE lamb liver. I did not get any for a while so I broke down and got me some chicken liver from pastured hens... from the farmers market where I get my Galloway hears too. Just had about 200 grams as a starter for dinner, very gently sauteed in some butter, but just a minute so they were totally raw inside. Main course was mussels

I still prefer lam livers way more..... I need to find some. I have had cravings of liver lately. I was on the road one day... and made a stop at a shop I drove by that was selling organic home made beef/pigs liver pate'...
I bought one and ate the whole thing with my fingers just like that in the car  + some slices of organic cold smoked salmon..........
I am sometimes amazed at my belly how it politely digest everything I send down there. I love my belly... it fits so much food..lol

I need to watch out next time if I feel that warming effect from lamb livers... interesting!
I know I do love anything from lamb......

### Inger — 2015-02-26T11:14:20+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-156692>

Thanks Josh....

@ Hope, might be if you made a whole bath (bathtub) there is so much water, it want turn that gray? Or maybe if you lay in there for hours......  Do not forget to brush your skin when you are in the bath too! I do not have a bathtub so I just make me little water in a bowl, mix in about 2 spoonful of the salt and wash my body with it. That makes the water very gray! Even if I always shower beforehand. Weird  I probably am very dirty....lol

I got a new job
Starting today...... in a small fitness club (in the same town close to me where I work for the vets, yay!) ..haha... have never done anything like that before but I think it will be great! 2-3 days a week, 3 PM to 10:30 PM. Yeah, it is a little late but I will survive, it is only 2-3 times / week and I will keep the work by the vets and that is always in the mornings.. 2 days / week at least.
It seems like a really nice work... I will have to do some beauty treatments too I guess... massaging in oils on clients before they get infrared therapy etc. I like that  My main work is in the reception. My boss is a physiotherapist and his wife does the beauty treatments and she is from Denmark..  many Danish clients... like it
Now I got to start saving some money for the cruise!!!!!

### Inger — 2015-02-26T12:15:40+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-156695>

### Hope — 2015-02-26T17:31:26+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-156703>

Inger, I am SO excited for you. And how very, very cool that the spa doesn't do any computer stuff. I think it is still much more common in Germany to do biz that way, for small businesses. When I go to Berlin, I always try to get in with my medicinal massage therapist every other day (I feel like a rock star after a couple weeks) - I pay cash prices I could find nowhere here for what you get - a wonderfully deep, medicinal massage, not the stroking "luxury" you get here sometimes I have no need for. This lady is wonderful... NO computer. Just a phone and fax and paper files for patients. One of our family members in another town owns a fairly large franchised beverage store. She takes credit cards, but no computer - everything is done on paper and she orders stuff with a fax and phone. No cell phone either. In fact at her home she doesn't even have an answering machine. She goes to the Ostsee any chance she gets.

I must confess, your lovely area SO makes me wanna go . I've never been to Denmark either. I wish we could visit when we hope to go to Germany in the spring for a wedding. I SO BADLY want to put my feet in the warm ocean, and my husband too. I've thought about France or Italy, but not sure because it's areas I've not been before...and in my current state, I'm not sure how smart it is to go where I don't speak the language fluently, in case I need a doc. I know the Nordsee will be too cool for my hubby's taste. I can't tell you how torn I am.

I have NO doubt you will shine again in your work and that biz will have more clients just bc of your presence, no doubt. That is amazing they are open so late - I've not heard that part......

So cool you work for vets.....

Oh and I'll have to try to wash my body the way you do. I do dry brush now, when I don't forget LOL. It sure feels good. The baths - I've done three - have totally helped my very sore calves, sorer than I ever had them. So they're doing something. Almost seems too good to be true!

Big hugs!!!!

### Sue-UK — 2015-02-27T11:35:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-156797>

Hi Inger

Josh posted this link in the biohacking altitude thread [http://www.the-scientist.com/?articles.view/articleNo/42095/title/-Inner-GPS--Support/](http://www.the-scientist.com/?articles.view/articleNo/42095/title/-Inner-GPS--Support/). It reminded me of you regularly looking up at the sky ......

From the book "Life on the edge: the coming of age of quantum biology"

_"Despite the European robin being a nocturnal migrant, activation of its magnetic compass required a small amount of light (around the blue end of the visible spectrum), hinting that the bird's eyes played a significant role in how it worked."_

Head direction cells, grid cells, light .... perhaps that's part of how looking up at the sky works its quantum magic .....

### Inger — 2015-03-07T19:18:33+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-157752>

Cool, Sue...  I look so much up in the sky that I easily stumble on stuff...lol but the sky is so beautiful! That light.... ahhh..

Hope, I now have 3 things I put on my skin..lol Epsom salt + water mix like a toner, magnesium oil, and Base salt. I use the one I intuitively feel for at the moment
and I really love my both jobs. Man are my bosses both amazing.... I just love them....    and the work I love too!
I once tried the mineral drinks we sell at the studio... and a protein shake too. They are full of weird stuff and aspartame etc. I just wanted to try how they make me feel.
OMG I got an headache right after  and it lasted for hours... my body seemed to hate that stuff..lol
How on earth can people drink those things...???

\- - - - - -

I had such a wonderful dream tonight......
In the dream I walked at work waitressing. I felt heavy.. like tired a bit. Yeah... pretty heavy. I had worked so much. Then all of a sudden my grandpa (I loved my grandpa so dearly...) appeared behind me, and closed me into his arms... it was like I was surrounded by him.. and love..... and I got lifted up from the floor.. all of a sudden I weighed nothing at all... I felt so light, filled with love, and so safe in his arms. I stated to cry from pure joy.. and it was so strong it woke me up and I was crying... for real.... It was 5:30 AM.

It was just so strong! Like so real. I have been working crazy hours this week..... maybe it was my reward

### Inger — 2015-03-07T19:27:47+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-157754>

it is pretty funny to work for the vets as I come so close... it is very private! I make their beds... wash their clothes... clean... do anything they need.
Often when I come in the mornings they have just woke or the husband vet is still sleeping..... they are both vets. They are so nice to me. Like really really nice.
We chat when we have time... the husband vet is so over worked and we chat about health and he hates technology too and wishes everything was like in old days... the modern stuff just stresses him out....
I tell him to eat fish and tan nude with his wife in the backyard, they have a beautiful backyard where no one can see..... Well, I am pretty much in love with the whole family I have to say.....
and at the studio they are as nice too... such a lovely, beautiful couple, my bosses. They are just oozing love
I am so lucky I cant believe it is for real? Well. I make no millions...lol just enuf to survive.. but happiness can not be bought for any money... that I know...

Hi Louise

I am doing great, had to recover a bit this weekend from the rough work week, but I feel great now, took a long walk in the woods and ate plenty of wild greens.. and cleaned my home because tomorrow my sister and brother from Norway comes visit me, yay! It is going to be so much fun

Louise... when I start to feel bad... it is always because I have forgotten stuff too
and when I plug into nature again and do the good stuff I get better so fast  Believe me, I mess up at times too  thanks God I know the cure! We just need TO DO IT

I think my magnesium level had went to pretty bad because of stress and yeah... smoking  (stopped doing that stupid thing tho) and I started to get heart palps again and stuff.. and all of a sudden I read about magnesium oil, it just popped in my way... and it is a blessing cause I have no money to buy the expensive magnesium and this oils still works way better for me at least. I have been working crazy hours... days with 14 hours work...... but i weirdly survive just fine when I tan nude any hour I get in... even if just 30 minutes.. and do all the other awesome stuff I have learned from Jack
I have started to shut off the lights when I clean at the vets. I can clean very well in just daylight, their house has big windows anyways. I feel I get way less exhausted when I use no artificial lights... When my boss comes in she puts the lights on..lol but when I am alone I just shut them off again! Thankfully everyone here tries to save electricity as it is expensive in Germany, so i think she likes when I use little light... what a blessing
So... at work there is a customer that told me he is a diving teacher and I will attend his diving courses that start it May     cost is only 9 € /month.. YAY
I am so freaking exited! As I cant dive! I just cant seem to get under the water. I must learn to dive before the cruise so I can dive in the caribic  . He is very nice guy too (married... but I can surely feel he has a certain magic.... and great hormones. weird. he is crazy about nature as am I). Everyone is nice at my 2 jobs

I have started picking oysters again and walking on the ocean floor. Man is it magic. No words to describe that feeling being out there alone and nothing but ocean floor as far as you can see.. and me and the oysters and the birds
I do not care that my feet get ice cold
that is where I belong
it is my word

### Inger — 2015-03-25T17:54:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-159418>

So I am doing a biohack

I wanted to know if the homeopatic HCG really work...as it is so weird how can they possibly work? I have never tried anything homeopatic in my life ever before.
I decided to try them... they are so cheap,around 15 € and I am a bit out of money right now and I would save lots of money on foods..... and it is spring time here and in nature there is not much fat anyways so I guess it is not too bad a mismatch either. Problem is I am at ideal bodyweight and have max 2 kg fat to lose. It is going to be interesting!

Loading days were hard...lol As I normally eat between 2000 and 3000 kcal / day I figured I have to eat way more.. so I managed to get in I guess about 6000 kcal / day
uh! One meal could look like... 250 grams of butter and 200 grams of fatty salmon.... I was so FULL    Did not eat anything out of my normal diet tho, only good stuff.

Now I am at day 2 vlc, I do about 500-600 kcal/day. The weird thing is I do not have hunger really..... kinda weird to eat so little! I do not do any supps except of sulfur like always. And magnesium oil on skin. I figure I get everything I need from my food, i eat really great stuff like oysters, herring, liver, heart..... no fat. Some veggies but I do not do too much... man my belly get so full fast

I have done everything raw so far. I feel just amazing. Just had wild salmon and 4 small oysters, seaweed and 1/2 cucumber for dinner.

I was wondering about the protocol as it says no fatty fish, but you have to take fish oil...? I do not get that logic at all
I have decided to do 1 meal a day with fatty fish... and seafood at every meal, when having liver or heart I do a few oysters additionally. No fish oil... eeek.

I do wild herbs too, I had nettles and some other delicious herbs that I picked in the woods today

If I get too thin I will have to increase my food for sure. I think that is gonna happen as I already can see I have lost some fat in just 2 days
I do not want to get too thin as I think that does not look pretty at all.
But man does this save money...lol

If it works and no bad side effects, I know I can recommend it to one of my sisters that wants to lose some fat, she really struggles with that

now I really wonder how on earth can these tiny tiny pills work, and they have no molecules at all left from HCG. Pretty magic!
Makes me wonder about many other things in life...

Well.... interesting.. very interesting

### Inger — 2015-03-28T20:56:38+0200

and I have herring and salmon too + some raw veggies / seaweed / wild herbs on the side. Oysters every day, a couple. Of my self harvested wild ones. They are so good.. But it is Gold... I need to save and eat just a piece here and there...... Tastes like the best old aged cheese.. really. But better

### Inger — 2015-04-03T21:12:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-160244>

Oh man I got a bit sick I guess... nose is running a little.. and a bit stuffy... and feeling a little off. Still I managed to work 14 hours yesterday
But now I have 6 days off.... how nice    time to heal!
I guess the HCG makes some detox reaction as it burns old fat? I also had a planned binge  (alcohol is not allowed on hhCG at all BTW...) on tuesday... ate a unreal dinner...lol wanna hear? here it comes;
in between 4 PM and 8 PM I had

150-200 g grams of fresh cooked mussles (about 1 kg with shell)
500 grams of raw fatty salmon.
140 grams of canned mackerel
a 200 gram medium fried burger
2 small glasses of port wine

so not vlc....lol

but I did it because I decided to, yeah. I am thin anyways so it does not matter if I lose less weight at all  Next day straight back on the vlc again, no problems. Just my sleep went to crap that night. OMG... I was way too hot, woke up in the night... no good! Gosh I was so full.... but the port wine made me crazy hungry! So I just felt like eating....loads of DHA...lol
Sure I knew that is what will happen..lol
So good to be back to the amazing sleep again.

IDK if that binge helped me get this little illness? Maybe. Or it is just detox.
Hate to have a stuffed nose tho

Today for dinner I had a mackerel head smoothie with 2 mackerel heads, seaweedwater, 1 fresh raw oyster, 1 raw pastured egg and a salad with squash and celery and raw onion. Yum
I got me 4 big fatty mackerels from the fishmonger and I think they are the fattiest I have ever seen....lol Tomorrow will be mackerel day.....yay

I wish I could get raw oysters all the time but they are just not available here so it is canned for me . I had some before our trip and they were so freeking good. We will see how I feel this time. Last round I wanted everything cooked but the time before that during the summer, almost everything needed to be raw or cold.

I did have this on vacation, parrot fish ceviche with avocado and a little corn will watching the sunset (minus the crackers) OMG it was the best I had ever had.

### Inger — 2015-04-15T11:22:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-161252>

No Hope, I want lose too much I promise. I am at 52,4 kg now.. and I have been at 46..lol but that was way too little. I want go under 50 kg. I have cheated a little last 2 days...lol on purpose
I had a guest and I had a dinner of one pound of fatty salmon, some shrimp and some port wine yesterday and the day before
Is all good, I feel great I guess my redox could take that

My ex husband will move in here next monday - how fun is that! He needs to come and heal  We are so good friends and I think it is going to be fun
He will take care of my cat when I am at the cruise

my life never gets boring

### Inger — 2015-04-16T21:44:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-161460>

Today I had 130 grams of canned mackerel, cherry tomatoes and a seaweed smoothie for breakfast
Lunch was 120 gram of raw fatty salmon in a big green salad
and dinner was 120 grams of raw grass fed beef on a big salad with fennel and raw onions..... yum

I could go on this diet forever! It takes care of my issue getting good saturated fats...as my body eats its own fat now. I do eat raw fatty seafood still for sure... no way will I go without the DHA  I know eating kerrygold is not ideal for me... it is pasteurized.. after all.... I do pretty well on it but ideal is raw grass fed butter for sure and raw animal fat. When I end this diet I will take care to get me real good fat sources! I do know where to get them... I guess I had gotten a bit lazy

After dinner today at 4 PM I fell asleep on a lambs skin in my living room.... my body needed that, man I felt good afterwards! I got a bit too little sleep last night as I had to work late and had to wake up early because I had forgot the keys from work in my pocket and needed to drive back to work to return them before the cleaning lady arrived... oh man
anyways that nap felt awesome... then I went out in the woods and picked me a bag of nettles again for the next days. So many nettles growing now, I was so amazed and thankful for the meaty green delicious nettles everywhere... I could not stop wondering why are not everyone out picking them.....
Tomorrow is a 14 hour day work day........ but I feel recharged now

### notsoperfick — 2015-04-17T23:11:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-161566>

How can you tell if salmon is fatty, it all looks the same to me lol? Also what else do you put with your nettles, they're growing well here and I quite fancy trying them but possibly not just on their own, are they bitter?

### louise — 2015-04-19T01:28:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-161683>

nettle smoothie sounds interesting inger.......I have picked the spring nettles for years but only make tea with them so im wondering what you do with them......I like the tips aswell but they do sting my mouth a bit if I eat them straight from the ground.......I have lots of dandelions too but only make a tea with these
I forgot to say hi.... hope you are good xxxx

### Inger — 2015-04-19T21:16:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-161733>

> [notsoperfick said:](/goto/post?id=161566)
>
> How can you tell if salmon is fatty, it all looks the same to me lol? Also what else do you put with your nettles, they're growing well here and I quite fancy trying them but possibly not just on their own, are they bitter?

It is easy....lol You see and taste and feel the fat
Wild caught salmon that I get here (frozen) have maybe 3 % fat... (?) and the farmed Norwegian salmon that I get here too has way way more fat. The texture is way different. Oily.
You can also read the label, if it has any... it will tell the fat content too.

Nettles are not bitter, at least not to me
I like to make a smoothie with water and have them raw as a drink because I think I get the most benefit that way. But you can make a nice nettle soup, we did all the time as kids, very easy!
Boil lots of nettles maybe 10 minutes with onion, in water, or better a nice bone broth. Then mix the soup with a mixer into smooth. Add butter, HWC if you tolerate, nutmeg, salt pepper....
and serve with cooked egg halves  super delicious! I might have to make this next week as the ex husband comes  he likes it too

You can make nettle pancakes too! We did these in summer and fried them on the fire as kids too
Just add finely chopped raw nettle leaves, and lots of them, to the pancake mix you prefer. Maybe just eggs and water/HWC will work or add coconut flour... some salt is needed too, fry in butter. YUM.

### Inger — 2015-04-19T21:20:42+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-161734>

> [louise said:](/goto/post?id=161683)
>
> nettle smoothie sounds interesting inger.......I have picked the spring nettles for years but only make tea with them so im wondering what you do with them......I like the tips aswell but they do sting my mouth a bit if I eat them straight from the ground.......I have lots of dandelions too but only make a tea with these
> I forgot to say hi.... hope you are good xxxx

Louise, if you want to eat them straight from the ground you need to crush them in between your fingers first before putting them into your mouth or they sure will sting...lol
makes small rolls of the leaves and push hard... then they will not sting
I eat dandelion leaved once in a while just like that directly from the ground.. not many as they are bitter but a few is awesome  Just had mega juicy and big chickweeds when I was in the woods.. and for sure got me a bag of nettles too!
I am doing so well, thanks Louise

### Inger — 2015-04-20T13:33:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-161795>

My plan is working awesome    Had fatty raw mackerel for breakfast with seaweedsmoo0thie (raw soaked seaweed and water) and salad and for lunch fatty mackerel, 2 oysters, and salad + nettle smoothie. Life is good  I do not feel one bit deprived, I get to eat my favorite foods all the time and I eat big salads so volume in food is nice. I am amazed how my belly is doing so well, no digestion issues with all these raw veggies... I used to get bloated etc from them but now... nothing...... I have the feeling my intestines are super happy.... sorry TMI...  but the poop smells like baby poop... if anyone remember how that smells  I do  No constipation or other issues, everything is perfect! So cool!

Took a bikini pic today as proof I am not skinny yet

### kovita — 2015-04-20T13:45:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-161797>

Inger, I know nothing about HCG homeopathy, but I can tell you it did make me look great this time around. And the crazy estrogene and progesterone levels too. I was quite thin the last few years, maybe too much as I see it now. I hated to be pregnant before because you just get chubby and your body stores fat. For a change I have never felt more beautifull in my life than during this pregnancy. I gained so far about 15-16 kg and oppositely to my past postpregnancy aims I will try to preserve at least some of these curves as long as I can. I suffered by llifelong obsession by weight and looks and as it comes often in life, the real things join you after you forget them. It sort of reminds me your personal story. Not that you would ever be looks obssesed ;-) it is more about doing the things in certain way to be healthy and feel good and being awarded by far more than this. I find this fascinating and extremaly simple and still cannot really locate people around me (real people I meet every day) who would see how simple and easy it is. I wish we could organize some gathering here in Europe. I swear when I finally have a house of my own, I will invite all of you and i hope at least one person turns up ;-)

### Inger — 2015-05-20T21:36:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-164838>

> [Jenny S said:](/goto/post?id=164657)
>
> You're doing really well Inger, as you said time will heal but in the mean time that doesn't help much does it. Eat more butter - yummy stuff, that might help!
> I'm scared at moment that I'm likely going to end up same path as you with husband. I'm sure he thinks I'll get over all this "Jack nonsense" soon but obviously I'm not. Sending you lots of Aussies hugs

Oh man Jenny... I hope you will figure it out.
I do not wish anyone what I have gone through past months. It is just so hard..... when you are so much in love.... and you see you have not done thing perfect either but the circumstances made you act like that because they were just not optimal  how sad is that. I think I could have done way better.. you know..... but my persona just shuts down in a wrong environment  and I cannot think and act right... but when I am out in the woods... I get filled with light and love and patience and anything good, it just comes naturally... is it not weird... it is like out there cannot exist anything negative at all... and you just forget and forgive and love unconditionally............ but when you are sleep deprived.. smoking.. drinking... staying inside a lot.. late nights.... then comes the bad thoughts and moods.....
yeah. I am way too broken to stand that too much.. that is the truth. I just do not have too big reserves. I need to refuel so often and a lot to feel great.
Maybe one day when I am way more optimal I can stand that kind of stuff better and not losing energy?

It is just too sad because we fitted so well... like he used to say... that we harmonize.. you know? Our personalities and hormones just fitted like crazy..... but yeah... he is living such a different life and I cant do it I just cant - it destroys me

@ Thomas... that is so kind of you. The issue is I am very spontaneous and I do not like to look for someone..lol but maybe I have one day or I will stray alone and rot... haha

### Lahelada — 2015-05-21T14:39:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-164919>

Jenny, I hid in plain sight . You need to get well for yourself but that is hard when someone is chipping away at your strength . The doc would like us to shout the benefits of MHS from the roof tops but until you can keep a charge yourself don't try and spark someone else . They will drag you down. I think lack of dopamine at the right time plays a part here. If you waver that is their way in to get back to their comfort zone. It is said that alcoholics neeed to find their bottom before they can get better,for example. People around them need to recognise that their part in life is keeping /getting themselves healthy and that doing that is not a crime. Pick your battles . In my job I get to look behind the curtains of a lot of people and it is amazing to see how right Jack is and how people fight to get what they want not realising that they are their worst enemy.
Between us girls,guys find Jack a lot easier to take when they realise that oxy twice a day is on the cards. Careful though depending on their own state of health they just might all over sudden have a lot more work at the office .  Just saying ,my lighthearted musings on life after Jack over a BPC .Don't despair.

but still. too sad... but when i leave any bad thoughts behind and just think beautiful, grateful thoughts about all the beautiful moments we still had the pain goes away, how cool is that
magic

Just had a prolonged lunch-dinner..lol 2,5 hours of feeding and now I am full

I managed to eat;

80 gram of canned mackerel for a starter
a coffee with whole cardamom seeds and cooled down a bit and mixed with 50 grams of raw grassfed butter
then
300 grams of raw salmon on a nice green salad seasoned with raw onion, tabasco, ACV, sea salt and mustard
then
1 fennel bulb, raw, sliced and dipped into a super delicious avocado mash seasoned with sea salt only- I have some super yummy organic tree ripened avocado Fuerte here now... mmm
then maybe 20 fresh yummy raw organic macadamia nuts, in the shell
then
5 oysters, raw

No more food today...lol

### Jenny S — 2015-05-22T05:04:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-164999>

> [Lahelada said:](/goto/post?id=164919)
>
> Jenny, I hid in plain sight . You need to get well for yourself but that is hard when someone is chipping away at your strength . The doc would like us to shout the benefits of MHS from the roof tops but until you can keep a charge yourself don't try and spark someone else . They will drag you down. I think lack of dopamine at the right time plays a part here. If you waver that is their way in to get back to their comfort zone. It is said that alcoholics neeed to find their bottom before they can get better,for example. People around them need to recognise that their part in life is keeping /getting themselves healthy and that doing that is not a crime. Pick your battles . In my job I get to look behind the curtains of a lot of people and it is amazing to see how right Jack is and how people fight to get what they want not realising that they are their worst enemy.
> Between us girls,guys find Jack a lot easier to take when they realise that oxy twice a day is on the cards. Careful though depending on their own state of health they just might all over sudden have a lot more work at the office .  Just saying ,my lighthearted musings on life after Jack over a BPC .Don't despair.

Unfortunately he's just finished radiation treatment for prostate cancer & now on hormone therapy for another 2 - 3 years so no oxy here. He had gallbladder out last year. I have referred him to some of jack's posts on both things but he has never read any. I've given up telling hime things as I read them too. +
I've decided your right Lahelada, just look after myself first & hopefully he will choose to follow. Doesn't seem likely but hey - miracles can happen!
Thanks for your answer, as I was having a very bad day other day but I'm back up again. Must be all the CT - another dream as to when I'm cold adapted!

### Inger — 2015-05-26T20:48:40+0300

lol.... No doubt about that! I am scared how much I can eat

So sorry about your DH  that must be hard...
At work my coworker told me her husband suffers from a very rare form of cancer and he is so sick.... I told her about what he needs to do and I will write her more.. she was so happy she believed it all.. she hugged me... but then she said might be he does not want to give up his habits.. I said yeah... maybe. But we still need to share, always! Everyone have a right to know the choices... so they can choose. Many choose to go on as they have... but then we cant do anything more. We never know... I share with everyone all the time I do not care. My bosses all knows I drink fish head and do CT and eat loads of fish and tan nude to heal.. yeah. My new boss is awesome.. just awesome!!!! He loves oysters too! He calls me "princess"....lol how cute is that  And his wife and kids are tooo nice and cute.,.. everyone there are... I have so much fun at my new work even if it is crazy much work..lol I have not had one day off for 2 weeks and it continues... I work every single day  but as it is very much fun it does not matter so much tho
I have been out of oysters for a week tho as I had no chance to pick them... always high tide before and after work... this week I might get to pick some tho.. cant wait!

### Inger — 2015-05-26T20:51:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-165458>

I went for a dip in the ocean after work.... took my shoes off and walked barefoot to the beach and got in in the nude... dried me off with my jacket and the rest dried in the evening sun as I sat there for a while... man was it good... my feet ached because I need to get me new shoes...uh...I am on my feet all day and I need some really good shoes or they start to hurt in the end of the day. Will buy me some this week

I have been a bad girl and cheated with whipped HWC (that has carrageenan in it) from the kitchen at work...(we are allowed to eat and drink anything we want ..) it tastes awesome with coffee and as we are so busy no time for breaks so then I just grab coffee with loads of cream and drink and it is soooo yummy but man I have gotten some pimples now...hehe.... need to quit that habit!

### Inger — 2015-06-02T18:05:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-166279>

I have 100 oysters in my fridge right now    Need to load up before the trip  I will give some away too.... to my bosses! The chef in the restaurant I work in (he is the owner too) have made me promise to bring him one every day I work, he is crazy about them...lol I brought him a big one Sunday and he immediately went into the kitchen, opened it and enjoyed it.. and said...mmmm.mm that was a great start of the day  I need those from you every day....lol he said he will come and pick oysters nude at the beach with me one day too...hehe... maybe his wife will come too? Great stuff!
And tomorrow I will bring the vet I work for one too. He said he is willing to try... he is soooo stressed, it will do him some good

and I have finally figured it out why it did not work with the boyfriend... I think. I think it has to do with fear. Yes.... it is so weird. He has so much fear.... for new and different things.. and that makes him act like he does. It feels good to finally have figured it out. Now I understand... I did not... for so long and it was such a pain. But now it is not much pain anymore because I understand why. It helps so much! I do think I look kinda older now... from all the stress, darn

I just had a load of fermented lamb hearts for dinner... and then a big salad with mackerel and the 4 big oysters.... and some Brazil nuts.... yummmmm
oh... and I had a nettle-smoothie too  Life is good
it is rainy and cold here... IDK where the summer is gone but rainy weather is great for getting stuff done

@ Krista, so funny we have the same weather! Tomorrow starts the sunshine tho and I am so happy because I need to tan before the cruise to get my skin a bit used to the strong karibian sun! I have no clue how many hours. I just tan whenever I can! And these days that is way too little as I work so much, every day. But I do it always when I have time. any other home/house work has to wait, sun comes first

### Inger — 2015-08-05T15:48:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-174009>

Well, Thomas.. I do have a rich life... almost too much  So many want to be friends with me... I feel like running out in the woods and hide sometimes.... because I LOVE my lonely time....
I am charging then.... and i think.. and wonder about life.. I see so many things.. and I wonder about them all.....

I am so happy when I am alone. I need that time to sort myself out! It is funny....

But I do LOVE people too. They are so interesting! When they share their stories... I feel part of their life.. and I learn a ton..... good and bad things... and I see what I want and what I want not

I have realized, when I share my stories.. they open up too and share theirs... and it feels like love......
but sometimes it hurts too. Because there are many sad things. People suffer a lot... but seems like they still cant let go... of what is hurting them. So I promise myself to always be able to let go
I have to confess, I sometimes have a hard time too... and that is why I need to do the lambs balls and stuff like that...lol

I am doing a lambs balls biohack..lol
I feel they help me... they somehow makes me stronger, mentally? I wonder how that is.
I know they have lots of testosteron, and I eat them raw, but still... testosteron should not be able to be taken up orally? Is that true? Are there other components in the testicles that help?
Because they do work.............
You should get you some

Just had lunch.... I had
a big salad with a small can of mackerel in tomato juice on the top (I ran out of raw mackerel and herring... sadly. Will get new ones tomorrow ..)
7 oysters
1 lambs ball

### Inger — 2015-08-05T16:30:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-174012>

I found something interesting.... looks we do are able to absorb some natural testosteron orally.....

> **Oral testosterone**
>
>
> Oral testosterone therapy (e.g. Andriol Testocaps) uses testosterone undecanoate, the only natural form of testosterone that can be absorbed when taken orally. It may be more expensive and less effective than other modes of testosterone replacement, and is therefore usually used by men who cannot use other forms of testosterone. Oral therapy may also be used to treat older men who are starting therapy, as treatment can be stopped quickly if they are diagnosed with prostate cancer.
>
> The starting dose varies and may be as low as 40 mg daily, although men typically require 160–240 mg a day, taken in 2–4 doses. The doctor will adjust the dose, depending on the response to treatment. Oral testosterone should be taken with food, as this increases the amount of testosterone absorbed by the body.

[http://www.myvmc.com/treatments/testosterone-replacement-therapy-in-men/#c16](http://www.myvmc.com/treatments/testosterone-replacement-therapy-in-men/#c16)

loading on seafood too as always.. I crave it every day.. plenty!

### Inger — 2015-08-19T21:55:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-175153>

I do not want a beard...lol

Bill, have you ever tried raw testicles? If, tell me about your experience, how did it made you feel and do you still eat them?
Sometimes I almost think you are a troll

I read about that our brain uses a lot of cholesterol and that made me think they might be great for the brain.... as energy! Together with seafood...
I do feel pretty unstoppable... like mentally, it is a nice feeling like if the whole world crashes around me, if I get fired.. whatever happens, easy piece I can do it
I just feel so happy  just wow

I am so lucky.
I have everything I can dream of   how did I became so lucky? I sure did not deserve it!

### Inger — 2015-08-19T22:03:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-175154>

I have amazing food stuff... even for free!
I have my horse barn
I have amazing neighbors.. bosses.. work places... nature... everyone is so kind..

and last Sunday another wonder happened! The ex husband have been living here and trying to build a business so he can start earn money and go and live by himself but he does not had any money to start the thing... so I finally asked my parents for help and... normally.. I was sure they will not because of many things. It was very very unlikely. But I asked anyways to borrow some money to help the ex husband start a business so he want be stuck here at my place forever without money (I just have enough to feed us both but not much more) . So my dad called me Sunday and said he had read something in the bible that morning... that we should always borrow to people that ask..... so he had decided to do that and help me...... How crazy is that???? How come he read that place right that morning after getting to know I needed help?
Magic stuff. I sure does not deserve all the good stuff that happens and I keep getting overwhelmed.. oh man.
who is watching me
who is helping me?
I am in awe
but someone is there

### Inger — 2015-08-20T10:11:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-175193>

Well, you are both right, too. It is risky. But I have calculated it all in my head and come to the conclusions I take the risk... from all what I have seen and experienced.. it is not so black white.. life never is
I need to get him off here and start something own I really need it. And he sure always was kind to me money wise.. he gave me anything he had, if he had. No one can understand our relationship.. it is very weird..lol He does not love me as a woman but he does anything to help me live well.. like he bought my dads old car as a gift for me.. and it was not too cheap either! Well... haha.. maybe he does it a bit egoistically because he knows I will then always help him when he is in need...lol but so is life.... share, give and take
I am not feeling too much in debt to my parents because I gave all my payments for my jobs to my dad all the time I lived home as a teenager and worked a lot... so we build that house together
It is all entangled
The debt is not more than the car is worth so if everything goes wrong I can always give the car back..lol
I will find a way! I know... of course!
I just cannot stand to have the ex around 7/24 and he gets nervous about not being able to work.... he has no car and you need one to work here, it is so rural.. and I need the car for my 2 jobs, and he would never take my car away. He is not like that. He always tries to earn money.... for me.. so weird! Even when he has a girlfriend.. he helps me out every time he can. And I help him. When men does not understand I am not in ,love and they cant stop to chase me, he is always ready to help.... that is great too! But as my hormones optimizes I chase them away myself..lol the testosterone is pretty helpful.. it is just hard to figure out how to do it in a sensible way
My ex is very happy if I fall in love..... but he does not let anyone hurt me, ever. But I need to be strong myself to scare those men away for sure! Telling I sleep in a horse barn, eat raw brains and balls and fish head etc does not seem to help one bit  and my hands and feet are so dirty too.... most of the time, they get that way when you pick oysters in the mud and walk barefeet all the time
I do not get why some men think I am in love with them when I am not.... just a good friend.. but maybe I am not good in giving signals.. I need to work on that...... icing my head.......
I like to touch.. and be close to people... I like that a lot! I touch people all the time....... oh man. I walk hand in hand with my ex all the time too when we are in the woods... people would never think we are divorced. I just do not care. It feels good and then I do it. Maybe it is wrong...... but to me it feels right?

### Inger — 2015-09-30T13:52:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-178239>

I got the most amazing gift for my birthday from someone very special to me...........
a bow.... a real hunting bow........
one day we were together outside in the woods and exercised with the bow........ it was so much fun....!!!!!!
It is super heavy to shoot, I need to get a lot of strength to even be able to use it! I wished me one for years but had no money to buy it........ how lucky am I
With the bow you can hunt moose.. bears.. anything.........
I still cannot believe it is true..........

I enjoy the autumn so much...... somehow I always loved it. The fresh crispy air.. the coolness.... everything starts to die.... lol maybe I am addicted to let stuff die... and then comes something new  it has its special magic......... I like the shutting down part
to let go..... and then something better comes instead....... autumn reminds me of that
it is somehow.. relaxing?

### Gagnrad — 2015-10-13T20:51:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-179389>

> [thomas said:](/goto/post?id=179320)
>
> I am thinking about buying a 26w uva/uvb lamp indeed^ I actually have looked into every lamp type and spectrum some time ago.
> back in the day when I was making a videoprojector I had a 250w hqi lamp. Man that was bright to have in a bedroom. A small sun by itself..

Homemade saunas based around IR lamps will make you sweat if nothing else. And are said to be more effective than sweat baths - heated rocks and steam and whatnot - which are pretty much _universal_ in pre-modern cultures, presumably for good reasons.

The journalist who wrote this book:

[http://www.amazon.fr/Vitamin-Murders-Killed-Healthy-Britain/dp/1846270146/](http://www.amazon.fr/Vitamin-Murders-Killed-Healthy-Britain/dp/1846270146/)

Had the fat from his buttocks sampled before and after using IR saunas for some months. (They take a core - sounds painful.) Interestingly, he was hellishly high in some nasty pesticide - he concluded this was just from one summer working as an agricultural labourer as a young man - but after a series of IR saunas that chemical was down to "average" levels. It really seems to work.

### Inger — 2015-10-16T14:56:35+0300

and still I have enough energy....
so cool  The UV light in the morning feels awesome!!!!! It has been so rainy and gray here lately! And the lamps feel like such a blessing!
With loads and loads of DHA

I am not too scared anymore to have to work so much because I now know how to get the energy

I do 1 or 2 whole body tanning sessions in a tanning bed with UVA+UVB / week too, not too longs sessions, feels nice.......

### Andrea — 2015-10-17T19:51:02+0300

### Andrea — 2015-10-19T15:41:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-179861>

Tanning bed? Hmmm... I've been thinking about it because of all the light talk, but I'm hesitant. The days are getting shorter and shorter, natural UV is very limited and it's getting more and more cold. My body knows it. Is it really a good idea to emulate summer in the winter? With devices that I suppose give off quite some nnEMF...
So much for nature...

I don't know... In September I noticed a shift in food cravings and other things compared to the summer. (Except for some days when I could kill for chocolate candy or salty nuts. However, my brain is on this weird roller coaster ride with regard to dopamine, serotonin etc. so I might just be generally very confused.  )

Anyway, for me, last winter was a period of resting. I love the summer, I feel like the sun is healing my body, but still, I find something restorative about winter and the darkness and cold. I felt like my brain was healing better during last fall and winter. So I'm not sure I'm up to deliberately intervening with bright artificial light... Looking forward to read about your experiences.

### Inger — 2015-10-27T09:26:57+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ingers-journal.6472/post-180537>

Rerun you have good points about the use of tanning beds......... I think I will stop using them in the darkest of winter....... to get a break
The problem is because I have been working so much I have got too little sun for my liking.... even if I tan all the time when I can.....

Yesterday I was nude in the sun 5 hours... it was soooo good... I got so sick...... and had to be home from work. I know why I got sick..... what to do..lol my own choice.. (I had forgot how stressful it is to spend time with ambivalent people... omg ..) but at least I got a whole day to tan nude ..... it was + 10 degree C and the sun was warming me so nicely.........

The other day at work I served a 92 yo grand grand mother..... she was partying with her children and grandchildren and she was just amazing!!!!!!
I could no way believe she was 92 yo... no way. She was the most beautiful woman..... I asked what was her secret, she said all her beautiful children and grandchildren..lol
I watched her. She was eating.. lamb.. drinking wine..... she said she drinks all the time she needs it to cope with all the relatives.. and she laughed as she said that..lol
_she had a deep, beautiful tan_...... like she spend a lot of time in the sun... she was slim... she looked so healthy! And very happy
She asked for HWC for the chocolate cake they had made themselves to enjoy after dinner..... so she clearly was not afraid of fat....
She seemed to enjoy life very much........
I want to be like her when I grow old
